🚀

Elite Dashboard Fix

A tela branca geralmente é causada pelo caminho base incorreto. Corrigi isso automaticamente nesta versão (V2).

text-align: center;\n}\n\n.logo {\n height: 6em;\n padding: 1.5em;\n will-change: filter;\n transition: filter 300ms;\n}\n.logo:hover {\n filter: drop-shadow(0 0 2em #646cffaa);\n}\n.logo.react:hover {\n filter: drop-shadow(0 0 2em #61dafbaa);\n}\n\n@keyframes logo-spin {\n from {\n transform: rotate(0deg);\n }\n to {\n transform: rotate(360deg);\n }\n}\n\n@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) {\n a:nth-of-type(2) .logo {\n animation: logo-spin infinite 20s linear;\n }\n}\n\n.card {\n padding: 2em;\n}\n\n.read-the-docs {\n color: #888;\n}\n","src/App.tsx":"import { Toaster } from \"@/components/ui/toaster\";\nimport { Toaster as Sonner } from \"@/components/ui/sonner\";\nimport { TooltipProvider } from \"@/components/ui/tooltip\";\nimport { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { HashRouter, Routes, Route } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ThemeProvider } from \"next-themes\";\nimport Index from \"./pages/Index\";\nimport NotFound from \"./pages/NotFound\";\nimport { AppProvider } from \"./contexts/AppContext\";\nimport { MusicPlayerProvider } from \"./contexts/MusicPlayerContext\";\nimport { AuthProvider } from \"./contexts/AuthContext\";\nimport Auth from \"./pages/Auth\";\nimport Admin from \"./pages/Admin\";\nimport OrgAdmin from \"./pages/OrgAdmin\";\nimport { SystemBanner } from \"./components/SystemBanner\";\n\nconst queryClient = new QueryClient();\n\nconst App = () => (\n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n } />\n } />\n } />\n } />\n } />\n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n);\n\nexport default App;\n","src/components/ActiveBreakModal.tsx":"import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from './ui/dialog';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Timer, Coffee, Eye, Droplet, Dumbbell, Wind, AlertCircle, Check } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';\n\ninterface ActiveBreakModalProps {\n isOpen: boolean;\n onComplete: () => void;\n onSkip: () => void;\n duration: number;\n breakType: 'short' | 'long';\n}\n\nconst EXERCISE_SUGGESTIONS = [\n {\n icon: Coffee,\n title: 'Alongue o pescoço e os ombros',\n description: 'Faça movimentos circulares suaves por 30 segundos',\n },\n {\n icon: Droplet,\n title: 'Beba um copo d\\'água',\n description: 'Mantenha-se hidratado para melhor concentração',\n },\n {\n icon: Eye,\n title: 'Descanse os olhos',\n description: 'Olhe para algo distante por 20 segundos (regra 20-20-20)',\n },\n {\n icon: Dumbbell,\n title: 'Levante e estique as pernas',\n description: 'Faça alguns passos ou agachamentos leves',\n },\n {\n icon: Wind,\n title: 'Respire profundamente',\n description: '5 respirações profundas pelo nariz e solte pela boca',\n },\n];\n\nexport const ActiveBreakModal = ({\n isOpen,\n onComplete,\n onSkip,\n duration,\n breakType\n}: ActiveBreakModalProps) => {\n const [timeLeft, setTimeLeft] = useState(duration * 60);\n\n // Memoriza 3 sugestões aleatórias que só mudam quando o modal abre\n const randomExercises = useMemo(() => {\n return EXERCISE_SUGGESTIONS\n .sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5)\n .slice(0, 3);\n }, [isOpen]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (isOpen) {\n setTimeLeft(duration * 60);\n }\n }, [isOpen, duration]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!isOpen || timeLeft <= 0) return;\n\n const interval = setInterval(() => {\n setTimeLeft((prev) => Math.max(0, prev - 1));\n }, 1000);\n\n return () => clearInterval(interval);\n }, [isOpen, timeLeft]);\n\n const formatTime = (seconds: number) => {\n const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\n const secs = seconds % 60;\n return `${mins.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;\n };\n\n return (\n \n e.preventDefault()}\n onEscapeKeyDown={(e) => e.preventDefault()}\n >\n \n \n \n PAUSA ATIVA OBRIGATÓRIA\n \n \n\n
\n
\n
\n \n \n Pausa {breakType === 'short' ? 'Curta' : 'Longa'} - {duration} minutos\n \n
\n\n
\n {formatTime(timeLeft)}\n
\n\n

\n Cuide do seu corpo e da sua mente. Mova-se um pouco!\n

\n
\n\n
\n

Sugestões de Atividades:

\n\n
\n {randomExercises.map((exercise, index) => {\n const Icon = exercise.icon;\n return (\n
\n \n
\n

{exercise.title}

\n

\n {exercise.description}\n

\n
\n
\n );\n })}\n
\n
\n\n
\n \n \n Pausa Concluída (+15 Pontos)\n \n\n \n Pular Pausa (-5 Pontos)\n \n
\n
\n \n \n );\n};\n","src/components/ActivityLog.tsx":"import React, { useState, useMemo } from 'react';\r\nimport { useApp, ActivityLog as ActivityLogType } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\r\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';\r\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\r\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';\r\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\r\nimport { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';\r\nimport {\r\n History,\r\n Search,\r\n Filter,\r\n ShieldAlert,\r\n Info,\r\n AlertTriangle,\r\n User,\r\n Clock,\r\n Download,\r\n RefreshCcw,\r\n ChevronRight,\r\n Terminal,\r\n Database,\r\n ShieldCheck,\r\n Calendar,\r\n ArrowUpRight\r\n} from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\r\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\r\n\r\nexport const ActivityLog = () => {\r\n const { state } = useApp();\r\n const logs = state.activityLogs || [];\r\n const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\r\n const [severityFilter, setSeverityFilter] = useState<'all' | 'info' | 'warning' | 'critical'>('all');\r\n\r\n const filteredLogs = useMemo(() => {\r\n return logs.filter(log => {\r\n const matchesSearch =\r\n log.action.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\r\n log.userName.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\r\n log.details.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\r\n log.entityType.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());\r\n\r\n const matchesSeverity = severityFilter === 'all' || log.severity === severityFilter;\r\n\r\n return matchesSearch && matchesSeverity;\r\n });\r\n }, [logs, searchQuery, severityFilter]);\r\n\r\n const handleExport = () => {\r\n toast.promise(new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 2000)), {\r\n loading: 'Gerando relatório de auditoria...',\r\n success: 'Log exportado com sucesso (AuditLog_2026.csv)',\r\n error: 'Erro ao exportar logs.'\r\n });\r\n };\r\n\r\n const getSeverityIcon = (severity: string) => {\r\n switch (severity) {\r\n case 'critical': return ;\r\n case 'warning': return ;\r\n default: return ;\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const getSeverityBadge = (severity: string) => {\r\n switch (severity) {\r\n case 'critical': return Crítico;\r\n case 'warning': return Aviso;\r\n default: return Info;\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n return (\r\n
\r\n {/* Header */}\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n Security & Compliance\r\n
\r\n

Log de Atividades

\r\n

Rastreabilidade completa de todas as ações executadas na plataforma.

\r\n
\r\n\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n
\r\n\r\n {/* Stats Summary */}\r\n
\r\n {[\r\n { label: 'Eventos Hoje', value: logs.length, icon: Database, color: 'text-primary' },\r\n { label: 'Alertas Críticos', value: logs.filter(l => l.severity === 'critical').length, icon: ShieldAlert, color: 'text-destructive' },\r\n { label: 'Sessões Ativas', value: '12', icon: User, color: 'text-green-500' },\r\n ].map((stat, i) => (\r\n \r\n \r\n {stat.label}\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
{stat.value}
\r\n \r\n \r\n ))}\r\n
\r\n\r\n {/* Toolbar */}\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\r\n />\r\n
\r\n\r\n
\r\n {(['all', 'info', 'warning', 'critical'] as const).map((sev) => (\r\n setSeverityFilter(sev)}\r\n className={cn(\r\n \"rounded-xl px-4 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest\",\r\n severityFilter === sev && \"bg-background shadow-sm\"\r\n )}\r\n >\r\n {sev === 'all' ? 'Todos' : sev}\r\n \r\n ))}\r\n
\r\n
\r\n\r\n
\r\n \r\n Período: Últimas 24 Horas\r\n
\r\n
\r\n\r\n {/* Timeline View */}\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n Linha do Tempo de Auditoria\r\n \r\n {filteredLogs.length} Registros\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n {filteredLogs.length > 0 ? (\r\n
\r\n {filteredLogs.map((log, i) => (\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n {getSeverityIcon(log.severity)}\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n\r\n
\r\n
\r\n {log.userName}\r\n \r\n {log.action}\r\n {getSeverityBadge(log.severity)}\r\n
\r\n\r\n

\r\n {log.details}\r\n {log.entityType && (\r\n \r\n {log.entityType}\r\n \r\n )}\r\n

\r\n\r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n {new Date(log.timestamp).toLocaleString('pt-BR')}\r\n
\r\n {log.ipAddress && (\r\n
\r\n \r\n IP: {log.ipAddress}\r\n
\r\n )}\r\n \r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n ))}\r\n
\r\n ) : (\r\n
\r\n \r\n

Nenhum registro encontrado

\r\n

\r\n Não há atividades que correspondam aos seus filtros atuais no histórico de auditoria.\r\n

\r\n
\r\n )}\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n

\r\n \r\n Auditoria de Segurança em Conformidade com LGPD/GDPR\r\n

\r\n
\r\n \r\n
\r\n );\r\n};\r\n","src/components/Analytics.tsx":"import React, { useMemo } from 'react';\r\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\r\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';\r\nimport {\r\n LineChart,\r\n Line,\r\n XAxis,\r\n YAxis,\r\n CartesianGrid,\r\n Tooltip,\r\n ResponsiveContainer,\r\n BarChart,\r\n Bar,\r\n PieChart,\r\n Pie,\r\n Cell,\r\n AreaChart,\r\n Area\r\n} from 'recharts';\r\nimport {\r\n TrendingUp,\r\n Clock,\r\n Target,\r\n DollarSign,\r\n Zap,\r\n Calendar,\r\n ArrowUpRight,\r\n ArrowDownRight,\r\n BrainCircuit,\r\n Sparkles,\r\n Briefcase\r\n} from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';\r\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\r\n\r\nexport const Analytics = () => {\r\n const { state } = useApp();\r\n\r\n // ── Data Processing: Pomodoro ──────────────────────────────────────────\r\n const pomodoroData = useMemo(() => {\r\n // Mocking last 7 days distribution since real history might be empty\r\n return [\r\n { day: 'Seg', sessions: 4 },\r\n { day: 'Ter', sessions: 6 },\r\n { day: 'Qua', sessions: 5 },\r\n { day: 'Qui', sessions: 8 },\r\n { day: 'Sex', sessions: 7 },\r\n { day: 'Sáb', sessions: 3 },\r\n { day: 'Dom', sessions: 2 },\r\n ];\r\n }, []);\r\n\r\n // ── Data Processing: Finance ───────────────────────────────────────────\r\n const financeData = useMemo(() => {\r\n const transactions = state.financialTransactions || [];\r\n const monthly = transactions.reduce((acc: any, t) => {\r\n const date = new Date(t.date);\r\n const month = date.toLocaleString('pt-BR', { month: 'short' });\r\n if (!acc[month]) acc[month] = { month, receita: 0, despesa: 0 };\r\n if (t.type === 'income') acc[month].receita += t.amount;\r\n else acc[month].despesa += t.amount;\r\n return acc;\r\n }, {});\r\n\r\n const data = Object.values(monthly);\r\n return data.length > 0 ? data : [\r\n { month: 'Jan', receita: 4000, despesa: 2400 },\r\n { month: 'Fev', receita: 3000, despesa: 1398 },\r\n { month: 'Mar', receita: 2000, despesa: 9800 },\r\n { month: 'Abr', receita: 2780, despesa: 3908 },\r\n { month: 'Mai', receita: 1890, despesa: 4800 },\r\n ];\r\n }, [state.financialTransactions]);\r\n\r\n // ── Data Processing: Kanban ────────────────────────────────────────────\r\n const kanbanDistribution = useMemo(() => {\r\n const tasks = state.kanban || [];\r\n const todo = tasks.filter(t => t.column === 'todo').length;\r\n const doing = tasks.filter(t => t.column === 'doing').length;\r\n const done = tasks.filter(t => t.column === 'done').length;\r\n\r\n return [\r\n { name: 'A Fazer', value: todo > 0 ? todo : 10, color: '#94a3b8' },\r\n { name: 'Em Curso', value: doing > 0 ? doing : 5, color: '#3b82f6' },\r\n { name: 'Concluído', value: done > 0 ? done : 15, color: '#22c55e' },\r\n ];\r\n }, [state.kanban]);\r\n\r\n const COLORS = ['#94a3b8', '#3b82f6', '#22c55e'];\r\n\r\n return (\r\n
\r\n {/* Header */}\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n Intelligence Insights\r\n
\r\n

\r\n Relatórios Avançados\r\n

\r\n

\r\n Visão analítica do seu desempenho, progresso e saúde financeira.\r\n

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n Últimos 30 dias\r\n
\r\n
\r\n\r\n {/* Top KPIs */}\r\n
\r\n {[\r\n { label: 'Produtividade', value: '84%', icon: Zap, trend: '+12%', color: 'text-yellow-500' },\r\n { label: 'Tempo de Foco', value: `${state.pomodoroStats.totalMinutes}m`, icon: Clock, trend: '+5h', color: 'text-primary' },\r\n { label: 'Receita Total', value: `R$ ${financeData.reduce((a: any, b: any) => a + b.receita, 0).toLocaleString()}`, icon: DollarSign, trend: '+R$ 1.2k', color: 'text-green-500' },\r\n { label: 'Projetos Ativos', value: state.projects.length, icon: Briefcase, trend: 'Estável', color: 'text-blue-500' },\r\n ].map((kpi, i) => (\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n {kpi.label}\r\n \r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n
{kpi.value}
\r\n
\r\n \r\n {kpi.trend}\r\n vs mês anterior\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n ))}\r\n
\r\n\r\n {/* Main Charts Row */}\r\n
\r\n {/* Revenue vs Expense Chart */}\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n Fluxo de Caixa\r\n \r\n Receitas vs Despesas (Mensal)\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Receita
\r\n
Despesa
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n\r\n {/* Focus Distribution Chart */}\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Distribuição de Foco\r\n \r\n Sessões de Pomodoro na última semana\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n\r\n {/* Bottom Row: Distribution & Progress */}\r\n
\r\n {/* Kanban Status */}\r\n \r\n \r\n Status do Kanban\r\n Volume de tarefas por coluna\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n {kanbanDistribution.map((entry, index) => (\r\n \r\n ))}\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n {kanbanDistribution.reduce((a, b) => a + b.value, 0)}\r\n Total\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n {kanbanDistribution.map((item, i) => (\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n {item.name}\r\n
\r\n {item.value}\r\n
\r\n ))}\r\n \r\n \r\n\r\n {/* Goals & Completion */}\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n Metas & Objetivos\r\n \r\n Acompanhamento de objetivos do Q1\r\n
\r\n \r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n {[\r\n { label: 'Evolução Profissional (Nível 5+)', value: (state.gamificationStats.nivel / 5) * 100, color: 'bg-primary' },\r\n { label: 'Independência Financeira (R$ 50k)', value: 45, color: 'bg-green-500' },\r\n { label: 'Consistência de Foco (100h)', value: (state.pomodoroStats.totalMinutes / 6000) * 100, color: 'bg-blue-500' },\r\n { label: 'Badges Desbloqueados (15 total)', value: (state.gamificationStats.badges.length / 15) * 100, color: 'bg-yellow-500' },\r\n ].map((goal, i) => (\r\n
\r\n
\r\n {goal.label}\r\n {Math.min(100, Math.round(goal.value))}%\r\n
\r\n \r\n
\r\n ))}\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n
\r\n

\r\n \"Você está 15% mais produtivo este mês comparado ao ano passado. Continue com o foco nas sessões de manhã para maximizar seus ganhos.\"\r\n

\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n
\r\n );\r\n};\r\n","src/components/AppSidebar.tsx":"import React from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport {\n Sidebar,\n SidebarContent,\n SidebarGroup,\n SidebarGroupContent,\n SidebarGroupLabel,\n SidebarMenu,\n SidebarMenuButton,\n SidebarMenuItem,\n useSidebar,\n} from '@/components/ui/sidebar';\nimport {\n LayoutDashboard,\n Star,\n FileText,\n Sparkles,\n Code,\n BookOpen,\n Columns,\n Lock,\n User,\n DollarSign,\n Calendar,\n FileEdit,\n Settings,\n Heart,\n ListChecks,\n Music,\n Receipt,\n Calculator,\n LucideIcon,\n Package,\n FileSpreadsheet,\n HelpCircle,\n} from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface MenuItem {\n id: string;\n label: string;\n icon: LucideIcon;\n}\n\nconst menuItems: MenuItem[] = [\n { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', icon: LayoutDashboard },\n { id: 'tutorial', label: 'Tutorial', icon: HelpCircle },\n { id: 'wellness', label: 'Bem-Estar', icon: Heart },\n { id: 'musica', label: 'Biblioteca de Músicas', icon: Music },\n { id: 'favorites', label: 'Favoritos', icon: Star },\n { id: 'notes', label: 'Notas', icon: FileText },\n { id: 'prompts', label: 'Prompts IA', icon: Sparkles },\n { id: 'snippets', label: 'Snippets', icon: Code },\n { id: 'cheatsheet', label: 'Cheatsheet', icon: BookOpen },\n { id: 'kanban', label: 'Kanban', icon: Columns },\n { id: 'checklists', label: 'Listas Pessoais', icon: ListChecks },\n { id: 'passwords', label: 'Senhas', icon: Lock },\n { id: 'contacts', label: 'Contatos', icon: User },\n { id: 'orcamentos', label: 'Orçamentos', icon: Receipt },\n { id: 'precificador', label: 'Precificador', icon: Calculator },\n { id: 'estoque', label: 'Estoque', icon: Package },\n { id: 'fichatecnica', label: 'Ficha Técnica', icon: FileSpreadsheet },\n { id: 'finance', label: 'Financeiro', icon: DollarSign },\n { id: 'diary', label: 'Diário', icon: Calendar },\n { id: 'draft', label: 'Rascunho', icon: FileEdit },\n { id: 'settings', label: 'Config', icon: Settings },\n];\n\nexport function AppSidebar() {\n const { state, currentTab, setCurrentTab } = useApp();\n const { state: sidebarState, isMobile, setOpenMobile } = useSidebar();\n const isCollapsed = sidebarState === 'collapsed';\n\n // Filtrar apenas módulos habilitados\n const enabledMenuItems = menuItems.filter(item => \n state.enabledModules.includes(item.id)\n );\n\n return (\n \n \n \n \n {isCollapsed ? '📋' : 'Central de Comando'}\n \n \n \n {enabledMenuItems.map((item) => {\n const isActive = currentTab === item.id;\n const Icon = item.icon;\n \n return (\n \n {\n setCurrentTab(item.id);\n // Fechar sidebar em mobile após selecionar\n if (isMobile) {\n setOpenMobile(false);\n }\n }}\n isActive={isActive}\n tooltip={isCollapsed ? item.label : undefined}\n >\n \n {item.label}\n \n \n );\n })}\n \n \n \n \n \n );\n}\n","src/components/AssetManager.tsx":"import React, { useState, useMemo } from 'react';\r\nimport { useApp, Asset } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\r\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardFooter } from '@/components/ui/card';\r\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\r\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';\r\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\r\nimport { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';\r\nimport {\r\n File,\r\n Image as ImageIcon,\r\n FileText,\r\n MoreVertical,\r\n Download,\r\n Trash2,\r\n Search,\r\n Upload,\r\n Folder,\r\n Grid,\r\n List,\r\n Clock,\r\n HardDrive,\r\n Shield,\r\n X,\r\n FolderPlus,\r\n Filter,\r\n ArrowUpRight,\r\n ExternalLink,\r\n Files\r\n} from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport {\r\n DropdownMenu,\r\n DropdownMenuContent,\r\n DropdownMenuItem,\r\n DropdownMenuTrigger,\r\n DropdownMenuSeparator\r\n} from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';\r\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\r\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\r\n\r\nexport const AssetManager = () => {\r\n const { state, addAsset, deleteAsset } = useApp();\r\n const assets = state.assets || [];\r\n\r\n const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\r\n const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'grid' | 'list'>('grid');\r\n const [categoryFilter, setCategoryFilter] = useState<'all' | 'image' | 'document' | 'other'>('all');\r\n const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false);\r\n\r\n const filteredAssets = useMemo(() => {\r\n return assets.filter(a => {\r\n const matchesSearch = a.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());\r\n const matchesCategory = categoryFilter === 'all' || a.category === categoryFilter;\r\n return matchesSearch && matchesCategory;\r\n });\r\n }, [assets, searchQuery, categoryFilter]);\r\n\r\n const stats = useMemo(() => {\r\n const totalSize = assets.reduce((acc, a) => acc + a.size, 0);\r\n const images = assets.filter(a => a.category === 'image').length;\r\n const docs = assets.filter(a => a.category === 'document').length;\r\n return { totalSize, images, docs, total: assets.length };\r\n }, [assets]);\r\n\r\n const handleFileUpload = (e: React.ChangeEvent) => {\r\n const file = e.target.files?.[0];\r\n if (!file) return;\r\n\r\n setIsUploading(true);\r\n\r\n // Simular upload \"Premium\"\r\n setTimeout(() => {\r\n const category: 'image' | 'document' | 'other' =\r\n file.type.startsWith('image/') ? 'image' :\r\n file.type.includes('pdf') || file.type.includes('word') || file.type.includes('text') ? 'document' : 'other';\r\n\r\n addAsset({\r\n name: file.name,\r\n type: file.type,\r\n size: file.size,\r\n url: URL.createObjectURL(file), // Local URL\r\n category,\r\n blob: file\r\n });\r\n\r\n setIsUploading(false);\r\n toast.success(`${file.name} adicionado ao repositório!`);\r\n }, 1500);\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleDelete = (id: string, name: string) => {\r\n if (confirm(`Tem certeza que deseja excluir \"${name}\"?`)) {\r\n deleteAsset(id);\r\n toast.info('Arquivo removido permanentemente.');\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const formatSize = (bytes: number) => {\r\n if (bytes === 0) return '0 Bytes';\r\n const k = 1024;\r\n const sizes = ['Bytes', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];\r\n const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));\r\n return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(2)) + ' ' + sizes[i];\r\n };\r\n\r\n return (\r\n
\r\n {/* Header */}\r\n
\r\n
\r\n

\r\n

Total de {stats.total} arquivos

\r\n setCategoryFilter(categoryFilter === 'image' ? 'all' : 'image')}\r\n >\r\n \r\n Imagens ({stats.images})\r\n \r\n setCategoryFilter(categoryFilter === 'document' ? 'all' : 'document')}\r\n >\r\n \r\n Documentos ({stats.docs})\r\n \r\n setCategoryFilter(categoryFilter === 'other' ? 'all' : 'other')}\r\n >\r\n \r\n Diversos ({stats.total - stats.images - stats.docs})\r\n \r\n

\r\n\r\n {/* Toolbar */}\r\n
\r\n

\r\n
\r\n\r\n {/* Assets Display */}\r\n \r\n {filteredAssets.length > 0 ? (\r\n viewMode === 'grid' ? (\r\n

CardHeader, CardTitle, CardFooter } from '@/components/ui/card';\r\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\r\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';\r\nimport {\r\n CheckCircle2,\r\n Zap,\r\n Shield,\r\n HelpCircle,\r\n History,\r\n CreditCard,\r\n Loader2,\r\n Calendar,\r\n DollarSign,\r\n Plus,\r\n ArrowUpRight,\r\n Download,\r\n ExternalLink,\r\n AlertCircle\r\n} from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\r\nimport {\r\n Table,\r\n TableBody,\r\n TableCell,\r\n TableHead,\r\n TableHeader,\r\n TableRow\r\n} from \"@/components/ui/table\";\r\n\r\nconst PLANS = [\r\n {\r\n id: 'free',\r\n name: 'Plano Básico',\r\n price: 'R$ 0/mês',\r\n description: 'Ideal para devs que estão começando.',\r\n features: [\r\n 'Até 5 projetos ativos',\r\n 'Sincronização em 1 dispositivo',\r\n 'Notas e Snippets ilimitados',\r\n ],\r\n buttonText: 'Explorar'\r\n },\r\n {\r\n id: 'pro',\r\n name: 'Plano Pro',\r\n price: 'R$ 29,90/mês',\r\n description: 'Otimize seu workflow com recursos avançados.',\r\n features: [\r\n 'Projetos ilimitados',\r\n 'Sincronização em tempo real',\r\n 'Dashboard analítico',\r\n 'Selo de verificação Pro',\r\n ],\r\n buttonText: 'Assinar Agora'\r\n },\r\n {\r\n id: 'team',\r\n name: 'Plano Business',\r\n price: 'R$ 99,90/mês',\r\n description: 'Perfeito para equipes e agências.',\r\n features: [\r\n 'Tudo do Plano Pro',\r\n 'Gestão de Organizações',\r\n 'Colaboradores ilimitados',\r\n 'Identidade Visual (White-Label)',\r\n ],\r\n buttonText: 'Fale Conosco'\r\n }\r\n];\r\n\r\nconst MOCK_INVOICES = [\r\n { id: 'INV-001', date: '2024-03-01', amount: 'R$ 29,90', status: 'Pago' },\r\n { id: 'INV-002', date: '2024-02-01', amount: 'R$ 29,90', status: 'Pago' },\r\n { id: 'INV-003', date: '2024-01-01', amount: 'R$ 29,90', status: 'Pago' },\r\n];\r\n\r\nexport const Billing = () => {\r\n const { user, updatePlan } = useAuth();\r\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\r\n\r\n const handleUpdatePlan = async (planId: any) => {\r\n if (planId === user?.plan) {\r\n toast.info('Você já está neste plano!');\r\n return;\r\n }\r\n\r\n setIsLoading(true);\r\n try {\r\n // Artificial delay for \"premium\" feel\r\n await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500));\r\n await updatePlan(planId);\r\n toast.success(`Parabéns! Você migrou para o ${planId.toUpperCase()}.`);\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Ocorreu um erro ao processar sua assinatura.');\r\n } finally {\r\n setIsLoading(false);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n return (\r\n
\r\n {/* Header Section */}\r\n
\r\n
\r\n

Faturamento

\r\n

\r\n \r\n Seu Plano Atual\r\n \r\n
\r\n )}\r\n \r\n {plan.name}\r\n

\r\n {plan.description}\r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n {plan.features.map((feature, i) => (\r\n
  • \r\n \r\n {feature}\r\n
    • \r\n ))}\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n handleUpdatePlan(plan.id)}\r\n disabled={isLoading}\r\n >\r\n {isLoading ? (\r\n \r\n ) : (\r\n plan.id === user?.plan ? 'Personalizar' : plan.buttonText\r\n )}\r\n {!isLoading && plan.id !== user?.plan && }\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n ))}\r\n
\r\n\r\n
\r\n {/* Invoice Table */}\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n Histórico de Faturamento\r\n \r\n Visualize e baixe seus recibos anteriores.\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n {MOCK_INVOICES.length > 0 ? (\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n ID\r\n Data\r\n Valor\r\n Status\r\n Ação\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n {MOCK_INVOICES.map((invoice) => (\r\n \r\n {invoice.id}\r\n {new Date(invoice.date).toLocaleDateString('pt-BR')}\r\n {invoice.amount}\r\n \r\n \r\n {invoice.status}\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n ))}\r\n \r\n
\r\n
\r\n ) : (\r\n

\r\n );\r\n};\r\n\r\n","src/components/Budgets.tsx":"import { useState } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Textarea } from './ui/textarea';\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from './ui/dialog';\nimport { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from './ui/select';\nimport { Label } from './ui/label';\nimport { Plus, Trash2, Edit2, Eye, FileText } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\nimport { Badge } from './ui/badge';\nimport { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from './ui/table';\n\ninterface BudgetItemForm {\n id: string;\n description: string;\n quantity: string;\n unitPrice: string;\n}\n\nexport const Budgets = () => {\n const { \n state, \n currentProject,\n addBudget,\n updateBudget,\n deleteBudget,\n } = useApp();\n\n const [isEditorOpen, setIsEditorOpen] = useState(false);\n const [editingBudget, setEditingBudget] = useState(null);\n const [clientId, setClientId] = useState('');\n const [items, setItems] = useState([]);\n const [discount, setDiscount] = useState('0');\n const [terms, setTerms] = useState('');\n const [status, setStatus] = useState<'draft' | 'sent' | 'approved'>('draft');\n const [viewBudgetId, setViewBudgetId] = useState(null);\n\n const projectBudgets = state.budgets.filter(b => b.projectId === currentProject);\n const projectContacts = state.contacts.filter(c => c.projectId === currentProject);\n\n const handleNewBudget = () => {\n setEditingBudget(null);\n setClientId('');\n setItems([]);\n setDiscount('0');\n setTerms('Prazo de pagamento: 30 dias\\nValidade da proposta: 15 dias\\nForma de pagamento: A combinar');\n setStatus('draft');\n setIsEditorOpen(true);\n };\n\n const handleEditBudget = (budgetId: string) => {\n const budget = projectBudgets.find(b => b.id === budgetId);\n if (budget) {\n setEditingBudget(budgetId);\n setClientId(budget.clientId);\n setItems(budget.items.map(item => ({\n id: item.id,\n description: item.description,\n quantity: item.quantity.toString(),\n unitPrice: item.unitPrice.toString(),\n })));\n setDiscount(budget.discount.toString());\n setTerms(budget.terms);\n setStatus(budget.status);\n setIsEditorOpen(true);\n }\n };\n\n const addItem = () => {\n setItems([...items, {\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n description: '',\n quantity: '1',\n unitPrice: '0',\n }]);\n };\n\n const removeItem = (id: string) => {\n setItems(items.filter(item => item.id !== id));\n };\n\n const updateItem = (id: string, field: keyof BudgetItemForm, value: string) => {\n setItems(items.map(item =>\n item.id === id ? { ...item, [field]: value } : item\n ));\n };\n\n const selectCatalogItem = (itemId: string, catalogItemId: string) => {\n const catalogItem = state.serviceCatalog.find(i => i.id === catalogItemId);\n if (catalogItem) {\n const price = catalogItem.useIdealHourlyRate \n ? state.pricingData.idealHourlyRate \n : catalogItem.unitPrice;\n \n setItems(items.map(item =>\n item.id === itemId\n ? { ...item, description: catalogItem.description, unitPrice: price.toString() }\n : item\n ));\n }\n };\n\n const calculateSubtotal = () => {\n return items.reduce((sum, item) => {\n const quantity = parseFloat(item.quantity) || 0;\n const unitPrice = parseFloat(item.unitPrice) || 0;\n return sum + (quantity * unitPrice);\n }, 0);\n };\n\n const calculateTotal = () => {\n const subtotal = calculateSubtotal();\n const discountAmount = parseFloat(discount) || 0;\n return subtotal - discountAmount;\n };\n\n const handleSave = () => {\n if (!clientId) {\n toast.error('Selecione um cliente');\n return;\n }\n\n if (items.length === 0) {\n toast.error('Adicione pelo menos um item');\n return;\n }\n\n const budgetData = {\n projectId: currentProject,\n clientId,\n items: items.map(item => ({\n id: item.id,\n description: item.description,\n quantity: parseFloat(item.quantity) || 0,\n unitPrice: parseFloat(item.unitPrice) || 0,\n total: (parseFloat(item.quantity) || 0) * (parseFloat(item.unitPrice) || 0),\n })),\n subtotal: calculateSubtotal(),\n discount: parseFloat(discount) || 0,\n total: calculateTotal(),\n terms,\n status,\n };\n\n if (editingBudget) {\n updateBudget(editingBudget, budgetData);\n toast.success('Orçamento atualizado');\n } else {\n addBudget(budgetData);\n toast.success('Orçamento criado');\n }\n\n setIsEditorOpen(false);\n };\n\n const handleDelete = (budgetId: string) => {\n if (confirm('Deseja deletar este orçamento?')) {\n deleteBudget(budgetId);\n toast.success('Orçamento deletado');\n }\n };\n\n const getStatusBadge = (status: string) => {\n const variants: Record = {\n draft: 'outline',\n sent: 'secondary',\n approved: 'default',\n };\n const labels = {\n draft: 'Rascunho',\n sent: 'Enviado',\n approved: 'Aprovado',\n };\n return {labels[status as keyof typeof labels]};\n };\n\n const BudgetPreview = ({ budgetId }: { budgetId: string }) => {\n const budget = projectBudgets.find(b => b.id === budgetId);\n const client = projectContacts.find(c => c.id === budget?.clientId);\n\n if (!budget || !client) return null;\n\n return (\n !open && setViewBudgetId(null)}>\n \n
\n
\n {/* Header */}\n
\n
\n

Orçamento

\n

Nº {budget.id}

\n

\n Emitido em: {new Date(budget.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('pt-BR')}\n

\n
\n {state.billingInfo.logoUrl && (\n \n )}\n
\n\n {/* Company and Client Info */}\n
\n
\n

De:

\n

{state.billingInfo.companyName}

\n

{state.billingInfo.address}

\n

{state.billingInfo.taxId}

\n

{state.billingInfo.email}

\n

{state.billingInfo.phone}

\n
\n
\n

Para:

\n

{client.nomeCompleto}

\n {client.empresa &&

{client.empresa}

}\n {client.emails[0] &&

{client.emails[0]}

}\n {client.telefones[0] &&

{client.telefones[0]}

}\n
\n
\n\n {/* Items Table */}\n
\n \n \n \n Descrição\n Quantidade\n Valor Unitário\n Total\n \n \n \n {budget.items.map((item) => (\n \n {item.description}\n {item.quantity}\n R$ {item.unitPrice.toFixed(2)}\n R$ {item.total.toFixed(2)}\n \n ))}\n \n
\n
\n\n {/* Totals */}\n
\n
\n
\n Subtotal:\n R$ {budget.subtotal.toFixed(2)}\n
\n {budget.discount > 0 && (\n
\n Desconto:\n - R$ {budget.discount.toFixed(2)}\n
\n )}\n
\n Total:\n R$ {budget.total.toFixed(2)}\n
\n
\n
\n\n {/* Terms */}\n {budget.terms && (\n
\n

Termos e Condições:

\n

{budget.terms}

\n
\n )}\n
\n
\n\n
\n \n \n
\n \n \n );\n };\n\n return (\n
\n
\n

Gerador de Orçamentos

\n \n \n \n \n \n \n {editingBudget ? 'Editar' : 'Novo'} Orçamento\n \n
\n
\n \n \n
\n\n
\n \n \n
\n\n
\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n {items.map((item, index) => (\n \n \n
\n
\n \n updateItem(item.id, 'description', e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"Ex: Desenvolvimento de website\"\n />\n
\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n
\n
\n \n updateItem(item.id, 'quantity', e.target.value)}\n min=\"0\"\n step=\"0.01\"\n />\n
\n
\n \n updateItem(item.id, 'unitPrice', e.target.value)}\n min=\"0\"\n step=\"0.01\"\n />\n
\n
\n \n
\n \n removeItem(item.id)}\n >\n \n \n
\n
\n
\n \n \n ))}\n
\n
\n\n
\n
\n \n setDiscount(e.target.value)}\n min=\"0\"\n step=\"0.01\"\n />\n
\n
\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n
\n\n
\n \n setTerms(e.target.value)}\n rows={4}\n placeholder=\"Prazo de pagamento, validade, etc.\"\n />\n
\n\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n \n \n
\n\n {projectBudgets.length === 0 ? (\n \n \n \n

Nenhum orçamento criado

\n

\n Crie seu primeiro orçamento para começar\n

\n \n \n \n ) : (\n \n \n Orçamentos\n \n \n \n \n \n Nº\n Cliente\n Data\n Total\n Status\n Ações\n \n \n \n {projectBudgets.map(budget => {\n const client = projectContacts.find(c => c.id === budget.clientId);\n return (\n \n {budget.id}\n {client?.nomeCompleto || 'Cliente não encontrado'}\n {new Date(budget.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('pt-BR')}\n \n R$ {budget.total.toFixed(2)}\n \n {getStatusBadge(budget.status)}\n \n
\n setViewBudgetId(budget.id)}\n >\n \n \n handleEditBudget(budget.id)}\n >\n \n \n handleDelete(budget.id)}\n >\n \n \n
\n \n \n );\n })}\n \n
\n \n \n )}\n\n {/* Preview dialogs */}\n {projectBudgets.map(budget => (\n \n ))}\n
\n );\n};\n","src/components/Cheatsheet.tsx":"import { useState } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Textarea } from './ui/textarea';\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from './ui/dialog';\nimport { Plus, Star, Trash2, Search } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\n\nexport const Cheatsheet = () => {\n const { state, currentProject, addCheatsheetItem, updateCheatsheetItem, deleteCheatsheetItem } = useApp();\n const [isDialogOpen, setIsDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [filterCategory, setFilterCategory] = useState('all');\n const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\n const [form, setForm] = useState({\n title: '',\n content: '',\n category: '',\n });\n\n const projectItems = state.cheatsheet.filter(item => item.projectId === currentProject);\n const categories = ['all', ...new Set(projectItems.map(item => item.category))];\n\n const filteredItems = projectItems.filter(item => {\n const matchesCategory = filterCategory === 'all' || item.category === filterCategory;\n const matchesSearch = item.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||\n item.content.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase());\n return matchesCategory && matchesSearch;\n });\n\n const handleAdd = () => {\n if (!form.title.trim() || !form.content.trim() || !form.category.trim()) {\n toast.error('Todos os campos são obrigatórios');\n return;\n }\n\n addCheatsheetItem({\n projectId: currentProject,\n ...form,\n isFavorite: false,\n });\n\n setForm({ title: '', content: '', category: '' });\n setIsDialogOpen(false);\n toast.success('Item adicionado');\n };\n\n const handleToggleFavorite = (itemId: string) => {\n const item = state.cheatsheet.find(i => i.id === itemId);\n if (item) {\n updateCheatsheetItem(itemId, { isFavorite: !item.isFavorite });\n }\n };\n\n const handleDelete = (itemId: string) => {\n deleteCheatsheetItem(itemId);\n toast.success('Item deletado');\n };\n\n return (\n
\n
\n
\n {categories.map(cat => (\n setFilterCategory(cat)}\n >\n {cat === 'all' ? 'Todos' : cat}\n \n ))}\n
\n\n \n \n \n \n \n \n Novo Item do Cheatsheet\n \n
\n setForm({ ...form, title: e.target.value })}\n />\n setForm({ ...form, category: e.target.value })}\n />\n setForm({ ...form, content: e.target.value })}\n className=\"min-h-[150px]\"\n />\n \n
\n \n \n
\n\n
\n \n setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\n className=\"pl-10\"\n />\n
\n\n
\n {filteredItems.length === 0 ? (\n \n \n

Nenhum item encontrado

\n \n \n ) : (\n filteredItems.map(item => (\n \n \n
\n
\n {item.title}\n

{item.category}

\n
\n
\n \n handleDelete(item.id)}\n className=\"opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity\"\n >\n \n \n
\n
\n \n \n 
\n                  {item.content}\n
\n \n \n ))\n )}\n
\n
\n );\n};\n","src/components/Checklists.tsx":"import { useState } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from './ui/dialog';\nimport { Plus, Trash2, Lock } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { Checkbox } from './ui/checkbox';\nimport CryptoJS from 'crypto-js';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\n\nexport const Checklists = () => {\n const { state, currentProject, addChecklist, updateChecklist, deleteChecklist, addChecklistItem, updateChecklistItem, deleteChecklistItem } = useApp();\n const [isUnlocked, setIsUnlocked] = useState(false);\n const [masterPassword, setMasterPassword] = useState('');\n const [showMasterDialog, setShowMasterDialog] = useState(true);\n const [isDialogOpen, setIsDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [newListTitle, setNewListTitle] = useState('');\n const [newItemTexts, setNewItemTexts] = useState>({});\n const [editingTitles, setEditingTitles] = useState>({});\n\n const projectChecklists = state.checklists.filter(c => c.projectId === currentProject);\n\n const handleUnlock = () => {\n if (!masterPassword) {\n toast.error('Digite a senha mestra');\n return;\n }\n\n setIsUnlocked(true);\n setShowMasterDialog(false);\n toast.success('Checklists desbloqueadas');\n };\n\n const handleAddList = () => {\n if (!newListTitle.trim()) {\n toast.error('Digite um título para a lista');\n return;\n }\n\n addChecklist({\n projectId: currentProject,\n titulo: newListTitle,\n itens: [],\n });\n\n setNewListTitle('');\n setIsDialogOpen(false);\n toast.success('Lista criada');\n };\n\n const handleAddItem = (checklistId: string) => {\n const texto = newItemTexts[checklistId]?.trim();\n if (!texto) {\n toast.error('Digite o texto do item');\n return;\n }\n\n addChecklistItem(checklistId, {\n texto,\n concluido: false,\n });\n\n setNewItemTexts(prev => ({ ...prev, [checklistId]: '' }));\n toast.success('Item adicionado');\n };\n\n const handleToggleItem = (checklistId: string, itemId: string, currentValue: boolean) => {\n updateChecklistItem(checklistId, itemId, { concluido: !currentValue });\n };\n\n const handleUpdateTitle = (checklistId: string) => {\n const newTitle = editingTitles[checklistId]?.trim();\n if (newTitle && newTitle.length > 0) {\n updateChecklist(checklistId, { titulo: newTitle });\n setEditingTitles(prev => {\n const copy = { ...prev };\n delete copy[checklistId];\n return copy;\n });\n toast.success('Título atualizado');\n }\n };\n\n const handleDeleteList = (checklistId: string) => {\n deleteChecklist(checklistId);\n toast.success('Lista removida');\n };\n\n const handleDeleteItem = (checklistId: string, itemId: string) => {\n deleteChecklistItem(checklistId, itemId);\n toast.success('Item removido');\n };\n\n if (!isUnlocked) {\n return (\n \n \n \n \n \n Digite a Senha Mestra\n \n \n
\n

\n Digite sua senha mestra para acessar as Listas Pessoais.\n

\n setMasterPassword(e.target.value)}\n onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleUnlock()}\n />\n \n
\n \n \n );\n }\n\n return (\n
\n
\n

✅ Listas Pessoais

\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n\n \n \n \n Nova Lista\n \n
\n setNewListTitle(e.target.value)}\n onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleAddList()}\n />\n \n
\n \n \n\n
\n {projectChecklists.length === 0 ? (\n \n \n

Nenhuma lista criada

\n \n \n ) : (\n projectChecklists.map(checklist => (\n \n \n
\n {editingTitles[checklist.id] !== undefined ? (\n setEditingTitles(prev => ({ ...prev, [checklist.id]: e.target.value }))}\n onBlur={() => handleUpdateTitle(checklist.id)}\n onKeyDown={(e) => {\n if (e.key === 'Enter') handleUpdateTitle(checklist.id);\n if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingTitles(prev => {\n const copy = { ...prev };\n delete copy[checklist.id];\n return copy;\n });\n }}\n className=\"text-lg font-semibold\"\n autoFocus\n />\n ) : (\n setEditingTitles(prev => ({ ...prev, [checklist.id]: checklist.titulo }))}\n >\n {checklist.titulo}\n \n )}\n \n
\n \n \n
\n {checklist.itens.length === 0 ? (\n

\n Nenhum item ainda\n

\n ) : (\n checklist.itens.map(item => (\n
\n handleToggleItem(checklist.id, item.id, item.concluido)}\n className=\"mt-1\"\n />\n \n {item.texto}\n \n handleDeleteItem(checklist.id, item.id)}\n className=\"opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity\"\n >\n \n \n
\n ))\n )}\n
\n\n
\n setNewItemTexts(prev => ({ ...prev, [checklist.id]: e.target.value }))}\n onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleAddItem(checklist.id)}\n className=\"text-sm\"\n />\n handleAddItem(checklist.id)}\n >\n \n \n
\n \n \n ))\n )}\n
\n
\n );\n};\n","src/components/CommandPalette.tsx":"import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent } from './ui/dialog';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Command, FileText, Sparkles, Code, BookOpen, Columns, Lock, Calendar, FileEdit, Settings, LayoutDashboard, Star } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\n\nconst commands = [\n { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Ir para Dashboard', icon: LayoutDashboard, action: 'navigate' },\n { id: 'favorites', label: 'Ir para Favoritos', icon: Star, action: 'navigate' },\n { id: 'notes', label: 'Ir para Notas', icon: FileText, action: 'navigate' },\n { id: 'prompts', label: 'Ir para Prompts', icon: Sparkles, action: 'navigate' },\n { id: 'snippets', label: 'Ir para Snippets', icon: Code, action: 'navigate' },\n { id: 'cheatsheet', label: 'Ir para Cheatsheet', icon: BookOpen, action: 'navigate' },\n { id: 'kanban', label: 'Ir para Kanban', icon: Columns, action: 'navigate' },\n { id: 'passwords', label: 'Ir para Senhas', icon: Lock, action: 'navigate' },\n { id: 'diary', label: 'Ir para Diário', icon: Calendar, action: 'navigate' },\n { id: 'draft', label: 'Ir para Rascunho', icon: FileEdit, action: 'navigate' },\n { id: 'settings', label: 'Ir para Configurações', icon: Settings, action: 'navigate' },\n { id: 'theme', label: 'Alternar Tema', icon: Command, action: 'toggleTheme' },\n];\n\nexport const CommandPalette = () => {\n const { setCurrentTab, toggleTheme, isCommandPaletteOpen, setIsCommandPaletteOpen } = useApp();\n const [search, setSearch] = useState('');\n const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState(0);\n\n const filteredCommands = commands.filter(cmd =>\n cmd.label.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())\n );\n\n useEffect(() => {\n const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {\n if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === 'k') {\n e.preventDefault();\n setIsCommandPaletteOpen(true);\n }\n\n if (!isCommandPaletteOpen) return;\n\n if (e.key === 'Escape') {\n setIsCommandPaletteOpen(false);\n setSearch('');\n } else if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {\n e.preventDefault();\n setSelectedIndex(i => (i + 1) % filteredCommands.length);\n } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {\n e.preventDefault();\n setSelectedIndex(i => (i - 1 + filteredCommands.length) % filteredCommands.length);\n } else if (e.key === 'Enter') {\n e.preventDefault();\n handleSelect(filteredCommands[selectedIndex]);\n }\n };\n\n window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);\n return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);\n }, [isCommandPaletteOpen, filteredCommands, selectedIndex, setIsCommandPaletteOpen]);\n\n const handleSelect = (cmd: typeof commands[0]) => {\n if (cmd.action === 'navigate') {\n setCurrentTab(cmd.id);\n } else if (cmd.action === 'toggleTheme') {\n toggleTheme();\n }\n setIsCommandPaletteOpen(false);\n setSearch('');\n setSelectedIndex(0);\n };\n\n return (\n \n \n
\n \n {\n setSearch(e.target.value);\n setSelectedIndex(0);\n }}\n className=\"border-0 focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:ring-offset-0 bg-transparent h-12\"\n />\n \n ESC\n \n
\n
\n {filteredCommands.length === 0 ? (\n
\n Nenhum comando encontrado.\n
\n ) : (\n
\n {filteredCommands.map((cmd, index) => {\n const Icon = cmd.icon;\n return (\n handleSelect(cmd)}\n className={cn(\n \"w-full flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-sm transition-all duration-200\",\n index === selectedIndex\n ? \"bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 scale-[1.02]\"\n : \"hover:bg-primary/10 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground\"\n )}\n >\n
\n \n {cmd.label}\n
\n {index === selectedIndex && (\n ENTER\n )}\n \n );\n })}\n
\n )}\n
\n
\n
\n Use ↑↓ para navegar\n
\n
\n Enter para selecionar\n
\n
\n \n \n );\n};\n","src/components/Contacts.tsx":"import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\nimport { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';\nimport { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';\nimport { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';\nimport { Plus, X, Mail, Phone, Building2, Briefcase, User, Search } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\n\nexport const Contacts = () => {\n const { state, currentProject, addContact, updateContact, deleteContact } = useApp();\n const [selectedContactId, setSelectedContactId] = useState(null);\n const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);\n const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n const [selectedTagFilter, setSelectedTagFilter] = useState(null);\n \n const [formData, setFormData] = useState({\n nomeCompleto: '',\n telefones: [''],\n emails: [''],\n empresa: '',\n cargo: '',\n tags: [] as string[],\n notas: '',\n });\n\n const projectContacts = useMemo(() => {\n return (state.contacts || []).filter(c => c.projectId === currentProject);\n }, [state.contacts, currentProject]);\n\n const filteredContacts = useMemo(() => {\n return projectContacts.filter(contact => {\n const matchesSearch = contact.nomeCompleto.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\n contact.empresa.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());\n const matchesTag = !selectedTagFilter || contact.tags.includes(selectedTagFilter);\n return matchesSearch && matchesTag;\n });\n }, [projectContacts, searchQuery, selectedTagFilter]);\n\n const allTags = useMemo(() => {\n const tags = new Set();\n projectContacts.forEach(contact => {\n contact.tags.forEach(tag => tags.add(tag));\n });\n return Array.from(tags);\n }, [projectContacts]);\n\n const selectedContact = selectedContactId \n ? projectContacts.find(c => c.id === selectedContactId) \n : null;\n\n const handleNewContact = () => {\n setIsCreating(true);\n setSelectedContactId(null);\n setFormData({\n nomeCompleto: '',\n telefones: [''],\n emails: [''],\n empresa: '',\n cargo: '',\n tags: [],\n notas: '',\n });\n };\n\n const handleSelectContact = (id: string) => {\n const contact = projectContacts.find(c => c.id === id);\n if (!contact) return;\n \n setSelectedContactId(id);\n setIsCreating(false);\n setFormData({\n nomeCompleto: contact.nomeCompleto,\n telefones: contact.telefones.length > 0 ? contact.telefones : [''],\n emails: contact.emails.length > 0 ? contact.emails : [''],\n empresa: contact.empresa,\n cargo: contact.cargo,\n tags: contact.tags,\n notas: contact.notas,\n });\n };\n\n const handleSave = () => {\n if (!formData.nomeCompleto.trim()) {\n toast.error('Nome completo é obrigatório');\n return;\n }\n\n const cleanedData = {\n ...formData,\n telefones: formData.telefones.filter(t => t.trim() !== ''),\n emails: formData.emails.filter(e => e.trim() !== ''),\n };\n\n if (isCreating) {\n addContact({\n ...cleanedData,\n projectId: currentProject,\n });\n toast.success('Contato adicionado');\n setIsCreating(false);\n } else if (selectedContactId) {\n updateContact(selectedContactId, cleanedData);\n toast.success('Contato atualizado');\n }\n };\n\n const handleDelete = () => {\n if (!selectedContactId) return;\n if (confirm('Deseja realmente remover este contato?')) {\n deleteContact(selectedContactId);\n setSelectedContactId(null);\n setIsCreating(false);\n toast.success('Contato removido');\n }\n };\n\n const addField = (field: 'telefones' | 'emails') => {\n setFormData(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n [field]: [...prev[field], ''],\n }));\n };\n\n const removeField = (field: 'telefones' | 'emails', index: number) => {\n setFormData(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n [field]: prev[field].filter((_, i) => i !== index),\n }));\n };\n\n const updateField = (field: 'telefones' | 'emails', index: number, value: string) => {\n setFormData(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n [field]: prev[field].map((item, i) => i === index ? value : item),\n }));\n };\n\n const addTag = (tag: string) => {\n if (tag && !formData.tags.includes(tag)) {\n setFormData(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n tags: [...prev.tags, tag],\n }));\n }\n };\n\n const removeTag = (tag: string) => {\n setFormData(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n tags: prev.tags.filter(t => t !== tag),\n }));\n };\n\n return (\n
\n {/* Coluna Esquerda - Lista */}\n
\n \n \n \n \n Contatos\n \n \n \n
\n \n setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n className=\"pl-9\"\n />\n
\n\n {allTags.length > 0 && (\n
\n {allTags.map(tag => (\n setSelectedTagFilter(selectedTagFilter === tag ? null : tag)}\n >\n {tag}\n \n ))}\n
\n )}\n\n \n\n \n
\n {filteredContacts.map(contact => (\n handleSelectContact(contact.id)}\n >\n \n
{contact.nomeCompleto}
\n {contact.empresa && (\n
{contact.empresa}
\n )}\n {contact.tags.length > 0 && (\n
\n {contact.tags.map(tag => (\n \n {tag}\n \n ))}\n
\n )}\n \n \n ))}\n
\n \n \n \n
\n\n {/* Coluna Direita - Detalhes */}\n
\n \n \n \n {isCreating ? 'Novo Contato' : selectedContact ? 'Detalhes do Contato' : 'Selecione um contato'}\n \n \n \n {(isCreating || selectedContact) ? (\n \n
\n
\n \n setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, nomeCompleto: e.target.value }))}\n placeholder=\"Nome completo\"\n />\n
\n\n
\n
\n \n addField('telefones')}\n >\n \n \n
\n {formData.telefones.map((tel, idx) => (\n
\n updateField('telefones', idx, e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"Telefone\"\n />\n {formData.telefones.length > 1 && (\n removeField('telefones', idx)}\n >\n \n \n )}\n
\n ))}\n
\n\n
\n
\n \n addField('emails')}\n >\n \n \n
\n {formData.emails.map((email, idx) => (\n
\n updateField('emails', idx, e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"E-mail\"\n />\n {formData.emails.length > 1 && (\n removeField('emails', idx)}\n >\n \n \n )}\n
\n ))}\n
\n\n
\n \n setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, empresa: e.target.value }))}\n placeholder=\"Nome da empresa\"\n />\n
\n\n
\n \n setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, cargo: e.target.value }))}\n placeholder=\"Cargo ou função\"\n />\n
\n\n
\n \n
\n {formData.tags.map(tag => (\n \n {tag}\n removeTag(tag)}\n />\n \n ))}\n
\n
\n {\n if (e.key === 'Enter') {\n e.preventDefault();\n addTag(e.currentTarget.value);\n e.currentTarget.value = '';\n }\n }}\n />\n
\n
\n {(state.contactTags || []).map(tag => (\n !formData.tags.includes(tag) && (\n addTag(tag)}\n >\n + {tag}\n \n )\n ))}\n
\n
\n\n
\n \n setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, notas: e.target.value }))}\n placeholder=\"Informações adicionais...\"\n rows={4}\n />\n
\n\n
\n \n {!isCreating && (\n \n )}\n
\n
\n \n ) : (\n
\n Selecione um contato ou adicione um novo\n
\n )}\n \n \n
\n
\n );\n};\n","src/components/DailyVerse.tsx":"import { BookOpen } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { useMemo } from 'react';\n\nconst VERSES = [\n { text: \"Porque Deus amou o mundo de tal maneira que deu o seu Filho unigênito, para que todo aquele que nele crê não pereça, mas tenha a vida eterna.\", ref: \"João 3:16\" },\n { text: \"O Senhor é o meu pastor; nada me faltará.\", ref: \"Salmos 23:1\" },\n { text: \"Tudo posso naquele que me fortalece.\", ref: \"Filipenses 4:13\" },\n { text: \"Confia no Senhor de todo o teu coração e não te estribes no teu próprio entendimento.\", ref: \"Provérbios 3:5\" },\n { text: \"Porque eu bem sei os pensamentos que tenho a vosso respeito, diz o Senhor; pensamentos de paz e não de mal, para vos dar o fim que esperais.\", ref: \"Jeremias 29:11\" },\n { text: \"Mas os que esperam no Senhor renovarão as suas forças; subirão com asas como águias; correrão e não se cansarão; caminharão e não se fatigarão.\", ref: \"Isaías 40:31\" },\n { text: \"Não temas, porque eu sou contigo; não te assombres, porque eu sou o teu Deus; eu te fortaleço, e te ajudo, e te sustento com a destra da minha justiça.\", ref: \"Isaías 41:10\" },\n { text: \"E conhecereis a verdade, e a verdade vos libertará.\", ref: \"João 8:32\" },\n { text: \"Deleita-te também no Senhor, e ele te concederá o que deseja o teu coração.\", ref: \"Salmos 37:4\" },\n { text: \"Eu sou o caminho, a verdade e a vida. Ninguém vem ao Pai senão por mim.\", ref: \"João 14:6\" },\n { text: \"Lança o teu cuidado sobre o Senhor, e ele te susterá; não permitirá jamais que o justo seja abalado.\", ref: \"Salmos 55:22\" },\n { text: \"O Senhor é a minha luz e a minha salvação; a quem temerei?\", ref: \"Salmos 27:1\" },\n { text: \"Alegrai-vos sempre no Senhor; outra vez digo: alegrai-vos.\", ref: \"Filipenses 4:4\" },\n { text: \"Bem-aventurados os pacificadores, porque eles serão chamados filhos de Deus.\", ref: \"Mateus 5:9\" },\n { text: \"Porque para Deus nada é impossível.\", ref: \"Lucas 1:37\" },\n { text: \"Sede fortes e corajosos. Não temais, nem vos espanteis diante deles, porque o Senhor, vosso Deus, é quem vai convosco; não vos deixará, nem vos desamparará.\", ref: \"Deuteronômio 31:6\" },\n { text: \"Vinde a mim, todos os que estais cansados e oprimidos, e eu vos aliviarei.\", ref: \"Mateus 11:28\" },\n { text: \"A minha graça te basta, porque o meu poder se aperfeiçoa na fraqueza.\", ref: \"2 Coríntios 12:9\" },\n { text: \"O amor é paciente, o amor é bondoso. Não inveja, não se vangloria, não se orgulha.\", ref: \"1 Coríntios 13:4\" },\n { text: \"Entrega o teu caminho ao Senhor; confia nele, e ele tudo fará.\", ref: \"Salmos 37:5\" },\n { text: \"Porque onde estiver o vosso tesouro, aí estará também o vosso coração.\", ref: \"Mateus 6:21\" },\n { text: \"Em tudo dai graças, porque esta é a vontade de Deus em Cristo Jesus para convosco.\", ref: \"1 Tessalonicenses 5:18\" },\n { text: \"Esforçai-vos, e ele fortalecerá o vosso coração, vós todos que esperais no Senhor.\", ref: \"Salmos 31:24\" },\n { text: \"Buscai primeiro o Reino de Deus e a sua justiça, e todas essas coisas vos serão acrescentadas.\", ref: \"Mateus 6:33\" },\n { text: \"O Senhor te abençoe e te guarde; o Senhor faça resplandecer o seu rosto sobre ti e tenha misericórdia de ti.\", ref: \"Números 6:24-25\" },\n { text: \"Pois será como a árvore plantada junto a ribeiros de águas, a qual dá o seu fruto na estação própria.\", ref: \"Salmos 1:3\" },\n { text: \"Combati o bom combate, acabei a carreira, guardei a fé.\", ref: \"2 Timóteo 4:7\" },\n { text: \"Ainda que eu andasse pelo vale da sombra da morte, não temeria mal algum, porque tu estás comigo.\", ref: \"Salmos 23:4\" },\n { text: \"E a paz de Deus, que excede todo o entendimento, guardará os vossos corações e os vossos sentimentos em Cristo Jesus.\", ref: \"Filipenses 4:7\" },\n { text: \"Cria em mim, ó Deus, um coração puro e renova em mim um espírito reto.\", ref: \"Salmos 51:10\" },\n { text: \"Ora, a fé é o firme fundamento das coisas que se esperam e a prova das coisas que se não veem.\", ref: \"Hebreus 11:1\" },\n];\n\nexport const DailyVerse = () => {\n const verse = useMemo(() => {\n const today = new Date();\n const dayOfYear = Math.floor(\n (today.getTime() - new Date(today.getFullYear(), 0, 0).getTime()) / 86400000\n );\n return VERSES[dayOfYear % VERSES.length];\n }, []);\n\n return (\n
\n \n \n \"{verse.text}\"\n — {verse.ref}\n \n
\n );\n};\n","src/components/Dashboard.tsx":"import { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { CheckCircle2, FileText, Code, Timer, TrendingUp, Frown, Meh, Smile, SmilePlus, Laugh } from 'lucide-react';\nimport React, { memo, lazy, Suspense, useMemo } from 'react';\n\n// Lazy load Chart.js components (heavy library)\nconst DashboardChart = lazy(() => import('./DashboardChart'));\n\n// Loading fallback for chart\nconst ChartLoading = () => (\n
\n
\n
\n);\n\nexport const Dashboard = memo(() => {\n const { state, currentProject } = useApp();\n\n // Memoize expensive calculations\n const { last7Days, last7DaysLabels } = useMemo(() => {\n const days = Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, i) => {\n const date = new Date();\n date.setDate(date.getDate() - (6 - i));\n return date.toISOString().split('T')[0];\n });\n\n const labels = days.map(date => {\n const d = new Date(date);\n return d.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR', { weekday: 'short', day: '2-digit' });\n });\n\n return { last7Days: days, last7DaysLabels: labels };\n }, []);\n\n const inProgressTasks = useMemo(() =>\n state.kanban.filter(\n task => task.projectId === currentProject && task.column === 'inProgress'\n ), [state.kanban, currentProject]);\n\n const recentNotes = useMemo(() =>\n state.notes\n .filter(note => note.projectId === currentProject)\n .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.updatedAt).getTime() - new Date(a.updatedAt).getTime())\n .slice(0, 3), [state.notes, currentProject]);\n\n // Memoize wellness calculations\n const wellnessData = useMemo(() => {\n const last7DaysBreaks = state.wellnessStats.breaks.filter(b => {\n const breakDate = new Date(b.dataHora).toISOString().split('T')[0];\n return last7Days.includes(breakDate);\n });\n\n const last7DaysDiary = state.diary.filter(entry => {\n return entry.projetoId === currentProject && last7Days.includes(entry.date);\n });\n\n const totalBreaks = last7DaysBreaks.length;\n const completedBreaks = last7DaysBreaks.filter(b => b.adesaoStatus === 'Concluida').length;\n const adherenceRate = totalBreaks > 0 ? Math.round((completedBreaks / totalBreaks) * 100) : 0;\n\n const moodScores = last7DaysDiary.map(e => e.moodScore).filter(m => m !== null && m !== undefined) as number[];\n const avgMoodNum = moodScores.length > 0\n ? moodScores.reduce((acc, val) => acc + val, 0) / moodScores.length\n : null;\n const avgMood = avgMoodNum ? avgMoodNum.toFixed(1) : null;\n\n const MoodIcon = avgMoodNum\n ? avgMoodNum >= 4.5 ? Laugh : avgMoodNum >= 3.5 ? SmilePlus : avgMoodNum >= 2.5 ? Smile : avgMoodNum >= 1.5 ? Meh : Frown\n : null;\n\n const dailyFocusCycles = last7Days.map(date => {\n const dayBreaks = last7DaysBreaks.filter(b => {\n const breakDate = new Date(b.dataHora).toISOString().split('T')[0];\n return breakDate === date;\n });\n return dayBreaks.length;\n });\n\n const dailyMoodAvg = last7Days.map(date => {\n const dayEntries = last7DaysDiary.filter(e => e.date === date);\n const dayMoods = dayEntries.map(e => e.moodScore).filter(m => m !== null && m !== undefined) as number[];\n return dayMoods.length > 0 ? dayMoods.reduce((acc, val) => acc + val, 0) / dayMoods.length : null;\n });\n\n const hasData = moodScores.length > 0 || totalBreaks > 0;\n\n return {\n adherenceRate,\n avgMood,\n MoodIcon,\n dailyFocusCycles,\n dailyMoodAvg,\n hasData,\n };\n }, [state.wellnessStats.breaks, state.diary, last7Days, currentProject]);\n\n const notesCount = useMemo(() =>\n state.notes.filter(n => n.projectId === currentProject).length,\n [state.notes, currentProject]);\n\n const snippetsCount = useMemo(() =>\n state.snippets.filter(s => s.projectId === currentProject).length,\n [state.snippets, currentProject]);\n\n return (\n
\n
\n \n \n Tarefas em Progresso\n \n \n \n
{inProgressTasks.length}
\n \n \n\n \n \n Total de Notas\n \n \n \n
{notesCount}
\n \n \n\n \n \n Snippets\n \n \n \n
{snippetsCount}
\n \n \n\n \n \n Sessões Pomodoro\n \n \n \n
{state.pomodoroStats.focusSessions}
\n

{state.pomodoroStats.totalMinutes} minutos

\n \n \n
\n\n \n \n Bem-Estar & Foco (TCC)\n \n \n \n

Métricas dos últimos 7 dias

\n\n {!wellnessData.hasData ? (\n
\n

\n Sem dados suficientes para análise na última semana.\n

\n
\n ) : (\n <>\n
\n
\n

Taxa de Adesão

\n
\n {wellnessData.adherenceRate}%\n
\n
\n
\n

Média de Humor

\n
\n {wellnessData.avgMood ? (\n <>\n {wellnessData.avgMood}\n {wellnessData.MoodIcon && (\n \n )}\n \n ) : (\n 'N/A'\n )}\n
\n
\n
\n

Ciclos Concluídos

\n
\n {state.pomodoroStats.focusSessions}\n
\n
\n
\n\n
\n

Correlação Produtividade x Bem-Estar

\n }>\n \n \n
\n \n )}\n \n \n\n
\n \n \n Tarefas em Andamento\n \n \n {inProgressTasks.length === 0 ? (\n

Nenhuma tarefa em andamento

\n ) : (\n
\n {inProgressTasks.map(task => (\n
\n
\n
\n

{task.title}

\n {task.description && (\n

{task.description}

\n )}\n
\n
\n ))}\n
\n )}\n \n \n\n \n \n Notas Recentes\n \n \n {recentNotes.length === 0 ? (\n

Nenhuma nota criada

\n ) : (\n
\n {recentNotes.map(note => (\n
\n

{note.title}

\n

\n {new Date(note.updatedAt).toLocaleDateString()}\n

\n

\n\n \n \n Rascunho\n \n \n {state.draft ? (\n
\n

{state.draft}

\n
\n ) : (\n

Nenhum rascunho salvo

\n )}\n \n \n
\n );\n});\n\nDashboard.displayName = 'Dashboard';\n","src/components/DashboardChart.tsx":"import { memo } from 'react';\nimport { Line } from 'react-chartjs-2';\nimport {\n Chart as ChartJS,\n CategoryScale,\n LinearScale,\n PointElement,\n LineElement,\n Title,\n Tooltip,\n Legend,\n} from 'chart.js';\n\nChartJS.register(\n CategoryScale,\n LinearScale,\n PointElement,\n LineElement,\n Title,\n Tooltip,\n Legend\n);\n\ninterface ChartComponentProps {\n labels: string[];\n focusCycles: number[];\n moodAvg: (number | null)[];\n}\n\nconst DashboardChart = memo(({ labels, focusCycles, moodAvg }: ChartComponentProps) => {\n const chartData = {\n labels,\n datasets: [\n {\n label: 'Ciclos de Foco',\n data: focusCycles,\n borderColor: 'rgb(59, 130, 246)',\n backgroundColor: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)',\n yAxisID: 'y',\n tension: 0.3,\n },\n {\n label: 'Humor Médio',\n data: moodAvg,\n borderColor: 'rgb(34, 197, 94)',\n backgroundColor: 'rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.1)',\n yAxisID: 'y1',\n tension: 0.3,\n },\n ],\n };\n\n const chartOptions = {\n responsive: true,\n maintainAspectRatio: false,\n interaction: {\n mode: 'index' as const,\n intersect: false,\n },\n plugins: {\n legend: {\n position: 'top' as const,\n },\n },\n scales: {\n y: {\n type: 'linear' as const,\n display: true,\n position: 'left' as const,\n title: {\n display: true,\n text: 'Ciclos de Foco',\n },\n beginAtZero: true,\n },\n y1: {\n type: 'linear' as const,\n display: true,\n position: 'right' as const,\n title: {\n display: true,\n text: 'Humor (1-5)',\n },\n min: 1,\n max: 5,\n grid: {\n drawOnChartArea: false,\n },\n },\n },\n };\n\n return (\n
\n \n
\n );\n});\n\nDashboardChart.displayName = 'DashboardChart';\n\nexport default DashboardChart;\n","src/components/Diary.tsx":"import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Textarea } from './ui/textarea';\nimport { Calendar } from './ui/calendar';\nimport { Save, Frown, Meh, Smile, SmilePlus, Laugh } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\n\nconst moodOptions = [\n { value: 1, icon: Frown, label: 'Muito Estressado/Ruim', color: 'text-red-500' },\n { value: 2, icon: Meh, label: 'Neutro/Normal', color: 'text-yellow-500' },\n { value: 3, icon: Smile, label: 'OK/Levemente Positivo', color: 'text-green-400' },\n { value: 4, icon: SmilePlus, label: 'Bom/Focado', color: 'text-green-500' },\n { value: 5, icon: Laugh, label: 'Excelente/Motivado', color: 'text-primary' },\n];\n\nexport const Diary = () => {\n const { state, updateDiaryEntry, currentProject } = useApp();\n const [selectedDate, setSelectedDate] = useState(new Date());\n const [content, setContent] = useState('');\n const [moodScore, setMoodScore] = useState(null);\n\n const dateString = selectedDate.toISOString().split('T')[0];\n\n // Filtrar entradas pelo projeto atual\n const projectEntries = state.diary.filter(e => e.projetoId === currentProject);\n const entry = projectEntries.find(e => e.date === dateString);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n setContent(entry?.content || '');\n setMoodScore(entry?.moodScore ?? null);\n }, [entry]);\n\n const handleSave = () => {\n updateDiaryEntry(dateString, content, moodScore, currentProject);\n toast.success('Entrada salva');\n };\n\n const datesWithEntries = projectEntries.map(e => new Date(e.date));\n\n return (\n
\n \n \n Calendário\n \n \n date && setSelectedDate(date)}\n className=\"rounded-md border\"\n modifiers={{\n hasEntry: datesWithEntries,\n }}\n modifiersClassNames={{\n hasEntry: 'bg-primary/20 font-bold',\n }}\n />\n
\n

\n Total de entradas: {projectEntries.length}\n

\n
\n
\n Dia com entrada\n
\n
\n \n \n\n \n \n
\n \n {selectedDate.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR', {\n weekday: 'long',\n year: 'numeric',\n month: 'long',\n day: 'numeric',\n })}\n \n \n
\n \n \n
\n \n
\n {moodOptions.map((option) => (\n setMoodScore(option.value)}\n className={`flex flex-col items-center gap-2 p-3 rounded-lg transition-all hover:scale-110 ${moodScore === option.value\n ? 'bg-primary/20 ring-2 ring-primary scale-110'\n : 'hover:bg-muted/50'\n }`}\n title={option.label}\n >\n \n {option.value}\n \n ))}\n
\n {moodScore && (\n

\n {moodOptions.find(o => o.value === moodScore)?.label}\n

\n )}\n
\n\n setContent(e.target.value)}\n className=\"min-h-[400px] resize-none\"\n />\n \n \n
\n );\n};\n","src/components/Draft.tsx":"import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Textarea } from './ui/textarea';\nimport { Save, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\n\nexport const Draft = () => {\n const { state, updateDraft } = useApp();\n const [content, setContent] = useState(state.draft);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n const timer = setTimeout(() => {\n updateDraft(content);\n }, 1000);\n\n return () => clearTimeout(timer);\n }, [content]);\n\n const handleClear = () => {\n setContent('');\n updateDraft('');\n toast.success('Rascunho limpo');\n };\n\n const wordCount = content.trim().split(/\\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;\n const charCount = content.length;\n\n return (\n \n \n
\n Rascunho Rápido\n \n

\n {wordCount} palavras\n {charCount} caracteres\n \n \n Auto-salvo\n \n

'@/components/ui/button';\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\nimport { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';\nimport {\n DropdownMenu,\n DropdownMenuContent,\n DropdownMenuItem,\n DropdownMenuTrigger,\n DropdownMenuSeparator,\n DropdownMenuLabel,\n} from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';\nimport {\n LayoutDashboard,\n Star,\n FileText,\n Sparkles,\n Code,\n BookOpen,\n Columns,\n Lock,\n User,\n UserCircle,\n CreditCard,\n DollarSign,\n Calendar,\n FileEdit,\n Settings,\n Heart,\n ListChecks,\n Music,\n Receipt,\n Calculator,\n LucideIcon,\n Package,\n FileSpreadsheet,\n HelpCircle,\n Menu,\n Search,\n X,\n ChevronRight,\n LayoutGrid,\n MonitorPlay,\n Cloud,\n CloudOff,\n LogOut,\n RefreshCw,\n Sun,\n Moon,\n Shield,\n Building,\n Users,\n Plug,\n Workflow,\n BarChart3,\n Book,\n HardDrive,\n History\n} from 'lucide-react';\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\nimport { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';\nimport { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport { db } from '@/services/db';\nimport { PomodoroTimer } from './PomodoroTimer';\nimport { NotificationHub } from './NotificationHub';\n\ninterface MenuItem {\n id: string;\n label: string;\n icon: LucideIcon;\n category: 'main' | 'productivity' | 'business' | 'personal' | 'system';\n}\n\nconst menuItems: MenuItem[] = [\n { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', icon: LayoutDashboard, category: 'main' },\n { id: 'explorer', label: 'Project Explorer', icon: LayoutGrid, category: 'main' },\n { id: 'tutorial', label: 'Tutorial', icon: HelpCircle, category: 'system' },\n { id: 'wellness', label: 'Bem-Estar', icon: Heart, category: 'personal' },\n { id: 'musica', label: 'Músicas', icon: Music, category: 'personal' },\n { id: 'videos', label: 'Vídeos', icon: MonitorPlay, category: 'personal' },\n { id: 'favorites', label: 'Favoritos', icon: Star, category: 'main' },\n { id: 'notes', label: 'Notas', icon: FileText, category: 'productivity' },\n { id: 'prompts', label: 'Prompts IA', icon: Sparkles, category: 'productivity' },\n { id: 'snippets', label: 'Snippets', icon: Code, category: 'productivity' },\n { id: 'cheatsheet', label: 'Cheatsheet', icon: BookOpen, category: 'productivity' },\n { id: 'kanban', label: 'Kanban', icon: Columns, category: 'productivity' },\n { id: 'checklists', label: 'Listas', icon: ListChecks, category: 'personal' },\n { id: 'passwords', label: 'Senhas', icon: Lock, category: 'personal' },\n { id: 'contacts', label: 'Contatos', icon: User, category: 'personal' },\n { id: 'orcamentos', label: 'Orçamentos', icon: Receipt, category: 'business' },\n { id: 'precificador', label: 'Precificador', icon: Calculator, category: 'business' },\n { id: 'estoque', label: 'Estoque', icon: Package, category: 'business' },\n { id: 'fichatecnica', label: 'Ficha Técnica', icon: FileSpreadsheet, category: 'business' },\n { id: 'finance', label: 'Financeiro', icon: DollarSign, category: 'business' },\n { id: 'diary', label: 'Diário', icon: Calendar, category: 'personal' },\n { id: 'draft', label: 'Rascunho', icon: FileEdit, category: 'productivity' },\n { id: 'integrations', label: 'Integrações', icon: Plug, category: 'system' },\n { id: 'analytics', label: 'Analytics', icon: BarChart3, category: 'main' },\n { id: 'wiki', label: 'Company Wiki', icon: Book, category: 'business' },\n { id: 'assets', label: 'Assets', icon: HardDrive, category: 'business' },\n { id: 'activity', label: 'Atividade', icon: History, category: 'system' },\n { id: 'settings', label: 'Config', icon: Settings, category: 'system' },\n];\n\nconst categoryLabels: Record = {\n main: 'Principal',\n productivity: 'Produtividade',\n business: 'Negócios',\n personal: 'Pessoal',\n system: 'Sistema',\n};\n\nexport function ExtensionNavbar() {\n const { state, currentTab, setCurrentTab, theme, toggleTheme, setIsCommandPaletteOpen } = useApp();\n const { isAuthenticated, user, logout, isAdmin, isOrgAdmin } = useAuth();\n const navigate = useNavigate();\n const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n const [pendingCount, setPendingCount] = useState(0);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n const checkQueue = async () => {\n try {\n const queue = await db.getAll('syncQueue');\n setPendingCount(queue.length);\n } catch (e) {\n setPendingCount(0);\n }\n };\n\n checkQueue();\n const interval = setInterval(checkQueue, 10000);\n return () => clearInterval(interval);\n }, []);\n\n const enabledMenuItems = useMemo(() =>\n menuItems.filter(item => state.enabledModules.includes(item.id)),\n [state.enabledModules]\n );\n\n const filteredItems = useMemo(() => {\n if (!searchQuery.trim()) return enabledMenuItems;\n return enabledMenuItems.filter(item =>\n item.label.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\n );\n }, [enabledMenuItems, searchQuery]);\n\n const groupedItems = useMemo(() => {\n const groups: Record = {};\n filteredItems.forEach(item => {\n if (!groups[item.category]) {\n groups[item.category] = [];\n }\n groups[item.category].push(item);\n });\n return groups;\n }, [filteredItems]);\n\n const currentItem = menuItems.find(item => item.id === currentTab);\n const CurrentIcon = currentItem?.icon || LayoutDashboard;\n\n return (\n
\n
\n {/* Menu Dropdown */}\n \n \n \n \n \n {/* Search inside dropdown */}\n
\n
\n \n setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n className=\"h-8 pl-7 text-sm\"\n />\n {searchQuery && (\n setSearchQuery('')}\n >\n \n \n )}\n
\n
\n \n\n {/* Admin Links in Main Menu (Mobile Friendly) */}\n {(isAdmin || isOrgAdmin) && (\n <>\n Administração\n {isAdmin && (\n navigate('/admin')} className=\"gap-2 cursor-pointer text-primary\">\n \n Painel Admin Global\n \n )}\n {isOrgAdmin && (\n navigate('/org-admin')} className=\"gap-2 cursor-pointer text-primary\">\n \n Painel da Empresa\n \n )}\n \n \n )}\n\n {Object.entries(groupedItems).map(([category, items]) => (\n \n \n {categoryLabels[category]}\n \n {items.map((item) => {\n const Icon = item.icon;\n const isActive = currentTab === item.id;\n return (\n setCurrentTab(item.id)}\n className={cn(\n \"gap-2 cursor-pointer\",\n isActive && \"bg-primary/10 text-primary\"\n )}\n >\n \n {item.label}\n \n );\n })}\n \n ))}\n \n \n\n {/* Pomodoro Timer */}\n \n\n {/* Spacer */}\n
\n\n
\n {/* Cloud Status */}\n
0 ? \"bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-500\" : \"bg-primary/10 text-primary\")\n : \"bg-muted text-muted-foreground\"\n )}>\n {isAuthenticated ? (\n pendingCount > 0 ? (\n <> {pendingCount} pendente(s)\n ) : (\n <> Nuvem Ativa\n )\n ) : (\n <> Offline\n )}\n
\n\n {/* Org Workspace Status */}\n {user?.organization_id && (\n
\n \n Espaço Equipe\n

{user?.email}

\n );\n}\n","src/components/Favorites.tsx":"import { useState } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Textarea } from './ui/textarea';\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from './ui/dialog';\nimport { Badge } from './ui/badge';\nimport { Plus, ExternalLink, Trash2, Edit2, Star, Globe } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\n\nexport const Favorites = () => {\n const { state, currentProject, addBookmark, updateBookmark, deleteBookmark } = useApp();\n const [isDialogOpen, setIsDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState(null);\n const [filterCategory, setFilterCategory] = useState('all');\n const [form, setForm] = useState({\n title: '',\n url: '',\n description: '',\n category: '',\n });\n\n const projectBookmarks = (state.bookmarks || []).filter(b => b.projectId === currentProject);\n const categories = ['all', ...new Set(projectBookmarks.map(b => b.category))];\n\n const filteredBookmarks = projectBookmarks.filter(\n b => filterCategory === 'all' || b.category === filterCategory\n );\n\n const handleOpenDialog = (bookmark?: typeof projectBookmarks[0]) => {\n if (bookmark) {\n setEditingId(bookmark.id);\n setForm({\n title: bookmark.title,\n url: bookmark.url,\n description: bookmark.description,\n category: bookmark.category,\n });\n } else {\n setEditingId(null);\n setForm({ title: '', url: '', description: '', category: '' });\n }\n setIsDialogOpen(true);\n };\n\n const handleSave = () => {\n if (!form.title.trim() || !form.url.trim()) {\n toast.error('Título e URL são obrigatórios');\n return;\n }\n\n // Validate URL\n try {\n new URL(form.url.startsWith('http') ? form.url : `https://${form.url}`);\n } catch {\n toast.error('URL inválida');\n return;\n }\n\n const url = form.url.startsWith('http') ? form.url : `https://${form.url}`;\n const favicon = `https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=${url}&sz=64`;\n\n if (editingId) {\n updateBookmark(editingId, { ...form, url, favicon });\n toast.success('Site atualizado');\n } else {\n addBookmark({\n projectId: currentProject,\n ...form,\n url,\n favicon,\n });\n toast.success('Site adicionado aos favoritos');\n }\n\n setForm({ title: '', url: '', description: '', category: '' });\n setEditingId(null);\n setIsDialogOpen(false);\n };\n\n const handleDelete = (id: string) => {\n deleteBookmark(id);\n toast.success('Site removido');\n };\n\n return (\n
\n
\n
\n \n

\n\n \n \n \n \n \n \n {editingId ? 'Editar' : 'Novo'} Site Favorito\n \n

\n \n \n
