\n );\n};\n","src/components/Finance.tsx":"import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\nimport { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from '@/components/ui/dialog';\nimport { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';\nimport { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from '@/components/ui/radio-group';\nimport { Plus, Edit, Trash2, TrendingUp, TrendingDown, PieChart } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\nimport { Chart as ChartJS, ArcElement, Tooltip, Legend, CategoryScale, LinearScale, BarElement } from 'chart.js';\nimport { Pie, Bar } from 'react-chartjs-2';\n\nChartJS.register(ArcElement, Tooltip, Legend, CategoryScale, LinearScale, BarElement);\n\nexport const Finance = () => {\n const { \n state, \n currentProject,\n addFinancialTransaction,\n updateFinancialTransaction,\n deleteFinancialTransaction,\n } = useApp();\n\n const [showReports, setShowReports] = useState(false);\n const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);\n const [editingTransaction, setEditingTransaction] = useState(null);\n const [formData, setFormData] = useState({\n date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],\n description: '',\n amount: '',\n type: 'expense' as 'income' | 'expense',\n categoryId: '',\n accountId: '',\n recurrence: 'never' as 'never' | 'monthly' | 'yearly',\n });\n\n const transactions = (state.financialTransactions || []).filter(t => t.projectId === currentProject);\n const categories = (state.financialCategories || []).filter(c => c.projectId === currentProject);\n const accounts = (state.financialAccounts || []).filter(a => a.projectId === currentProject);\n const budgets = (state.financialBudgets || []).filter(b => b.projectId === currentProject);\n\n // Cálculos do resumo\n const summary = useMemo(() => {\n const currentMonth = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7);\n const monthTransactions = transactions.filter(t => t.date.startsWith(currentMonth));\n \n const income = monthTransactions\n .filter(t => t.type === 'income')\n .reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);\n \n const expenses = monthTransactions\n .filter(t => t.type === 'expense')\n .reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);\n \n const balance = income - expenses;\n \n return { income, expenses, balance };\n }, [transactions]);\n\n // Dados para gráfico de pizza (despesas por categoria)\n const pieData = useMemo(() => {\n const currentMonth = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7);\n const monthExpenses = transactions.filter(t => \n t.type === 'expense' && t.date.startsWith(currentMonth)\n );\n\n const categoryTotals: Record = {};\n monthExpenses.forEach(t => {\n const category = categories.find(c => c.id === t.categoryId);\n const name = category?.name || 'Sem Categoria';\n categoryTotals[name] = (categoryTotals[name] || 0) + t.amount;\n });\n\n return {\n labels: Object.keys(categoryTotals),\n datasets: [{\n data: Object.values(categoryTotals),\n backgroundColor: [\n '#dc3545', '#28a745', '#ffc107', '#17a2b8', '#6f42c1',\n '#fd7e14', '#20c997', '#e83e8c', '#6c757d', '#007bff',\n ],\n }],\n };\n }, [transactions, categories]);\n\n // Dados para gráfico de barras (últimos 6 meses)\n const barData = useMemo(() => {\n const months: string[] = [];\n const now = new Date();\n for (let i = 5; i >= 0; i--) {\n const date = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - i, 1);\n months.push(date.toISOString().slice(0, 7));\n }\n\n const incomeData = months.map(month => {\n return transactions\n .filter(t => t.type === 'income' && t.date.startsWith(month))\n .reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);\n });\n\n const expenseData = months.map(month => {\n return transactions\n .filter(t => t.type === 'expense' && t.date.startsWith(month))\n .reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);\n });\n\n return {\n labels: months.map(m => {\n const [year, month] = m.split('-');\n return `${month}/${year}`;\n }),\n datasets: [\n {\n label: 'Receitas',\n data: incomeData,\n backgroundColor: '#28a745',\n },\n {\n label: 'Despesas',\n data: expenseData,\n backgroundColor: '#dc3545',\n },\n ],\n };\n }, [transactions]);\n\n const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n e.preventDefault();\n \n if (!formData.description || !formData.amount || !formData.categoryId || !formData.accountId) {\n toast.error('Preencha todos os campos');\n return;\n }\n\n const transactionData = {\n projectId: currentProject,\n date: formData.date,\n description: formData.description,\n amount: parseFloat(formData.amount),\n type: formData.type,\n categoryId: formData.categoryId,\n accountId: formData.accountId,\n recurrence: formData.recurrence,\n lastRecurrence: formData.recurrence !== 'never' ? new Date().toISOString() : undefined,\n };\n\n if (editingTransaction) {\n updateFinancialTransaction(editingTransaction, transactionData);\n toast.success('Lançamento atualizado!');\n setEditingTransaction(null);\n } else {\n addFinancialTransaction(transactionData);\n toast.success('Lançamento adicionado!');\n }\n\n setFormData({\n date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],\n description: '',\n amount: '',\n type: 'expense',\n categoryId: '',\n accountId: '',\n recurrence: 'never',\n });\n setShowForm(false);\n };\n\n const handleEdit = (transaction: any) => {\n setFormData({\n date: transaction.date,\n description: transaction.description,\n amount: transaction.amount.toString(),\n type: transaction.type,\n categoryId: transaction.categoryId,\n accountId: transaction.accountId,\n recurrence: transaction.recurrence,\n });\n setEditingTransaction(transaction.id);\n setShowForm(true);\n };\n\n const handleDelete = (id: string) => {\n if (confirm('Deseja remover este lançamento?')) {\n deleteFinancialTransaction(id);\n toast.success('Lançamento removido!');\n }\n };\n\n if (categories.length === 0 || accounts.length === 0) {\n return (\n

Nenhum lançamento ainda

\n ) : (\n
\n {transactions\n .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime())\n .slice(0, 10)\n .map(transaction => {\n const category = categories.find(c => c.id === transaction.categoryId);\n const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === transaction.accountId);\n return (\n \n
\n
\n {transaction.description}\n {transaction.recurrence !== 'never' && (\n \n {transaction.recurrence === 'monthly' ? 'Mensal' : 'Anual'}\n \n )}\n

\n

\n \n {transaction.type === 'income' ? '+' : '-'} R$ {transaction.amount.toFixed(2)}\n \n

CardTitle, CardFooter } from '@/components/ui/card';\r\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\r\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';\r\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';\r\nimport {\r\n Github,\r\n Slack,\r\n MessageSquare,\r\n Calendar,\r\n Zap,\r\n Settings2,\r\n ExternalLink,\r\n CheckCircle2,\r\n AlertCircle,\r\n RotateCcw,\r\n Plug,\r\n CloudIcon,\r\n Cpu,\r\n MessagesSquare,\r\n Search,\r\n Loader2\r\n} from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\r\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\r\n\r\nconst PROVIDER_ICONS: Record = {\r\n Github: Github,\r\n Slack: Slack,\r\n MessageSquare: MessageSquare,\r\n Calendar: Calendar,\r\n Zap: Zap,\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport const Integrations = () => {\r\n const { state, toggleIntegration } = useApp();\r\n const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\r\n const [connectingId, setConnectingId] = useState(null);\r\n\r\n const integrations = state.integrations || [];\r\n const filteredIntegrations = integrations.filter(i =>\r\n i.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\r\n i.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\r\n );\r\n\r\n const handleToggle = async (id: string, name: string, currentStatus: string) => {\r\n setConnectingId(id);\r\n\r\n // Simular um processo de conexão \"Premium\"\r\n await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));\r\n\r\n toggleIntegration(id);\r\n setConnectingId(null);\r\n\r\n if (currentStatus === 'disconnected') {\r\n toast.success(`${name} conectado com sucesso!`);\r\n } else {\r\n toast.info(`${name} desconectado.`);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const categories = [\r\n { id: 'all', label: 'Todos', icon: Plug },\r\n { id: 'dev', label: 'Desenvolvimento', icon: Cpu },\r\n { id: 'comm', label: 'Comunicação', icon: MessagesSquare },\r\n { id: 'productivity', label: 'Produtividade', icon: Calendar },\r\n { id: 'ai', label: 'Inteligência Artificial', icon: Zap },\r\n ];\r\n\r\n return (\r\n
\r\n {/* Header */}\r\n

\r\n {filteredIntegrations\r\n .filter(i => cat.id === 'all' || i.category === cat.id)\r\n .map((integration) => {\r\n const Icon = PROVIDER_ICONS[integration.icon] || Plug;\r\n const isConnected = integration.status === 'connected';\r\n const isConnecting = connectingId === integration.id;\r\n\r\n return (\r\n \r\n {isConnected && (\r\n

(\r\n <>\r\n handleToggle(integration.id, integration.name, integration.status)}\r\n disabled={isConnecting}\r\n >\r\n {isConnecting ? : 'Desconectar'}\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n ) : (\r\n handleToggle(integration.id, integration.name, integration.status)}\r\n disabled={isConnecting}\r\n >\r\n {isConnecting ? (\r\n \r\n ) : (\r\n <>\r\n Conectar {integration.name}\r\n \r\n \r\n )}\r\n \r\n )}\r\n \r\n \r\n );\r\n })}\r\n
\r\n\r\n {filteredIntegrations.filter(i => cat.id === 'all' || i.category === cat.id).length === 0 && (\r\n

\r\n );\r\n};\r\n\r\n// Helper function for class names\r\nfunction cn(...inputs: any[]) {\r\n return inputs.filter(Boolean).join(' ');\r\n}\r\n","src/components/Kanban.tsx":"import { useState } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Textarea } from './ui/textarea';\nimport { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from './ui/select';\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from './ui/dialog';\nimport { Plus, Trash2, GripVertical, Pencil, Users, Lock, Layout } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { DndContext, DragEndEvent, DragOverlay, useSensor, useSensors, PointerSensor, useDroppable, DragOverEvent } from '@dnd-kit/core';\nimport { SortableContext, useSortable, verticalListSortingStrategy } from '@dnd-kit/sortable';\nimport { CSS } from '@dnd-kit/utilities';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\nimport { Badge } from './ui/badge';\nimport { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from './ui/tabs';\nimport type { KanbanTask } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\n\nconst columns = [\n { id: 'todo', title: 'A Fazer', color: 'bg-blue-500' },\n { id: 'inProgress', title: 'Fazendo', color: 'bg-amber-500' },\n { id: 'done', title: 'Pronto', color: 'bg-emerald-500' },\n] as const;\n\nfunction DroppableColumn({\n column,\n tasks,\n children\n}: {\n column: typeof columns[number];\n tasks: KanbanTask[];\n children: React.ReactNode;\n}) {\n const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({\n id: column.id,\n });\n\n return (\n
\n
\n {column.title.toUpperCase()}\n {tasks.length}\n
\n \n {children}\n
\n
\n );\n}\n\nfunction SortableTask({ task, onDelete, onEdit, currentUserId }: { task: KanbanTask; onDelete: () => void; onEdit: () => void; currentUserId?: string }) {\n const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({\n id: task.id,\n });\n\n const style = {\n transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),\n transition,\n opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,\n zIndex: isDragging ? 50 : 0,\n };\n\n const isOwner = task.userId === currentUserId;\n\n return (\n
\n \n \n
\n \n
\n
\n

{task.title}

\n {task.accessLevel === 'shared' && }\n
\n {task.description && (\n

\n )}\n
\n {task.recurrence && task.recurrence !== 'none' && (\n \n {task.recurrence === 'daily' ? 'Diário' : 'Semanal'}\n \n )}\n {!isOwner && task.userId && (\n \n Outro\n \n )}\n
\n
\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n \n \n
\n );\n}\n\nexport const Kanban = () => {\n const { state, currentProject, addKanbanTask, updateKanbanTask, deleteKanbanTask } = useApp();\n const { user } = useAuth();\n const [isDialogOpen, setIsDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [isEditDialogOpen, setIsEditDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [editingTask, setEditingTask] = useState(null);\n const [filter, setFilter] = useState<'all' | 'private' | 'shared'>('all');\n const [newTask, setNewTask] = useState({\n title: '',\n description: '',\n column: 'todo' as const,\n recurrence: 'none' as const,\n accessLevel: 'private' as 'private' | 'shared',\n });\n\n const sensors = useSensors(\n useSensor(PointerSensor, {\n activationConstraint: {\n distance: 8,\n },\n })\n );\n\n const projectTasks = state.kanban.filter(task => {\n const isProject = task.projectId === currentProject;\n if (filter === 'all') return isProject;\n return isProject && task.accessLevel === filter;\n });\n\n const handleDragEnd = (event: DragEndEvent) => {\n const { active, over } = event;\n if (!over) return;\n\n const taskId = active.id as string;\n const task = projectTasks.find(t => t.id === taskId);\n if (!task) return;\n\n // Check permissions if shared\n const isOwner = task.userId === user?.id;\n const isAdmin = user?.sub_role === 'org_admin' || user?.sub_role === 'manager';\n if (task.accessLevel === 'shared' && !isOwner && !isAdmin) {\n toast.error('Somente administradores ou o dono podem mover tarefas do time');\n return;\n }\n\n // Check if dropped over a column\n const columnIds = columns.map(c => c.id);\n if (columnIds.includes(over.id as any)) {\n const newColumn = over.id as KanbanTask['column'];\n if (task.column !== newColumn) {\n updateKanbanTask(taskId, {\n column: newColumn,\n completedAt: newColumn === 'done' ? new Date().toISOString() : undefined,\n });\n toast.success('Tarefa movida');\n }\n }\n };\n\n const handleAddTask = () => {\n if (!newTask.title.trim()) {\n toast.error('O título é obrigatório');\n return;\n }\n\n addKanbanTask({\n projectId: currentProject,\n ...newTask,\n userId: user?.id,\n });\n\n setNewTask({\n title: '',\n description: '',\n column: 'todo',\n recurrence: 'none',\n accessLevel: 'private',\n });\n setIsDialogOpen(false);\n toast.success('Tarefa criada');\n };\n\n const handleEditTask = () => {\n if (!editingTask || !editingTask.title.trim()) {\n toast.error('O título é obrigatório');\n return;\n }\n\n updateKanbanTask(editingTask.id, {\n title: editingTask.title,\n description: editingTask.description,\n column: editingTask.column,\n recurrence: editingTask.recurrence,\n accessLevel: editingTask.accessLevel,\n });\n\n setEditingTask(null);\n setIsEditDialogOpen(false);\n toast.success('Tarefa atualizada');\n };\n\n const openEditDialog = (task: KanbanTask) => {\n const isOwner = task.userId === user?.id;\n const isAdmin = user?.sub_role === 'org_admin' || user?.sub_role === 'manager';\n\n if (task.accessLevel === 'shared' && !isOwner && !isAdmin) {\n toast.error('Somente administradores ou o dono podem editar tarefas do time');\n return;\n }\n\n setEditingTask({ ...task });\n setIsEditDialogOpen(true);\n };\n\n const handleDeleteTask = (task: KanbanTask) => {\n const isOwner = task.userId === user?.id;\n const isAdmin = user?.sub_role === 'org_admin' || user?.sub_role === 'manager';\n\n if (!isOwner && !isAdmin) {\n toast.error('Sem permissão para excluir esta tarefa');\n return;\n }\n\n deleteKanbanTask(task.id);\n toast.success('Tarefa deletada');\n };\n\n return (\n

\n );\n};\n","src/components/MusicPlayer.tsx":"import { Music, Plus, Trash2, Upload, Folder, Play, Pause } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { useMusicLibrary } from '@/hooks/useMusicLibrary';\nimport { useMusicPlayer } from '@/contexts/MusicPlayerContext';\nimport { useState, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Label } from './ui/label';\nimport {\n Dialog,\n DialogContent,\n DialogDescription,\n DialogHeader,\n DialogTitle,\n DialogTrigger,\n} from './ui/dialog';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { ScrollArea } from './ui/scroll-area';\n\nexport const MusicPlayer = () => {\n const {\n playlists,\n tracks,\n isLoading,\n isConnected,\n addTracksToPlaylist,\n createPlaylist,\n removeTrack,\n removePlaylist,\n clearLibrary,\n getTrackUrl\n } = useMusicLibrary();\n\n const { playTrack, currentTrack, isPlaying, setPlaylist } = useMusicPlayer();\n\n const [newPlaylistName, setNewPlaylistName] = useState('');\n const [selectedPlaylist, setSelectedPlaylist] = useState('');\n const [isCreateDialogOpen, setIsCreateDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n\n const handleCreatePlaylist = () => {\n if (newPlaylistName.trim()) {\n const playlistId = createPlaylist(newPlaylistName.trim());\n setNewPlaylistName('');\n setIsCreateDialogOpen(false);\n setSelectedPlaylist(playlistId);\n }\n };\n\n const handleAddTracks = (playlistId: string, event: React.ChangeEvent) => {\n const files = event.target.files;\n if (files && files.length > 0) {\n addTracksToPlaylist(playlistId, files);\n }\n };\n\n const currentPlaylist = useMemo(() => {\n const pl = selectedPlaylist\n ? playlists.find(p => p.id === selectedPlaylist)\n : playlists[0];\n\n if (!pl) return null;\n\n return {\n ...pl,\n resolvedTracks: pl.trackIds.map(id => tracks[id]).filter(Boolean)\n };\n }, [playlists, selectedPlaylist, tracks]);\n\n if (isLoading) {\n return (\n

Biblioteca de Músicas

'bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-md'\n : 'hover:bg-muted'\n }`}\n >\n \n {playlist.name}\n \n {playlist.trackIds.length}\n \n \n ))}\n

(currentTime / duration) * 100 : 0;\n\n if (!isVisible) {\n return (\n
\n setIsVisible(true)}\n className=\"w-full h-full py-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-1\"\n >\n \n Player\n \n
\n );\n }\n\n return (\n

'./ui/button';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Textarea } from './ui/textarea';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Plus, Star, Trash2, Save, Bold, Italic, List, CheckSquare, Code, Link as LinkIcon, Image as ImageIcon, Table, Users, Lock, ShieldCheck, FileText } from 'lucide-react';\nimport ReactMarkdown from 'react-markdown';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\nimport remarkGfm from 'remark-gfm';\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\nimport { Badge } from './ui/badge';\nimport { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from './ui/tabs';\n\nexport const Notes = () => {\n const { state, currentProject, addNote, updateNote, deleteNote } = useApp();\n const { user } = useAuth();\n const [selectedNote, setSelectedNote] = useState(null);\n const [title, setTitle] = useState('');\n const [content, setContent] = useState('');\n const [accessLevel, setAccessLevel] = useState<'private' | 'shared'>('private');\n const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);\n const [filter, setFilter] = useState<'all' | 'private' | 'shared'>('all');\n\n const projectNotes = state.notes.filter(note => {\n const isProject = note.projectId === currentProject;\n if (filter === 'all') return isProject;\n return isProject && note.accessLevel === filter;\n });\n\n const currentNote = selectedNote ? state.notes.find(n => n.id === selectedNote) : null;\n const canEdit = !selectedNote || currentNote?.userId === user?.id || (currentNote?.accessLevel === 'shared' && (user?.sub_role === 'org_admin' || user?.sub_role === 'manager'));\n\n const handleNew = () => {\n setSelectedNote(null);\n setTitle('');\n setContent('');\n setAccessLevel('private');\n setIsEditing(true);\n };\n\n const handleSave = () => {\n if (!title.trim()) {\n toast.error('O título é obrigatório');\n return;\n }\n\n if (selectedNote) {\n updateNote(selectedNote, { title, content, accessLevel });\n toast.success('Nota atualizada');\n } else {\n addNote({\n projectId: currentProject,\n title,\n content,\n isFavorite: false,\n accessLevel,\n userId: user?.id\n });\n toast.success('Nota criada');\n }\n setIsEditing(false);\n };\n\n const handleSelect = (noteId: string) => {\n const note = state.notes.find(n => n.id === noteId);\n if (note) {\n setSelectedNote(noteId);\n setTitle(note.title);\n setContent(note.content);\n setAccessLevel(note.accessLevel || 'private');\n setIsEditing(false);\n }\n };\n\n const handleToggleFavorite = (noteId: string) => {\n const note = state.notes.find(n => n.id === noteId);\n if (note) {\n updateNote(noteId, { isFavorite: !note.isFavorite });\n }\n };\n\n const handleDelete = (noteId: string) => {\n const note = state.notes.find(n => n.id === noteId);\n const isOwner = note?.userId === user?.id;\n const isAdmin = user?.sub_role === 'org_admin' || user?.sub_role === 'manager';\n\n if (!isOwner && !isAdmin) {\n toast.error('Sem permissão para excluir esta nota');\n return;\n }\n\n deleteNote(noteId);\n if (selectedNote === noteId) {\n setSelectedNote(null);\n setTitle('');\n setContent('');\n }\n toast.success('Nota deletada');\n };\n\n const insertMarkdown = (syntax: string) => {\n const textarea = document.querySelector('textarea') as HTMLTextAreaElement;\n if (!textarea) return;\n\n const start = textarea.selectionStart;\n const end = textarea.selectionEnd;\n const selectedText = content.substring(start, end);\n\n let newText = '';\n let cursorOffset = 0;\n\n switch (syntax) {\n case 'bold':\n newText = `**${selectedText || 'texto'}**`;\n cursorOffset = selectedText ? newText.length : 2;\n break;\n case 'italic':\n newText = `*${selectedText || 'texto'}*`;\n cursorOffset = selectedText ? newText.length : 1;\n break;\n case 'list':\n newText = `\\n- ${selectedText || 'item'}`;\n cursorOffset = newText.length;\n break;\n case 'checklist':\n newText = `\\n- [ ] ${selectedText || 'tarefa'}`;\n cursorOffset = newText.length;\n break;\n case 'code':\n newText = `\\`\\`\\`\\n${selectedText || 'código'}\\n\\`\\`\\``;\n cursorOffset = selectedText ? newText.length : 4;\n break;\n case 'link':\n newText = `[${selectedText || 'texto'}](url)`;\n cursorOffset = selectedText ? newText.length - 4 : 1;\n break;\n case 'image':\n newText = `![${selectedText || 'alt'}](url)`;\n cursorOffset = newText.length - 4;\n break;\n case 'table':\n newText = `\\n| Coluna 1 | Coluna 2 |\\n|----------|----------|\\n| Célula 1 | Célula 2 |\\n`;\n cursorOffset = newText.length;\n break;\n default:\n return;\n }\n\n const newContent = content.substring(0, start) + newText + content.substring(end);\n setContent(newContent);\n\n setTimeout(() => {\n textarea.focus();\n textarea.setSelectionRange(start + cursorOffset, start + cursorOffset);\n }, 0);\n };\n\n return (\n
\n
\n \n \n
\n Notas\n \n

{note.title}

\n );\n};\n","src/components/NotificationHub.tsx":"import React from 'react';\r\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\r\nimport {\r\n DropdownMenu,\r\n DropdownMenuContent,\r\n DropdownMenuItem,\r\n DropdownMenuTrigger,\r\n DropdownMenuSeparator,\r\n DropdownMenuLabel,\r\n} from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';\r\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\r\nimport {\r\n Bell,\r\n BellOff,\r\n Info,\r\n CheckCircle2,\r\n AlertTriangle,\r\n XCircle,\r\n Trophy,\r\n Trash2,\r\n Check\r\n} from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';\r\nimport { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';\r\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\r\nimport { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';\r\nimport { ptBR } from 'date-fns/locale';\r\n\r\nexport const NotificationHub = () => {\r\n const { state, markNotificationAsRead, markAllNotificationsAsRead, deleteNotification } = useApp();\r\n const notifications = state.notifications || [];\r\n const unreadCount = notifications.filter(n => !n.read).length;\r\n\r\n const getIcon = (type: string) => {\r\n switch (type) {\r\n case 'success': return ;\r\n case 'warning': return ;\r\n case 'error': return ;\r\n case 'achievement': return ;\r\n default: return ;\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n return (\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n Notificações\r\n

\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n {notifications.length > 0 ? (\r\n
\r\n {notifications.map((n) => (\r\n !n.read && markNotificationAsRead(n.id)}\r\n >\r\n {!n.read && (\r\n
\r\n )}\r\n
\r\n
{getIcon(n.type)}
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n

\r\n {n.title}\r\n

\r\n \r\n {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(n.createdAt), { addSuffix: true, locale: ptBR })}\r\n \r\n
\r\n

\r\n {n.message}\r\n

\r\n
\r\n {!n.read && (\r\n {\r\n e.stopPropagation();\r\n markNotificationAsRead(n.id);\r\n }}\r\n >\r\n \r\n \r\n )}\r\n {\r\n e.stopPropagation();\r\n deleteNotification(n.id);\r\n }}\r\n >\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n ))}\r\n
\r\n ) : (\r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n
\r\n

Sem notificações

\r\n

\r\n Tudo limpo por aqui! Avisaremos quando algo importante acontecer.\r\n

\r\n
\r\n )}\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n
\r\n \r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n );\r\n};\r\n","src/components/Passwords.tsx":"import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Textarea } from './ui/textarea';\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from './ui/dialog';\nimport { Plus, Eye, EyeOff, Copy, Trash2, Lock } from 'lucide-react';\nimport CryptoJS from 'crypto-js';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\n\nexport const Passwords = () => {\n const { state, currentProject, addPassword, updatePassword, deletePassword } = useApp();\n const [isUnlocked, setIsUnlocked] = useState(false);\n const [masterPassword, setMasterPassword] = useState('');\n const [showMasterDialog, setShowMasterDialog] = useState(true);\n const [isDialogOpen, setIsDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [showPasswords, setShowPasswords] = useState>({});\n const [form, setForm] = useState({\n title: '',\n username: '',\n password: '',\n url: '',\n notes: '',\n });\n\n const projectPasswords = state.passwords.filter(p => p.projectId === currentProject);\n\n const handleUnlock = () => {\n if (!masterPassword) {\n toast.error('Digite a senha mestra');\n return;\n }\n\n // In a real app, you would validate the master password\n // For demo purposes, we'll accept any non-empty password\n setIsUnlocked(true);\n setShowMasterDialog(false);\n toast.success('Cofre desbloqueado');\n };\n\n const handleAdd = () => {\n if (!form.title.trim() || !form.password.trim()) {\n toast.error('Título e senha são obrigatórios');\n return;\n }\n\n addPassword({\n projectId: currentProject,\n ...form,\n });\n\n setForm({ title: '', username: '', password: '', url: '', notes: '' });\n setIsDialogOpen(false);\n toast.success('Senha adicionada');\n };\n\n const handleCopy = (text: string) => {\n navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);\n toast.success('Copiado');\n };\n\n const toggleShowPassword = (id: string) => {\n setShowPasswords(prev => ({ ...prev, [id]: !prev[id] }));\n };\n\n if (!isUnlocked) {\n return (\n \n \n \n \n \n Digite a Senha Mestra\n \n \n
\n

\n Digite sua senha mestra para acessar o gerenciador de senhas.\n

\n setMasterPassword(e.target.value)}\n onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleUnlock()}\n />\n \n
\n \n \n );\n }\n\n return (\n
\n
\n

Gerenciador de Senhas

\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n\n \n \n \n Nova Senha\n \n
\n setForm({ ...form, title: e.target.value })}\n />\n setForm({ ...form, username: e.target.value })}\n />\n setForm({ ...form, password: e.target.value })}\n />\n setForm({ ...form, url: e.target.value })}\n />\n setForm({ ...form, notes: e.target.value })}\n />\n \n
\n \n \n\n
\n {projectPasswords.length === 0 ? (\n \n \n

Nenhuma senha salva

\n \n \n ) : (\n projectPasswords.map(password => (\n \n \n
\n {password.title}\n {\n deletePassword(password.id);\n toast.success('Senha deletada');\n }}\n >\n \n \n
\n \n \n {password.username && (\n
\n Usuário:\n
\n {password.username}\n \n
\n
\n )}\n
\n Senha:\n
\n \n {showPasswords[password.id] ? password.password : '••••••••'}\n \n \n \n
\n
\n {password.url && (\n
\n URL:\n \n {password.url}\n \n
\n )}\n {password.notes && (\n

{password.notes}

\n )}\n \n \n ))\n )}\n
\n
\n );\n};\n","src/components/PomodoroTimer.tsx":"import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { Play, Pause, RotateCcw, Timer, Coffee } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\nimport { ActiveBreakModal } from './ActiveBreakModal';\n\ntype TimerMode = 'focus' | 'shortBreak' | 'longBreak';\n\nexport const PomodoroTimer = () => {\n const { updatePomodoroStats, state, addWellnessBreak, addGamificationPoints, unlockBadge, addNotification } = useApp();\n const [mode, setMode] = useState('focus');\n const [timeLeft, setTimeLeft] = useState(state.gamificationStats.focusDuration * 60);\n const [isRunning, setIsRunning] = useState(false);\n const [showBreakModal, setShowBreakModal] = useState(false);\n const [pendingBreakType, setPendingBreakType] = useState<'short' | 'long'>('short');\n const intervalRef = useRef();\n const timerChannel = useRef();\n\n // ── Sync between Tabs ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\n useEffect(() => {\n timerChannel.current = new BroadcastChannel('devcenter-timer');\n\n timerChannel.current.onmessage = (event) => {\n const { type, payload } = event.data;\n switch (type) {\n case 'toggle':\n setIsRunning(payload.isRunning);\n if (payload.timeLeft !== undefined) setTimeLeft(payload.timeLeft);\n break;\n case 'reset':\n setIsRunning(false);\n setTimeLeft(payload.timeLeft);\n break;\n case 'tick':\n // Only sync tick if the difference is significant (>2s) to avoid loop jitter\n if (Math.abs(timeLeft - payload.timeLeft) > 2) {\n setTimeLeft(payload.timeLeft);\n }\n break;\n }\n };\n\n return () => timerChannel.current?.close();\n }, [timeLeft]);\n\n const broadcastTimer = (type: string, payload: any) => {\n timerChannel.current?.postMessage({ type, payload });\n };\n\n // Request notification permission on mount\n useEffect(() => {\n if ('Notification' in window && Notification.permission === 'default') {\n Notification.requestPermission();\n }\n }, []);\n\n const sendPushNotification = (title: string, body: string) => {\n if ('Notification' in window && Notification.permission === 'granted') {\n new Notification(title, {\n body,\n icon: '/favicon.ico',\n });\n }\n };\n\n const TIMER_DURATIONS = {\n focus: state.gamificationStats.focusDuration * 60,\n shortBreak: state.gamificationStats.shortBreakDuration * 60,\n longBreak: state.gamificationStats.longBreakDuration * 60,\n };\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (isRunning) {\n intervalRef.current = setInterval(() => {\n setTimeLeft(prev => {\n if (prev <= 1) {\n handleTimerComplete();\n return TIMER_DURATIONS[mode];\n }\n return prev - 1;\n });\n }, 1000);\n } else {\n if (intervalRef.current) clearInterval(intervalRef.current);\n }\n\n return () => {\n if (intervalRef.current) clearInterval(intervalRef.current);\n };\n }, [isRunning, mode]);\n\n // Atualizar duração quando as configurações mudarem\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!isRunning) {\n setTimeLeft(TIMER_DURATIONS[mode]);\n }\n }, [state.gamificationStats.focusDuration, state.gamificationStats.shortBreakDuration, state.gamificationStats.longBreakDuration]);\n\n const checkBadges = () => {\n const focusSessions = state.pomodoroStats.focusSessions + 1;\n const completedBreaks = state.wellnessStats.breaks.filter(b => b.adesaoStatus === 'Concluida').length;\n\n // Verificar badges de foco\n if (focusSessions === 10 && !state.gamificationStats.badges.some(b => b.id === 'foco10')) {\n unlockBadge('foco10');\n toast.success('Badge desbloqueado: Focado!');\n } else if (focusSessions === 25 && !state.gamificationStats.badges.some(b => b.id === 'foco25')) {\n unlockBadge('foco25');\n toast.success('Badge desbloqueado: Concentrado!');\n } else if (focusSessions === 50 && !state.gamificationStats.badges.some(b => b.id === 'foco50')) {\n unlockBadge('foco50');\n toast.success('Badge desbloqueado: Mestre do Foco!');\n }\n\n // Verificar badges de pausas\n if (completedBreaks === 10 && !state.gamificationStats.badges.some(b => b.id === 'pausa10')) {\n unlockBadge('pausa10');\n toast.success('Badge desbloqueado: Cuidadoso!');\n } else if (completedBreaks === 25 && !state.gamificationStats.badges.some(b => b.id === 'pausa25')) {\n unlockBadge('pausa25');\n toast.success('Badge desbloqueado: Bem-Estar!');\n }\n\n // Verificar badge de nível\n const nivel = state.gamificationStats.nivel;\n if (nivel >= 5 && !state.gamificationStats.badges.some(b => b.id === 'nivel5')) {\n unlockBadge('nivel5');\n toast.success('Badge desbloqueado: Evoluído!');\n }\n };\n\n // Acessar player de música do contexto (se disponível)\n const musicPlayerContext = (window as any).musicPlayerContext;\n\n const handleTimerComplete = () => {\n setIsRunning(false);\n\n if (mode === 'focus') {\n const newFocusSessions = state.pomodoroStats.focusSessions + 1;\n updatePomodoroStats({\n focusSessions: newFocusSessions,\n totalMinutes: state.pomodoroStats.totalMinutes + state.gamificationStats.focusDuration,\n });\n\n // Adicionar pontos por completar foco\n addGamificationPoints(10, 'foco', 'Completou um ciclo de foco');\n toast.success('Sessão de foco concluída! +10 XP');\n sendPushNotification('Foco Concluído!', 'Hora de uma pausa ativa. Bom trabalho!');\n\n addNotification({\n title: 'Foco Concluído!',\n message: 'Excelente trabalho! Sua sessão de foco foi finalizada com sucesso. Ganhou +10 XP.',\n type: 'success'\n });\n\n // Verificar badges\n checkBadges();\n\n // Pausar música ao abrir modal de pausa\n if (musicPlayerContext?.pause) {\n musicPlayerContext.pause();\n }\n\n // Disparar modal de Pausa Ativa\n const breakType = newFocusSessions % 4 === 0 ? 'long' : 'short';\n setPendingBreakType(breakType);\n setShowBreakModal(true);\n\n // Mudar para modo pausa para ocultar o timer da navbar\n setMode(breakType === 'short' ? 'shortBreak' : 'longBreak');\n } else {\n toast.info('Pausa concluída!');\n sendPushNotification('Pausa Concluída!', 'Pronto para voltar ao trabalho?');\n\n addNotification({\n title: 'Pausa Concluída!',\n message: 'Você está renovado agora? Vamos voltar ao trabalho!',\n type: 'info'\n });\n\n changeMode('focus');\n }\n\n // Play notification sound\n new Audio('/notification.mp3').play().catch(() => { });\n };\n\n const handleBreakComplete = () => {\n const breakDuration = pendingBreakType === 'short'\n ? state.gamificationStats.shortBreakDuration\n : state.gamificationStats.longBreakDuration;\n\n addWellnessBreak({\n dataHora: new Date().toISOString(),\n tipoCiclo: pendingBreakType,\n adesaoStatus: 'Concluida',\n duracaoPausa: breakDuration,\n });\n\n // Adicionar pontos por completar pausa\n addGamificationPoints(15, 'pausa_ativa', 'Completou uma pausa ativa');\n\n setShowBreakModal(false);\n changeMode('focus');\n toast.success('Pausa ativa concluída! +15 XP');\n\n // Verificar badges após pausa\n checkBadges();\n };\n\n const handleBreakSkip = () => {\n const breakDuration = pendingBreakType === 'short'\n ? state.gamificationStats.shortBreakDuration\n : state.gamificationStats.longBreakDuration;\n\n addWellnessBreak({\n dataHora: new Date().toISOString(),\n tipoCiclo: pendingBreakType,\n adesaoStatus: 'Pulada',\n duracaoPausa: breakDuration,\n });\n\n // Penalidade por pular pausa\n addGamificationPoints(-5, 'pausa_pulada', 'Pulou uma pausa ativa');\n\n setShowBreakModal(false);\n changeMode('focus');\n toast.warning('Pausa ignorada. -5 XP. Lembre-se de cuidar da sua saúde!');\n\n addNotification({\n title: 'Pausa Pulada',\n message: 'Você decidiu pular sua pausa. Cuidado com o burnout! -5 XP.',\n type: 'warning'\n });\n };\n\n const toggleTimer = () => {\n const newIsRunning = !isRunning;\n setIsRunning(newIsRunning);\n broadcastTimer('toggle', { isRunning: newIsRunning, timeLeft });\n\n // Integração com player de música: tocar ao iniciar foco, pausar ao parar\n const musicPlayerContext = (window as any).musicPlayerContext;\n if (mode === 'focus' && musicPlayerContext) {\n if (newIsRunning && musicPlayerContext.play) {\n musicPlayerContext.play();\n } else if (!newIsRunning && musicPlayerContext.pause) {\n musicPlayerContext.pause();\n }\n }\n };\n\n const resetTimer = () => {\n const duration = TIMER_DURATIONS[mode];\n setIsRunning(false);\n setTimeLeft(duration);\n broadcastTimer('reset', { timeLeft: duration });\n };\n\n const changeMode = (newMode: TimerMode) => {\n setMode(newMode);\n setTimeLeft(TIMER_DURATIONS[newMode]);\n setIsRunning(false);\n };\n\n const formatTime = (seconds: number) => {\n const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\n const secs = seconds % 60;\n return `${mins.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;\n };\n\n return (\n <>\n {mode === 'focus' && (\n
\n \n \n {formatTime(timeLeft)}\n \n
\n \n {isRunning ? : }\n \n \n \n \n
\n
\n )}\n\n \n \n );\n};\n","src/components/Pricing.tsx":"import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Label } from './ui/label';\nimport { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from './ui/select';\nimport { Calculator, DollarSign, FileSpreadsheet } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\n\nexport const Pricing = () => {\n const { state, updatePricingData } = useApp();\n \n const [fixedCosts, setFixedCosts] = useState(state.pricingData.fixedCosts.toString());\n const [desiredSalary, setDesiredSalary] = useState(state.pricingData.desiredSalary.toString());\n const [taxesPercent, setTaxesPercent] = useState(state.pricingData.taxesPercent.toString());\n const [hoursPerDay, setHoursPerDay] = useState(state.pricingData.hoursPerDay.toString());\n const [daysPerMonth, setDaysPerMonth] = useState(state.pricingData.daysPerMonth.toString());\n \n const [projectHours, setProjectHours] = useState('40');\n const [complexityMultiplier, setComplexityMultiplier] = useState('1.0');\n const [baseCost, setBaseCost] = useState('0');\n const [selectedTechSheet, setSelectedTechSheet] = useState('');\n\n const calculateIdealHourlyRate = () => {\n const costs = parseFloat(fixedCosts) || 0;\n const salary = parseFloat(desiredSalary) || 0;\n const taxes = parseFloat(taxesPercent) || 0;\n const hours = parseFloat(hoursPerDay) || 1;\n const days = parseFloat(daysPerMonth) || 1;\n\n const monthlyRevenue = salary + costs;\n const monthlyRevenueWithTaxes = monthlyRevenue / (1 - taxes / 100);\n const monthlyHours = hours * days;\n \n const minHourlyRate = monthlyRevenue / monthlyHours;\n const idealHourlyRate = monthlyRevenueWithTaxes / monthlyHours;\n\n return {\n minHourlyRate: minHourlyRate || 0,\n idealHourlyRate: idealHourlyRate || 0,\n };\n };\n\n const { minHourlyRate, idealHourlyRate } = calculateIdealHourlyRate();\n\n const handleSaveHourlyRate = () => {\n updatePricingData({\n fixedCosts: parseFloat(fixedCosts) || 0,\n desiredSalary: parseFloat(desiredSalary) || 0,\n taxesPercent: parseFloat(taxesPercent) || 0,\n hoursPerDay: parseFloat(hoursPerDay) || 8,\n daysPerMonth: parseFloat(daysPerMonth) || 22,\n idealHourlyRate,\n });\n toast.success('Valor/Hora Ideal salvo com sucesso!');\n };\n\n const calculateProjectPrice = () => {\n const hours = parseFloat(projectHours) || 0;\n const multiplier = parseFloat(complexityMultiplier) || 1;\n const cost = parseFloat(baseCost) || 0;\n return (state.pricingData.idealHourlyRate * hours * multiplier) + cost;\n };\n\n const handleImportFromTechSheet = () => {\n if (!selectedTechSheet) return;\n const sheet = state.techSheets.find(s => s.id === selectedTechSheet);\n if (sheet) {\n setBaseCost(sheet.custoPorUnidade.toFixed(2));\n toast.success(`Custo base importado: R$ ${sheet.custoPorUnidade.toFixed(2)}`);\n }\n };\n\n return (\n
\n

Precificador de Serviços

\n\n {/* Calculadora de Valor/Hora */}\n \n \n \n \n Calculadora de Valor/Hora\n \n \n \n
\n
\n \n setFixedCosts(e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"Ex: 3000\"\n min=\"0\"\n step=\"0.01\"\n />\n

\n Aluguel, internet, luz, software, etc.\n

\n
\n\n
\n \n setDesiredSalary(e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"Ex: 5000\"\n min=\"0\"\n step=\"0.01\"\n />\n

\n Quanto você quer ganhar por mês\n

\n
\n\n
\n \n setTaxesPercent(e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"Ex: 15\"\n min=\"0\"\n max=\"100\"\n step=\"0.01\"\n />\n

\n MEI, Simples Nacional, etc.\n

\n
\n\n
\n \n setHoursPerDay(e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"Ex: 8\"\n min=\"1\"\n max=\"24\"\n step=\"0.5\"\n />\n
\n\n
\n \n setDaysPerMonth(e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"Ex: 22\"\n min=\"1\"\n max=\"31\"\n step=\"1\"\n />\n
\n
\n\n
\n
\n
\n

Valor/Hora Mínimo

\n

R$ {minHourlyRate.toFixed(2)}

\n

\n Sem considerar impostos\n

\n
\n\n
\n

Valor/Hora Ideal

\n

R$ {idealHourlyRate.toFixed(2)}

\n

\n Com impostos inclusos\n

\n
\n
\n\n \n
\n \n \n\n {/* Calculadora de Projeto Fixo */}\n \n \n \n \n Calculadora de Projeto Fixo\n \n \n \n {state.pricingData.idealHourlyRate === 0 ? (\n
\n

\n Configure e salve seu Valor/Hora Ideal acima para usar esta calculadora\n

\n
\n ) : (\n <>\n
\n
\n
\n \n setProjectHours(e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"Ex: 40\"\n min=\"0\"\n step=\"0.5\"\n />\n
\n\n
\n \n setComplexityMultiplier(e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"Ex: 1.5\"\n min=\"0.1\"\n step=\"0.1\"\n />\n
\n
\n\n
\n \n
\n \n \n
\n
\n\n
\n \n setBaseCost(e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"0.00\"\n min=\"0\"\n step=\"0.01\"\n />\n

\n Custo de materiais ou produção\n

\n
\n
\n\n
\n

Valor Sugerido do Projeto

\n

\n R$ {calculateProjectPrice().toFixed(2)}\n

\n
\n

• Mão de obra: R$ {(state.pricingData.idealHourlyRate * parseFloat(projectHours || '0') * parseFloat(complexityMultiplier || '1')).toFixed(2)}

\n

• Custo base: R$ {parseFloat(baseCost || '0').toFixed(2)}

\n

• Horas: {projectHours}h × Valor/Hora: R$ {state.pricingData.idealHourlyRate.toFixed(2)} × {complexityMultiplier}x

\n
\n
\n \n )}\n \n \n\n
\n

💡 Dica

\n

\n Ao salvar seu Valor/Hora Ideal, você pode vinculá-lo aos serviços do seu Catálogo \n nas Configurações. Assim, quando criar orçamentos, o preço será preenchido \n automaticamente com base neste valor!\n

\n
\n
\n );\n};\n","src/components/ProjectExplorer.tsx":"import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react';\r\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\r\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';\r\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\r\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';\r\nimport { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';\r\nimport {\r\n Folder,\r\n FileText,\r\n Code,\r\n Layers,\r\n DollarSign,\r\n Plus,\r\n ChevronRight,\r\n MoreVertical,\r\n CheckCircle2,\r\n Clock,\r\n LayoutGrid,\r\n Search,\r\n Filter\r\n} from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\r\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\r\nimport {\r\n DropdownMenu,\r\n DropdownMenuContent,\r\n DropdownMenuItem,\r\n DropdownMenuTrigger\r\n} from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';\r\n\r\nexport const ProjectExplorer = () => {\r\n const { state, setCurrentProject, setCurrentTab } = useApp();\r\n const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\r\n const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null);\r\n\r\n const filteredProjects = useMemo(() => {\r\n return state.projects.filter(p =>\r\n p.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\r\n );\r\n }, [state.projects, searchQuery]);\r\n\r\n const activeProject = useMemo(() => {\r\n const id = selectedProject || 'default';\r\n return state.projects.find(p => p.id === id);\r\n }, [state.projects, selectedProject]);\r\n\r\n // Summary calculations for the selected project\r\n const summary = useMemo(() => {\r\n const id = activeProject?.id;\r\n if (!id) return null;\r\n\r\n return {\r\n notes: state.notes.filter(n => n.projectId === id).length,\r\n snippets: state.snippets.filter(s => s.projectId === id).length,\r\n tasks: state.kanban.filter(t => t.projectId === id).length,\r\n tasksDone: state.kanban.filter(t => t.projectId === id && t.column === 'done').length,\r\n finance: state.financialTransactions.filter(t => t.projectId === id).length,\r\n balance: state.financialTransactions\r\n .filter(t => t.projectId === id)\r\n .reduce((acc, t) => acc + (t.type === 'income' ? t.amount : -t.amount), 0),\r\n };\r\n }, [state, activeProject]);\r\n\r\n const handleSelectProject = (projectId: string) => {\r\n setSelectedProject(projectId);\r\n setCurrentProject(projectId);\r\n };\r\n\r\n const navigateToModule = (tab: string) => {\r\n setCurrentTab(tab);\r\n };\r\n\r\n return (\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n

Project Explorer

\r\n

Visão 360º de todos os seus ativos por projeto.

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\r\n />\r\n
\r\n \r\n
\r\n
\r\n\r\n
\r\n {/* Projects Sidebar/List */}\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Seus Projetos\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n {filteredProjects.map((project) => (\r\n handleSelectProject(project.id)}\r\n className={cn(\r\n \"w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm transition-all duration-200 group relative\",\r\n activeProject?.id === project.id\r\n ? \"bg-primary/15 text-primary font-medium\"\r\n : \"hover:bg-muted text-muted-foreground\"\r\n )}\r\n >\r\n \r\n {project.name}\r\n {activeProject?.id === project.id && (\r\n
\r\n )}\r\n \r\n \r\n ))}\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n\r\n {/* Project Details View */}\r\n
\r\n {activeProject ? (\r\n <>\r\n
\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n
\r\n

{activeProject.name}

\r\n
\r\n ID: {activeProject.id}\r\n Última atualização: Hoje\r\n

{summary?.tasks}
\r\n \r\n \r\n

\r\n \r\n \r\n\r\n navigateToModule('notes')}>\r\n \r\n
\r\n Notas & Docs\r\n \r\n

{summary?.notes}

\r\n
\r\n {new Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR', { style: 'currency', currency: 'BRL' }).format(summary?.balance || 0)}\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n {summary?.finance} transações vinculadas\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n\r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n
\r\n Snippets & Código\r\n \r\n
\r\n \r\n \r\n {summary?.snippets ? (\r\n
\r\n {state.snippets.filter(s => s.projectId === activeProject.id).slice(0, 3).map(snippet => (\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n {snippet.title}\r\n
\r\n {snippet.language}\r\n
\r\n ))}\r\n \r\n
\r\n ) : (\r\n
\r\n Nenhum snippet vinculado.\r\n
\r\n )}\r\n \r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n \r\n

\r\n );\r\n};\r\n","src/components/Prompts.tsx":"import { useState } from 'react';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Textarea } from './ui/textarea';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Badge } from './ui/badge';\nimport { Plus, Star, Trash2, Copy, Download, Upload } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\n\nexport const Prompts = () => {\n const { state, currentProject, addPrompt, updatePrompt, deletePrompt } = useApp();\n const [selectedPrompt, setSelectedPrompt] = useState(null);\n const [form, setForm] = useState({\n title: '',\n content: '',\n notes: '',\n tags: '',\n });\n const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);\n\n const projectPrompts = state.prompts.filter(p => p.projectId === currentProject);\n const currentPrompt = selectedPrompt ? state.prompts.find(p => p.id === selectedPrompt) : null;\n\n const handleNew = () => {\n setSelectedPrompt(null);\n setForm({ title: '', content: '', notes: '', tags: '' });\n setIsEditing(true);\n };\n\n const handleSave = () => {\n if (!form.title.trim() || !form.content.trim()) {\n toast.error('Título e prompt são obrigatórios');\n return;\n }\n\n const tags = form.tags.split(',').map(t => t.trim()).filter(Boolean);\n\n if (selectedPrompt) {\n updatePrompt(selectedPrompt, { ...form, tags });\n toast.success('Prompt atualizado');\n } else {\n addPrompt({ projectId: currentProject, ...form, tags, isFavorite: false });\n toast.success('Prompt criado');\n }\n setIsEditing(false);\n };\n\n const handleSelect = (promptId: string) => {\n const prompt = state.prompts.find(p => p.id === promptId);\n if (prompt) {\n setSelectedPrompt(promptId);\n setForm({\n title: prompt.title,\n content: prompt.content,\n notes: prompt.notes,\n tags: prompt.tags.join(', '),\n });\n setIsEditing(false);\n }\n };\n\n const handleCopy = (content: string) => {\n navigator.clipboard.writeText(content);\n toast.success('Prompt copiado');\n };\n\n const handleExport = () => {\n const data = JSON.stringify(projectPrompts, null, 2);\n const blob = new Blob([data], { type: 'application/json' });\n const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n const a = document.createElement('a');\n a.href = url;\n a.download = 'prompts.json';\n a.click();\n toast.success('Prompts exportados');\n };\n\n const handleImport = (e: React.ChangeEvent) => {\n const file = e.target.files?.[0];\n if (!file) return;\n\n const reader = new FileReader();\n reader.onload = (event) => {\n try {\n const prompts = JSON.parse(event.target?.result as string);\n prompts.forEach((p: any) => {\n addPrompt({\n projectId: currentProject,\n title: p.title,\n content: p.content,\n notes: p.notes || '',\n tags: p.tags || [],\n isFavorite: false,\n });\n });\n toast.success('Prompts importados');\n } catch (error) {\n toast.error('Erro ao importar');\n }\n };\n reader.readAsText(file);\n };\n\n return (\n
\n \n \n
\n Prompts de IA\n
\n \n \n \n
\n
\n \n \n {projectPrompts.length === 0 ? (\n

Nenhum prompt

\n ) : (\n projectPrompts.map(prompt => (\n handleSelect(prompt.id)}\n >\n
\n

{prompt.title}

\n {\n e.stopPropagation();\n updatePrompt(prompt.id, { isFavorite: !prompt.isFavorite });\n }}\n >\n \n \n
\n
\n {prompt.tags.map(tag => (\n \n {tag}\n \n ))}\n
\n
\n ))\n )}\n \n \n\n
\n {(isEditing || selectedPrompt) && (\n \n \n
\n Editor de Prompt\n
\n {!isEditing && currentPrompt && (\n <>\n \n \n {\n deletePrompt(currentPrompt.id);\n setSelectedPrompt(null);\n toast.success('Prompt deletado');\n }}\n >\n \n \n \n )}\n {isEditing && (\n \n )}\n
\n
\n \n \n setForm({ ...form, title: e.target.value })}\n disabled={!isEditing}\n />\n setForm({ ...form, content: e.target.value })}\n className=\"min-h-[200px]\"\n disabled={!isEditing}\n />\n setForm({ ...form, notes: e.target.value })}\n className=\"min-h-[100px]\"\n disabled={!isEditing}\n />\n setForm({ ...form, tags: e.target.value })}\n disabled={!isEditing}\n />\n \n \n )}\n\n {!isEditing && !selectedPrompt && (\n \n \n

\n \n
\n \n \n )}\n
\n
\n );\n};\n","src/components/Settings.tsx":"import { useState } from 'react';\nimport { storageService } from '@/services/storageService';\nimport { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Textarea } from './ui/textarea';\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from './ui/dialog';\nimport { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from './ui/select';\nimport { Label } from './ui/label';\nimport { Badge } from './ui/badge';\nimport { Plus, Trash2, Edit2, Key, ToggleLeft, ToggleRight, Download, Upload } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\nimport CryptoJS from 'crypto-js';\n\nexport const Settings = () => {\n const { \n state, \n currentProject,\n addProject, \n updateProject, \n deleteProject,\n addFinancialAccount,\n updateFinancialAccount,\n deleteFinancialAccount,\n addFinancialCategory,\n updateFinancialCategory,\n deleteFinancialCategory,\n addFinancialBudget,\n updateFinancialBudget,\n deleteFinancialBudget,\n addContactTag,\n deleteContactTag,\n updateBillingInfo,\n addServiceCatalogItem,\n updateServiceCatalogItem,\n deleteServiceCatalogItem,\n toggleModule,\n } = useApp();\n const [isProjectDialogOpen, setIsProjectDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [editingProject, setEditingProject] = useState(null);\n const [projectForm, setProjectForm] = useState({ name: '', color: '#dc3545' });\n\n // Financial states\n const [isAccountDialogOpen, setIsAccountDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [editingAccount, setEditingAccount] = useState(null);\n const [accountForm, setAccountForm] = useState({ name: '', initialBalance: '' });\n\n const [isCategoryDialogOpen, setIsCategoryDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [editingCategory, setEditingCategory] = useState(null);\n const [categoryForm, setCategoryForm] = useState({ name: '', type: 'expense' as 'income' | 'expense' });\n\n const [isBudgetDialogOpen, setIsBudgetDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [editingBudget, setEditingBudget] = useState(null);\n const [budgetForm, setBudgetForm] = useState({ categoryId: '', limit: '', month: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7) });\n\n // Contact tags state\n const [contactTagDialogOpen, setContactTagDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [newContactTag, setNewContactTag] = useState('');\n\n // Billing info state\n const [isBillingDialogOpen, setIsBillingDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [billingForm, setBillingForm] = useState(state.billingInfo);\n\n // Service catalog state\n const [isServiceDialogOpen, setIsServiceDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [editingService, setEditingService] = useState(null);\n const [serviceForm, setServiceForm] = useState({ description: '', unitPrice: '', useIdealHourlyRate: false });\n\n // Master password state\n const [isMasterPasswordDialogOpen, setIsMasterPasswordDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [masterPasswordForm, setMasterPasswordForm] = useState({ current: '', new: '', confirm: '' });\n const [hasMasterPassword, setHasMasterPassword] = useState(!!localStorage.getItem('masterPassword'));\n\n const handleAddProject = () => {\n if (!projectForm.name.trim()) {\n toast.error('Nome do projeto é obrigatório');\n return;\n }\n\n if (editingProject) {\n updateProject(editingProject, projectForm);\n toast.success('Projeto atualizado');\n } else {\n addProject(projectForm);\n toast.success('Projeto criado');\n }\n\n setProjectForm({ name: '', color: '#dc3545' });\n setEditingProject(null);\n setIsProjectDialogOpen(false);\n };\n\n const handleEditProject = (projectId: string) => {\n const project = state.projects.find(p => p.id === projectId);\n if (project) {\n setProjectForm({ name: project.name, color: project.color });\n setEditingProject(projectId);\n setIsProjectDialogOpen(true);\n }\n };\n\n const handleDeleteProject = (projectId: string) => {\n if (state.projects.length === 1) {\n toast.error('Não é possível deletar o único projeto');\n return;\n }\n deleteProject(projectId);\n toast.success('Projeto deletado');\n };\n\n const handleExportData = () => {\n const data = JSON.stringify(state, null, 2);\n const blob = new Blob([data], { type: 'application/json' });\n const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n const a = document.createElement('a');\n a.href = url;\n a.download = 'devcommandcenter-backup.json';\n a.click();\n toast.success('Dados exportados');\n };\n\n const handleImportData = (e: React.ChangeEvent) => {\n const file = e.target.files?.[0];\n if (!file) return;\n\n const reader = new FileReader();\n reader.onload = (event) => {\n try {\n const data = JSON.parse(event.target?.result as string);\n storageService.importAll(data).then(() => {\n toast.success('Dados importados! Recarregando...');\n setTimeout(() => window.location.reload(), 1000);\n });\n } catch (error) {\n toast.error('Erro ao importar dados');\n }\n };\n reader.readAsText(file);\n };\n\n // Financial handlers\n const handleAddAccount = () => {\n if (!accountForm.name.trim()) {\n toast.error('Nome da conta é obrigatório');\n return;\n }\n\n const accountData = {\n projectId: currentProject,\n name: accountForm.name,\n initialBalance: parseFloat(accountForm.initialBalance) || 0,\n };\n\n if (editingAccount) {\n updateFinancialAccount(editingAccount, accountData);\n toast.success('Conta atualizada');\n } else {\n addFinancialAccount(accountData);\n toast.success('Conta criada');\n }\n\n setAccountForm({ name: '', initialBalance: '' });\n setEditingAccount(null);\n setIsAccountDialogOpen(false);\n };\n\n const handleEditAccount = (accountId: string) => {\n const account = state.financialAccounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);\n if (account) {\n setAccountForm({ name: account.name, initialBalance: account.initialBalance.toString() });\n setEditingAccount(accountId);\n setIsAccountDialogOpen(true);\n }\n };\n\n const handleDeleteAccount = (accountId: string) => {\n if (confirm('Deseja deletar esta conta?')) {\n deleteFinancialAccount(accountId);\n toast.success('Conta deletada');\n }\n };\n\n const handleAddCategory = () => {\n if (!categoryForm.name.trim()) {\n toast.error('Nome da categoria é obrigatório');\n return;\n }\n\n const categoryData = {\n projectId: currentProject,\n name: categoryForm.name,\n type: categoryForm.type,\n };\n\n if (editingCategory) {\n updateFinancialCategory(editingCategory, categoryData);\n toast.success('Categoria atualizada');\n } else {\n addFinancialCategory(categoryData);\n toast.success('Categoria criada');\n }\n\n setCategoryForm({ name: '', type: 'expense' });\n setEditingCategory(null);\n setIsCategoryDialogOpen(false);\n };\n\n const handleEditCategory = (categoryId: string) => {\n const category = state.financialCategories.find(c => c.id === categoryId);\n if (category) {\n setCategoryForm({ name: category.name, type: category.type });\n setEditingCategory(categoryId);\n setIsCategoryDialogOpen(true);\n }\n };\n\n const handleDeleteCategory = (categoryId: string) => {\n if (confirm('Deseja deletar esta categoria?')) {\n deleteFinancialCategory(categoryId);\n toast.success('Categoria deletada');\n }\n };\n\n const handleAddBudget = () => {\n if (!budgetForm.categoryId || !budgetForm.limit) {\n toast.error('Preencha todos os campos');\n return;\n }\n\n const budgetData = {\n projectId: currentProject,\n categoryId: budgetForm.categoryId,\n limit: parseFloat(budgetForm.limit),\n month: budgetForm.month,\n };\n\n if (editingBudget) {\n updateFinancialBudget(editingBudget, budgetData);\n toast.success('Orçamento atualizado');\n } else {\n addFinancialBudget(budgetData);\n toast.success('Orçamento criado');\n }\n\n setBudgetForm({ categoryId: '', limit: '', month: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7) });\n setEditingBudget(null);\n setIsBudgetDialogOpen(false);\n };\n\n const handleEditBudget = (budgetId: string) => {\n const budget = state.financialBudgets.find(b => b.id === budgetId);\n if (budget) {\n setBudgetForm({ categoryId: budget.categoryId, limit: budget.limit.toString(), month: budget.month });\n setEditingBudget(budgetId);\n setIsBudgetDialogOpen(true);\n }\n };\n\n const handleDeleteBudget = (budgetId: string) => {\n if (confirm('Deseja deletar este orçamento?')) {\n deleteFinancialBudget(budgetId);\n toast.success('Orçamento deletado');\n }\n };\n\n const projectAccounts = (state.financialAccounts || []).filter(a => a.projectId === currentProject);\n const projectCategories = (state.financialCategories || []).filter(c => c.projectId === currentProject);\n const projectBudgets = (state.financialBudgets || []).filter(b => b.projectId === currentProject);\n\n const handleSaveBillingInfo = () => {\n updateBillingInfo(billingForm);\n setIsBillingDialogOpen(false);\n toast.success('Dados de faturamento atualizados');\n };\n\n const handleAddService = () => {\n if (!serviceForm.description.trim()) {\n toast.error('Descrição é obrigatória');\n return;\n }\n\n const serviceData = {\n description: serviceForm.description,\n unitPrice: parseFloat(serviceForm.unitPrice) || 0,\n useIdealHourlyRate: serviceForm.useIdealHourlyRate,\n };\n\n if (editingService) {\n updateServiceCatalogItem(editingService, serviceData);\n toast.success('Serviço atualizado');\n } else {\n addServiceCatalogItem(serviceData);\n toast.success('Serviço adicionado');\n }\n\n setServiceForm({ description: '', unitPrice: '', useIdealHourlyRate: false });\n setEditingService(null);\n setIsServiceDialogOpen(false);\n };\n\n const handleEditService = (serviceId: string) => {\n const service = state.serviceCatalog.find(s => s.id === serviceId);\n if (service) {\n setServiceForm({ \n description: service.description, \n unitPrice: service.unitPrice.toString(),\n useIdealHourlyRate: service.useIdealHourlyRate || false,\n });\n setEditingService(serviceId);\n setIsServiceDialogOpen(true);\n }\n };\n\n const handleDeleteService = (serviceId: string) => {\n if (confirm('Deseja deletar este serviço?')) {\n deleteServiceCatalogItem(serviceId);\n toast.success('Serviço deletado');\n }\n };\n\n const handleSaveMasterPassword = () => {\n if (!hasMasterPassword) {\n // Criando nova senha\n if (!masterPasswordForm.new || !masterPasswordForm.confirm) {\n toast.error('Preencha todos os campos');\n return;\n }\n if (masterPasswordForm.new !== masterPasswordForm.confirm) {\n toast.error('As senhas não coincidem');\n return;\n }\n if (masterPasswordForm.new.length < 6) {\n toast.error('A senha deve ter pelo menos 6 caracteres');\n return;\n }\n localStorage.setItem('masterPassword', masterPasswordForm.new);\n setHasMasterPassword(true);\n toast.success('Senha Mestra criada com sucesso!');\n } else {\n // Alterando senha existente\n const currentPassword = localStorage.getItem('masterPassword');\n if (masterPasswordForm.current !== currentPassword) {\n toast.error('Senha atual incorreta');\n return;\n }\n if (!masterPasswordForm.new || !masterPasswordForm.confirm) {\n toast.error('Preencha a nova senha');\n return;\n }\n if (masterPasswordForm.new !== masterPasswordForm.confirm) {\n toast.error('As novas senhas não coincidem');\n return;\n }\n if (masterPasswordForm.new.length < 6) {\n toast.error('A senha deve ter pelo menos 6 caracteres');\n return;\n }\n localStorage.setItem('masterPassword', masterPasswordForm.new);\n toast.success('Senha Mestra alterada com sucesso!');\n }\n setMasterPasswordForm({ current: '', new: '', confirm: '' });\n setIsMasterPasswordDialogOpen(false);\n };\n\n const handleRemoveMasterPassword = () => {\n const currentPassword = localStorage.getItem('masterPassword');\n if (masterPasswordForm.current !== currentPassword) {\n toast.error('Senha atual incorreta');\n return;\n }\n if (confirm('⚠️ ATENÇÃO: Ao remover a Senha Mestra, você não poderá mais descriptografar dados exportados anteriormente. Deseja continuar?')) {\n localStorage.removeItem('masterPassword');\n setHasMasterPassword(false);\n setMasterPasswordForm({ current: '', new: '', confirm: '' });\n setIsMasterPasswordDialogOpen(false);\n toast.success('Senha Mestra removida');\n }\n };\n\n const handleExportAllData = () => {\n try {\n // Coletar TODOS os dados de todos os módulos\n const allData = {\n version: '2.0',\n exportedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n appState: state,\n musicPlaylists: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('musicPlaylists') || '[]'),\n theme: localStorage.getItem('theme') || 'dark',\n currentProject: localStorage.getItem('currentProject') || 'default',\n miniPlayerVisible: localStorage.getItem('mini-player-visible') !== 'false',\n };\n\n const masterPassword = localStorage.getItem('masterPassword');\n let exportContent: string;\n let fileName: string;\n\n if (masterPassword) {\n // Exportar criptografado\n exportContent = CryptoJS.AES.encrypt(\n JSON.stringify(allData),\n masterPassword\n ).toString();\n fileName = `backup-completo-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.enc`;\n } else {\n // Exportar em JSON puro\n exportContent = JSON.stringify(allData, null, 2);\n fileName = `backup-completo-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.json`;\n }\n\n const blob = new Blob([exportContent], { type: masterPassword ? 'text/plain' : 'application/json' });\n const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n const a = document.createElement('a');\n a.href = url;\n a.download = fileName;\n document.body.appendChild(a);\n a.click();\n document.body.removeChild(a);\n URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n\n toast.success(`Backup criado! ${masterPassword ? '(Criptografado)' : '(JSON)'}`);\n } catch (error) {\n toast.error('Erro ao exportar dados');\n console.error(error);\n }\n };\n\n const handleImportAllData = (event: React.ChangeEvent) => {\n const file = event.target.files?.[0];\n if (!file) return;\n\n const reader = new FileReader();\n reader.onload = async (e) => {\n try {\n const fileContent = e.target?.result as string;\n let importedData;\n\n // Tentar primeiro como JSON puro\n try {\n importedData = JSON.parse(fileContent);\n } catch {\n // Se falhar, tentar descriptografar\n const masterPassword = localStorage.getItem('masterPassword');\n if (!masterPassword) {\n toast.error('Arquivo criptografado detectado. Configure a Senha Mestra primeiro.');\n return;\n }\n \n const decrypted = CryptoJS.AES.decrypt(fileContent, masterPassword).toString(CryptoJS.enc.Utf8);\n if (!decrypted) {\n toast.error('Senha incorreta ou arquivo inválido');\n return;\n }\n importedData = JSON.parse(decrypted);\n }\n\n // Verificar versão e estrutura\n let stateToImport;\n const extras: { theme?: string; currentProject?: string } = {};\n\n if (!importedData.version || !importedData.appState) {\n // Formato antigo (v1.0)\n stateToImport = importedData.data || importedData;\n } else {\n // Formato novo (v2.0)\n stateToImport = importedData.appState;\n if (importedData.theme) extras.theme = importedData.theme;\n if (importedData.currentProject) extras.currentProject = importedData.currentProject;\n\n if (importedData.musicPlaylists) {\n localStorage.setItem('musicPlaylists', JSON.stringify(importedData.musicPlaylists));\n }\n if (importedData.miniPlayerVisible !== undefined) {\n localStorage.setItem('mini-player-visible', importedData.miniPlayerVisible.toString());\n }\n }\n\n await storageService.importAll(stateToImport, extras);\n\n toast.success('Dados importados! Recarregando...');\n setTimeout(() => window.location.reload(), 1500);\n } catch (error) {\n toast.error('Erro ao importar dados. Verifique o arquivo.');\n console.error(error);\n }\n };\n reader.readAsText(file);\n event.target.value = '';\n };\n\n return (\n
\n

Configurações

\n\n \n \n
\n Projetos\n \n \n \n \n \n \n {editingProject ? 'Editar' : 'Novo'} Projeto\n \n
\n setProjectForm({ ...projectForm, name: e.target.value })}\n />\n
\n \n setProjectForm({ ...projectForm, color: e.target.value })}\n className=\"h-10 w-20 rounded border cursor-pointer\"\n />\n
\n \n
\n \n \n
\n \n \n {state.projects.map(project => (\n \n
\n \n {project.name}\n
\n
\n handleEditProject(project.id)}\n >\n \n \n {state.projects.length > 1 && (\n handleDeleteProject(project.id)}\n >\n \n \n )}\n
\n
\n ))}\n \n \n\n \n \n Backup & Restauração\n \n \n
\n

\n Exporte todos os seus dados para um arquivo JSON\n

\n \n
\n
\n

\n Importe dados de um backup anterior\n

\n \n
\n \n \n\n \n \n
\n \n \n Senha Mestra\n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n {hasMasterPassword ? 'Alterar' : 'Configurar'} Senha Mestra\n \n
\n {hasMasterPassword && (\n
\n \n setMasterPasswordForm({ ...masterPasswordForm, current: e.target.value })}\n placeholder=\"Digite a senha atual\"\n />\n
\n )}\n
\n \n setMasterPasswordForm({ ...masterPasswordForm, new: e.target.value })}\n placeholder=\"Mínimo 6 caracteres\"\n />\n
\n
\n \n setMasterPasswordForm({ ...masterPasswordForm, confirm: e.target.value })}\n placeholder=\"Digite novamente\"\n />\n
\n \n {hasMasterPassword && (\n \n )}\n
\n \n \n
\n \n \n
\n
\n Status:\n \n {hasMasterPassword ? '🔒 Configurada' : '🔓 Não Configurada'}\n \n
\n

\n A Senha Mestra protege módulos sensíveis como Estoque, Ficha Técnica e Senhas. \n Configure-a para exportar/importar dados criptografados desses módulos.\n

\n
\n \n \n\n {/* Backup do Sistema */}\n \n \n \n \n Backup do Sistema\n \n \n \n

\n Exporte todos os dados de todos os módulos em um único arquivo. Se você tiver uma Senha Mestra configurada, o arquivo será criptografado automaticamente.\n

\n
\n

\n 📦 Dados incluídos no backup:\n

\n
    \n
  • Notas, Prompts, Snippets, Cheatsheet
    • \n
  • Kanban, Checklists, Favoritos
    • \n
  • Senhas, Contatos (criptografados)
    • \n
  • Finanças, Orçamentos, Precificador
    • \n
  • Estoque, Fichas Técnicas
    • \n
  • Diário, Rascunho
    • \n
  • Playlists de música
    • \n
  • Estatísticas Pomodoro/Wellness
    • \n
  • Configurações e preferências
    • \n
\n
\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n

\n ⚠️ Importante: {hasMasterPassword \n ? 'Seu backup será criptografado com a Senha Mestra. Mantenha-o em local seguro.' \n : 'Configure uma Senha Mestra para criptografar seus backups automaticamente.'}\n

\n
\n \n \n\n \n \n \n \n Gerenciar Módulos\n \n \n \n

\n Habilite ou desabilite módulos para personalizar sua Central de Comando. \n Módulos desabilitados não aparecerão na barra lateral.\n

\n
\n {[\n { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', protected: true },\n { id: 'tutorial', label: 'Tutorial', protected: true },\n { id: 'wellness', label: 'Bem-Estar', protected: false },\n { id: 'musica', label: 'Biblioteca de Músicas', protected: false },\n { id: 'videos', label: 'Biblioteca de Vídeos', protected: false },\n { id: 'favorites', label: 'Favoritos', protected: false },\n { id: 'notes', label: 'Notas', protected: false },\n { id: 'prompts', label: 'Prompts IA', protected: false },\n { id: 'snippets', label: 'Snippets', protected: false },\n { id: 'cheatsheet', label: 'Cheatsheet', protected: false },\n { id: 'kanban', label: 'Kanban', protected: false },\n { id: 'checklists', label: 'Listas Pessoais', protected: false },\n { id: 'passwords', label: 'Senhas', protected: false },\n { id: 'contacts', label: 'Contatos', protected: false },\n { id: 'orcamentos', label: 'Orçamentos', protected: false },\n { id: 'precificador', label: 'Precificador', protected: false },\n { id: 'estoque', label: 'Estoque', protected: false },\n { id: 'fichatecnica', label: 'Ficha Técnica', protected: false },\n { id: 'finance', label: 'Financeiro', protected: false },\n { id: 'diary', label: 'Diário', protected: false },\n { id: 'draft', label: 'Rascunho', protected: false },\n { id: 'settings', label: 'Configurações', protected: true },\n ].map(module => {\n const isEnabled = state.enabledModules.includes(module.id);\n return (\n
\n {module.label}\n {\n if (module.protected) {\n toast.error('Este módulo não pode ser desabilitado');\n return;\n }\n toggleModule(module.id);\n toast.success(\n isEnabled \n ? `${module.label} desabilitado` \n : `${module.label} habilitado`\n );\n }}\n disabled={module.protected}\n >\n {isEnabled ? (\n <>\n \n Ativo\n \n ) : (\n <>\n \n Inativo\n \n )}\n \n
\n );\n })}\n
\n \n \n\n \n \n Estatísticas\n \n \n
\n Total de Notas:\n {state.notes.length}\n
\n
\n Total de Prompts:\n {state.prompts.length}\n
\n
\n Total de Snippets:\n {state.snippets.length}\n
\n
\n Tarefas Kanban:\n {state.kanban.length}\n
\n
\n Sites Favoritos:\n {state.bookmarks.length}\n
\n
\n Entradas no Diário:\n {state.diary.length}\n
\n
\n Transações Financeiras:\n {(state.financialTransactions || []).length}\n
\n
\n Contatos:\n {(state.contacts || []).length}\n
\n
\n Listas Pessoais:\n {(state.checklists || []).length}\n
\n \n \n\n {/* Contact Tags Management */}\n \n \n Tags de Contatos\n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n Adicionar Tag de Contato\n \n
\n
\n \n setNewContactTag(e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"Ex: Cliente, Fornecedor, Parceiro\"\n />\n
\n {\n if (newContactTag.trim()) {\n addContactTag(newContactTag.trim());\n setContactTagDialogOpen(false);\n setNewContactTag('');\n toast.success('Tag adicionada');\n }\n }}\n className=\"w-full\"\n >\n Adicionar\n \n
\n \n \n\n
\n {(state.contactTags || []).map(tag => (\n
\n {tag}\n {\n if (confirm(`Remover a tag \"${tag}\"?`)) {\n deleteContactTag(tag);\n toast.success('Tag removida');\n }\n }}\n >\n \n \n
\n ))}\n {(state.contactTags || []).length === 0 && (\n

\n Nenhuma tag cadastrada\n

\n )}\n
\n \n \n\n {/* Billing Info */}\n \n \n

\n
\n \n setBillingForm({ ...billingForm, companyName: e.target.value })}\n placeholder=\"Ex: João Silva\"\n />\n
\n
\n \n setBillingForm({ ...billingForm, address: e.target.value })}\n placeholder=\"Endereço completo\"\n rows={2}\n />\n
\n

\n
\n \n setBillingForm({ ...billingForm, email: e.target.value })}\n placeholder=\"contato@empresa.com\"\n />\n
\n
\n \n setBillingForm({ ...billingForm, phone: e.target.value })}\n placeholder=\"(11) 99999-9999\"\n />\n
\n
\n \n setBillingForm({ ...billingForm, logoUrl: e.target.value })}\n placeholder=\"https://exemplo.com/logo.png\"\n />\n
\n \n
\n \n \n
\n \n \n {state.billingInfo.companyName ? (\n <>\n
\n Empresa:\n {state.billingInfo.companyName}\n

\n CNPJ/CPF:\n {state.billingInfo.taxId}\n
\n
\n E-mail:\n {state.billingInfo.email}\n
\n
\n Telefone:\n {state.billingInfo.phone}\n
\n \n ) : (\n

\n Nenhum dado de faturamento cadastrado\n

\n )}\n \n \n\n {/* Service Catalog */}\n \n \n
\n Catálogo de Serviços/Itens\n \n \n \n \n \n \n {editingService ? 'Editar' : 'Novo'} Serviço\n \n
\n
\n \n setServiceForm({ ...serviceForm, description: e.target.value })}\n placeholder=\"Ex: Desenvolvimento de website\"\n />\n
\n
\n \n setServiceForm({ ...serviceForm, unitPrice: e.target.value })}\n placeholder=\"0.00\"\n disabled={serviceForm.useIdealHourlyRate}\n />\n {serviceForm.useIdealHourlyRate && (\n

\n Preço vinculado ao Valor/Hora Ideal\n

\n )}\n
\n
\n setServiceForm({ ...serviceForm, useIdealHourlyRate: e.target.checked })}\n className=\"h-4 w-4 rounded border-input\"\n />\n \n
\n \n
\n \n \n
\n \n \n {state.serviceCatalog.length === 0 ? (\n

\n Nenhum serviço cadastrado\n

\n ) : (\n state.serviceCatalog.map(service => (\n
\n
\n
\n {service.description}\n \n - R$ {service.unitPrice.toFixed(2)}\n \n
\n {service.useIdealHourlyRate && (\n \n Valor/Hora Ideal\n \n )}\n
\n
\n handleEditService(service.id)}\n >\n \n \n handleDeleteService(service.id)}\n >\n \n \n
\n
\n ))\n )}\n \n \n\n \n \n Financeiro\n \n \n {/* Contas */}\n
\n
\n

Contas

\n \n \n \n \n \n \n {editingAccount ? 'Editar' : 'Nova'} Conta\n \n
\n
\n \n setAccountForm({ ...accountForm, name: e.target.value })}\n />\n
\n
\n \n setAccountForm({ ...accountForm, initialBalance: e.target.value })}\n />\n
\n \n
\n \n \n

Nenhuma conta criada

\n ) : (\n projectAccounts.map(account => (\n
\n
\n {account.name}\n \n (Saldo inicial: R$ {account.initialBalance.toFixed(2)})\n \n
\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n ))\n )}\n
\n
\n\n {/* Categorias */}\n
\n
\n

Categorias

\n \n \n \n \n \n \n {editingCategory ? 'Editar' : 'Nova'} Categoria\n \n
\n
\n \n setCategoryForm({ ...categoryForm, name: e.target.value })}\n />\n
\n
\n \n \n setCategoryForm({ ...categoryForm, type: value })\n }\n >\n \n \n \n \n Receita\n Despesa\n \n \n
\n \n
\n \n \n
\n
\n {projectCategories.length === 0 ? (\n

Nenhuma categoria criada

\n ) : (\n projectCategories.map(category => (\n
\n
\n {category.name}\n \n ({category.type === 'income' ? 'Receita' : 'Despesa'})\n \n
\n
\n \n \n
\n
\n ))\n )}\n
\n
