\"@radix-ui/react-toast\";\nimport { cva, type VariantProps } from \"class-variance-authority\";\nimport { X } from \"lucide-react\";\n\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\n\nconst ToastProvider = ToastPrimitives.Provider;\n\nconst ToastViewport = React.forwardRef<\n React.ElementRef,\n React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef\n>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (\n \n));\nToastViewport.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Viewport.displayName;\n\nconst toastVariants = cva(\n \"group pointer-events-auto relative flex w-full items-center justify-between space-x-4 overflow-hidden rounded-md border p-6 pr-8 shadow-lg transition-all data-[swipe=cancel]:translate-x-0 data-[swipe=end]:translate-x-[var(--radix-toast-swipe-end-x)] data-[swipe=move]:translate-x-[var(--radix-toast-swipe-move-x)] data-[swipe=move]:transition-none data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[swipe=end]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:fade-out-80 data-[state=closed]:slide-out-to-right-full data-[state=open]:slide-in-from-top-full data-[state=open]:sm:slide-in-from-bottom-full\",\n {\n variants: {\n variant: {\n default: \"border bg-background text-foreground\",\n destructive: \"destructive group border-destructive bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground\",\n },\n },\n defaultVariants: {\n variant: \"default\",\n },\n },\n);\n\nconst Toast = React.forwardRef<\n React.ElementRef,\n React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef & VariantProps\n>(({ className, variant, ...props }, ref) => {\n return ;\n});\nToast.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Root.displayName;\n\nconst ToastAction = React.forwardRef<\n React.ElementRef,\n React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef\n>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (\n \n));\nToastAction.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Action.displayName;\n\nconst ToastClose = React.forwardRef<\n React.ElementRef,\n React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef\n>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (\n \n \n \n));\nToastClose.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Close.displayName;\n\nconst ToastTitle = React.forwardRef<\n React.ElementRef,\n React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef\n>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (\n \n));\nToastTitle.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Title.displayName;\n\nconst ToastDescription = React.forwardRef<\n React.ElementRef,\n React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef\n>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (\n \n));\nToastDescription.displayName = ToastPrimitives.Description.displayName;\n\ntype ToastProps = React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef;\n\ntype ToastActionElement = React.ReactElement;\n\nexport {\n type ToastProps,\n type ToastActionElement,\n ToastProvider,\n ToastViewport,\n Toast,\n ToastTitle,\n ToastDescription,\n ToastClose,\n ToastAction,\n};\n","src/components/ui/toaster.tsx":"import { useToast } from \"@/hooks/use-toast\";\nimport { Toast, ToastClose, ToastDescription, ToastProvider, ToastTitle, ToastViewport } from \"@/components/ui/toast\";\n\nexport function Toaster() {\n const { toasts } = useToast();\n\n return (\n \n {toasts.map(function ({ id, title, description, action, ...props }) {\n return (\n \n
    \n {title && {title}}\n {description && {description}}\n
    \n {action}\n \n     \n );\n })}\n \n     \n );\n}\n","src/components/ui/toggle-group.tsx":"import * as React from \"react\";\nimport * as ToggleGroupPrimitive from \"@radix-ui/react-toggle-group\";\nimport { type VariantProps } from \"class-variance-authority\";\n\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { toggleVariants } from \"@/components/ui/toggle\";\n\nconst ToggleGroupContext = React.createContext>({\n size: \"default\",\n variant: \"default\",\n});\n\nconst ToggleGroup = React.forwardRef<\n React.ElementRef,\n React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef & VariantProps\n>(({ className, variant, size, children, ...props }, ref) => (\n \n {children}\n \n));\n\nToggleGroup.displayName = ToggleGroupPrimitive.Root.displayName;\n\nconst ToggleGroupItem = React.forwardRef<\n React.ElementRef,\n React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef & VariantProps\n>(({ className, children, variant, size, ...props }, ref) => {\n const context = React.useContext(ToggleGroupContext);\n\n return (\n \n {children}\n \n );\n});\n\nToggleGroupItem.displayName = ToggleGroupPrimitive.Item.displayName;\n\nexport { ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem };\n","src/components/ui/toggle.tsx":"import * as React from \"react\";\nimport * as TogglePrimitive from \"@radix-ui/react-toggle\";\nimport { cva, type VariantProps } from \"class-variance-authority\";\n\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\n\nconst toggleVariants = cva(\n \"inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors hover:bg-muted hover:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=on]:bg-accent data-[state=on]:text-accent-foreground\",\n {\n variants: {\n variant: {\n default: \"bg-transparent\",\n outline: \"border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground\",\n },\n size: {\n default: \"h-10 px-3\",\n sm: \"h-9 px-2.5\",\n lg: \"h-11 px-5\",\n },\n },\n defaultVariants: {\n variant: \"default\",\n size: \"default\",\n },\n },\n);\n\nconst Toggle = React.forwardRef<\n React.ElementRef,\n React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef & VariantProps\n>(({ className, variant, size, ...props }, ref) => (\n \n));\n\nToggle.displayName = TogglePrimitive.Root.displayName;\n\nexport { Toggle, toggleVariants };\n","src/components/ui/tooltip.tsx":"import * as React from \"react\";\nimport * as TooltipPrimitive from \"@radix-ui/react-tooltip\";\n\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\n\nconst TooltipProvider = TooltipPrimitive.Provider;\n\nconst Tooltip = TooltipPrimitive.Root;\n\nconst TooltipTrigger = TooltipPrimitive.Trigger;\n\nconst TooltipContent = React.forwardRef<\n React.ElementRef,\n React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef\n>(({ className, sideOffset = 4, ...props }, ref) => (\n \n));\nTooltipContent.displayName = TooltipPrimitive.Content.displayName;\n\nexport { Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider };\n","src/components/ui/use-toast.ts":"import { useToast, toast } from \"@/hooks/use-toast\";\n\nexport { useToast, toast };\n","src/components/UserProfile.tsx":"import React, { useState } from 'react';\r\nimport { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';\r\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardFooter } from '@/components/ui/card';\r\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\r\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\r\nimport { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';\r\nimport { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';\r\nimport { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/components/ui/avatar';\r\nimport { User, Mail, Shield, UserCircle, Save, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\r\n\r\nexport const UserProfile = () => {\r\n const { user, updateProfile } = useAuth();\r\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\r\n const [formData, setFormData] = useState({\r\n name: user?.name || '',\r\n avatar_url: user?.avatar_url || '',\r\n bio: user?.bio || '',\r\n });\r\n\r\n const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\r\n e.preventDefault();\r\n setIsLoading(true);\r\n try {\r\n await updateProfile(formData);\r\n toast.success('Perfil atualizado com sucesso!');\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Erro ao atualizar perfil.');\r\n } finally {\r\n setIsLoading(false);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n return (\r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n {user?.email?.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n {user?.name || 'Seu Perfil'}\r\n {user?.email}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n     \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setFormData({ ...formData, name: e.target.value })}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n\r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setFormData({ ...formData, avatar_url: e.target.value })}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n\r\n
    \r\n \r\n setFormData({ ...formData, bio: e.target.value })}\r\n className=\"min-h-[100px]\"\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n\r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n Nível de Acesso: {user?.role}\r\n {user?.sub_role && ({user.sub_role})}\r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n     \r\n \r\n \r\n {isLoading ? (\r\n <>\r\n \r\n Salvando...\r\n \r\n ) : (\r\n <>\r\n \r\n Salvar Alterações\r\n \r\n )}\r\n \r\n \r\n     \r\n\r\n \r\n \r\n Segurança\r\n \r\n Gerencie sua senha e acessos.\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n

    \r\n Nota: A alteração de senha exigirá um novo login em todos os dispositivos.\r\n

    \r\n     \r\n     \r\n
    \r\n );\r\n};\r\n","src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx":"import { Video, Plus, Trash2, Upload, Folder, Play } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { useVideoLibrary, VideoItem } from '@/hooks/useVideoLibrary';\nimport { useState, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Label } from './ui/label';\nimport {\n Dialog,\n DialogContent,\n DialogDescription,\n DialogHeader,\n DialogTitle,\n DialogTrigger,\n} from './ui/dialog';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { ScrollArea } from './ui/scroll-area';\n\nexport const VideoPlayer = () => {\n const {\n playlists,\n isLoading,\n isConnected,\n addVideosToPlaylist,\n createPlaylist,\n removeVideo,\n removePlaylist,\n clearLibrary,\n } = useVideoLibrary();\n\n const [newPlaylistName, setNewPlaylistName] = useState('');\n const [selectedPlaylist, setSelectedPlaylist] = useState('');\n const [isCreateDialogOpen, setIsCreateDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n const [activeVideo, setActiveVideo] = useState(null);\n const videoRef = useRef(null);\n\n const handleCreatePlaylist = () => {\n if (newPlaylistName.trim()) {\n const id = createPlaylist(newPlaylistName.trim());\n setNewPlaylistName('');\n setIsCreateDialogOpen(false);\n setSelectedPlaylist(id);\n }\n };\n\n const handleAddVideos = (playlistId: string, event: React.ChangeEvent) => {\n const files = event.target.files;\n if (files && files.length > 0) {\n addVideosToPlaylist(playlistId, files);\n }\n };\n\n const handlePlayVideo = (video: VideoItem) => {\n setActiveVideo(video);\n };\n\n if (isLoading) {\n return (\n
    \n
    \n
    \n
    \n );\n }\n\n if (!isConnected) {\n return (\n
    \n
    \n
    \n
    \n );\n }\n\n const currentPlaylist = selectedPlaylist\n ? playlists.find(p => p.id === selectedPlaylist)\n : playlists[0];\n\n return (\n
    \n
    \n

    🎬 Biblioteca de Vídeos

    \n
    \n \n {playlists.length > 0 && (\n \n )}\n
    \n
    \n\n {/* Video Player Area */}\n {activeVideo && (\n \n \n \n

    {activeVideo.title}

    \n     \n     \n )}\n\n
    \n {/* Sidebar com Playlists */}\n \n \n Playlists\n \n \n \n
    \n {playlists.map((playlist) => (\n setSelectedPlaylist(playlist.id)}\n className={`w-full text-left px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 ${\n selectedPlaylist === playlist.id || (!selectedPlaylist && playlist === playlists[0])\n ? 'bg-primary text-primary-foreground'\n : 'hover:bg-muted'\n }`}\n >\n \n {playlist.name}\n {playlist.videos.length}\n \n ))}\n
    \n     \n     \n     \n\n {/* Video Grid */}\n \n \n
    \n {currentPlaylist?.name || 'Selecione uma Playlist'}\n {currentPlaylist && (\n
    \n \n removePlaylist(currentPlaylist.id)}\n className=\"gap-2\"\n >\n \n Excluir\n \n
    \n )}\n
    \n     \n \n {currentPlaylist && currentPlaylist.videos.length > 0 ? (\n \n
    \n {currentPlaylist.videos.map((video) => (\n handlePlayVideo(video)}\n >\n {video.thumbnail ? (\n \n ) : (\n
    \n
    \n )}\n
    \n \n
    \n
    \n

    {video.title}

    \n {\n e.stopPropagation();\n removeVideo(currentPlaylist.id, video.id);\n }}\n >\n \n \n
    \n
    \n ))}\n
    \n \n ) : (\n
    \n
    \n )}\n \n \n
    \n\n
    \n

    \n Total: {playlists.reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.videos.length, 0)} vídeo\n {playlists.reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.videos.length, 0) !== 1 ? 's' : ''} em{' '}\n {playlists.length} playlist{playlists.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}\n

    \n

    \n ⚠️ Os vídeos ficam armazenados apenas durante a sessão atual. Ao recarregar a página, será necessário adicioná-los novamente.\n

    \n
    \n \n );\n};\n\n// Reusable dialog component\nfunction CreatePlaylistDialog({\n open,\n onOpenChange,\n name,\n onNameChange,\n onCreate,\n buttonLabel,\n buttonSize = 'sm',\n variant = 'default',\n}: {\n open: boolean;\n onOpenChange: (v: boolean) => void;\n name: string;\n onNameChange: (v: string) => void;\n onCreate: () => void;\n buttonLabel: string;\n buttonSize?: 'sm' | 'lg';\n variant?: 'default' | 'outline';\n}) {\n return (\n \n \n \n \n \n \n Nova Playlist de Vídeos\n Escolha um nome para sua playlist\n \n
    \n
    \n \n onNameChange(e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"Ex: Tutoriais, Cursos, Filmes...\"\n onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && onCreate()}\n />\n
    \n \n
    \n     \n     \n );\n}\n","src/components/Wellness.tsx":"import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { useApp, AVAILABLE_BADGES } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from './ui/card';\nimport { Trophy, Star, Zap, Play, Pause, Volume2, Brain, Heart, Settings as SettingsIcon, Upload, Target, Smile, Flower, FileText, Package, Lightbulb, Code, DollarSign, Book, Lock, ShieldCheck } from 'lucide-react';\nimport * as LucideIcons from 'lucide-react';\nimport { Button } from './ui/button';\nimport { Badge } from './ui/badge';\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\nimport { Line } from 'react-chartjs-2';\nimport {\n Chart as ChartJS,\n CategoryScale,\n LinearScale,\n PointElement,\n LineElement,\n Title,\n Tooltip,\n Legend,\n} from 'chart.js';\nimport { Input } from './ui/input';\nimport { Label } from './ui/label';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\n\n// Register Chart.js components\nChartJS.register(\n CategoryScale,\n LinearScale,\n PointElement,\n LineElement,\n Title,\n Tooltip,\n Legend\n);\n\nexport const Wellness = () => {\n const { state, updateFocusDurations, addGamificationPoints } = useApp();\n const [audioPlaying, setAudioPlaying] = useState(null);\n const audioRef = useRef(null);\n\n const [focusDuration, setFocusDuration] = useState(state.gamificationStats.focusDuration);\n const [shortBreak, setShortBreak] = useState(state.gamificationStats.shortBreakDuration);\n const [longBreak, setLongBreak] = useState(state.gamificationStats.longBreakDuration);\n\n const [customAudios, setCustomAudios] = useState({\n meditation: '/audios/meditation/default.mp3',\n lofi: '/audios/lofi/default.mp3',\n whitenoise: '/audios/whitenoise/default.mp3',\n });\n\n const completedBreaks = state.wellnessStats.breaks.filter(b => b.adesaoStatus === 'Concluida').length;\n const totalBreaks = state.wellnessStats.breaks.length;\n const adherenceRate = totalBreaks > 0 ? Math.round((completedBreaks / totalBreaks) * 100) : 0;\n\n // Últimos 7 dias de histórico\n const last7Days = Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, i) => {\n const date = new Date();\n date.setDate(date.getDate() - (6 - i));\n return date.toISOString().split('T')[0];\n });\n\n const last7DaysLabels = last7Days.map(date => {\n const d = new Date(date);\n return d.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR', { weekday: 'short', day: '2-digit' });\n });\n\n const dailyPoints = last7Days.map(date => {\n const dayHistory = state.gamificationStats.historico.filter(h => {\n const histDate = new Date(h.timestamp).toISOString().split('T')[0];\n return histDate === date;\n });\n return dayHistory.reduce((acc, h) => acc + h.pontos, 0);\n });\n\n const chartData = {\n labels: last7DaysLabels,\n datasets: [\n {\n label: 'Pontos por Dia',\n data: dailyPoints,\n borderColor: 'rgb(147, 51, 234)',\n backgroundColor: 'rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.1)',\n tension: 0.3,\n },\n ],\n };\n\n const chartOptions = {\n responsive: true,\n maintainAspectRatio: false,\n plugins: {\n legend: {\n position: 'top' as const,\n },\n },\n scales: {\n y: {\n beginAtZero: true,\n title: {\n display: true,\n text: 'Pontos',\n },\n },\n },\n };\n\n const handlePlayAudio = (type: string) => {\n if (audioPlaying === type) {\n audioRef.current?.pause();\n setAudioPlaying(null);\n } else {\n if (audioRef.current) {\n audioRef.current.src = customAudios[type as keyof typeof customAudios];\n audioRef.current.play().catch(() => {\n toast.error('Erro ao carregar áudio. Coloque seus arquivos nas pastas: public/audios/meditation, public/audios/lofi, public/audios/whitenoise');\n });\n setAudioPlaying(type);\n\n // Dar pontos por meditação\n if (type === 'meditation') {\n addGamificationPoints(20, 'meditacao', 'Completou uma sessão de meditação');\n toast.success('+20 pontos por meditação!');\n }\n }\n }\n };\n\n const handleAudioUpload = (type: keyof typeof customAudios, event: React.ChangeEvent) => {\n const file = event.target.files?.[0];\n if (file) {\n const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);\n setCustomAudios(prev => ({ ...prev, [type]: url }));\n toast.success('Áudio carregado com sucesso!');\n }\n };\n\n const handleSaveSettings = () => {\n updateFocusDurations(focusDuration, shortBreak, longBreak);\n toast.success('Configurações salvas com sucesso!');\n };\n\n return (\n
    \n
    \n \n

    Bem-Estar & Foco

    \n
    \n\n
    \n \n \n Nível Atual\n \n \n \n
    {state.gamificationStats.nivel}
    \n

    \n {state.gamificationStats.pontos % 150} / 150 XP\n

    \n
    \n \n
    \n     \n     \n\n \n \n Pontos Totais\n \n \n \n
    {state.gamificationStats.pontos}
    \n

    XP acumulado

    \n     \n     \n\n \n \n Taxa de Adesão\n \n \n \n
    {adherenceRate}%
    \n

    \n {completedBreaks} de {totalBreaks} pausas\n

    \n     \n     \n
    \n\n
    \n \n \n \n \n Progresso Semanal\n \n \n \n
    \n \n
    \n     \n     \n\n \n \n \n \n Conquistas\n \n \n \n
    \n {AVAILABLE_BADGES.map(badge => {\n const isUnlocked = state.gamificationStats.badges.some(b => b.id === badge.id);\n return (\n \n
    \n {isUnlocked ? (\n (() => {\n const IconComp = (LucideIcons as any)[badge.icon];\n return IconComp ? : ;\n })()\n ) : (\n \n )}\n
    \n \n {isUnlocked ? badge.name : 'Bloqueado'}\n \n
    \n );\n })}\n
    \n \n \n
    \n\n \n \n \n \n Mindfulness & Relaxamento\n \n \n \n

    \n Áudios para relaxamento e foco profundo. Coloque seus arquivos MP3 nas pastas: public/audios/meditation, public/audios/lofi, public/audios/whitenoise\n

    \n\n
    \n
    \n handlePlayAudio('meditation')}\n >\n {audioPlaying === 'meditation' ? : }\n
    \n
    Meditação 3min
    \n
    +20 XP ao completar
    \n
    \n \n \n
    \n\n
    \n handlePlayAudio('lofi')}\n >\n {audioPlaying === 'lofi' ? : }\n
    \n
    Lo-fi Music
    \n
    Foco suave
    \n
    \n \n \n
    \n\n
    \n handlePlayAudio('whitenoise')}\n >\n {audioPlaying === 'whitenoise' ? : }\n
    \n
    Ruído Branco
    \n
    Concentração máxima
    \n
    \n \n \n
    \n
    \n\n     \n     \n\n \n \n \n \n Configurações de Foco\n \n \n \n
    \n
    \n \n setFocusDuration(Number(e.target.value))}\n />\n
    \n\n
    \n \n setShortBreak(Number(e.target.value))}\n />\n
    \n\n
    \n \n setLongBreak(Number(e.target.value))}\n />\n
    \n
    \n\n \n     \n     \n\n \n \n Histórico Recente\n \n \n
    \n {state.gamificationStats.historico.slice(-10).reverse().map(item => (\n \n
    \n

    {item.descricao}

    \n

    \n {new Date(item.timestamp).toLocaleString('pt-BR')}\n

    \n
    \n 0 ? 'default' : 'destructive'}>\n {item.pontos > 0 ? '+' : ''}{item.pontos} XP\n \n
    \n ))}\n {state.gamificationStats.historico.length === 0 && (\n

    \n Nenhum histórico ainda. Complete ciclos de foco para ganhar XP!\n

    \n )}\n \n     \n     \n \n );\n};\n","src/components/Wiki.tsx":"import React, { useState, useMemo } from 'react';\r\nimport { useApp, WikiArticle } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\r\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardFooter } from '@/components/ui/card';\r\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\r\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';\r\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\r\nimport { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';\r\nimport {\r\n Book,\r\n Search,\r\n Plus,\r\n FileText,\r\n Hash,\r\n Clock,\r\n Settings2,\r\n ChevronRight,\r\n Edit3,\r\n Trash2,\r\n Save,\r\n ArrowLeft,\r\n Layers,\r\n Info,\r\n CheckCircle,\r\n ShieldCheck,\r\n Lock\r\n} from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';\r\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\r\nimport ReactMarkdown from 'react-markdown';\r\nimport remarkGfm from 'remark-gfm';\r\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\r\n\r\nexport const Wiki = () => {\r\n const { state, addWikiArticle, updateWikiArticle, deleteWikiArticle } = useApp();\r\n const articles = state.wikiArticles || [];\r\n\r\n const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\r\n const [selectedArticleId, setSelectedArticleId] = useState(null);\r\n const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);\r\n const [editData, setEditData] = useState>({});\r\n\r\n const categories = useMemo(() => {\r\n const cats = Array.from(new Set(articles.map(a => a.category)));\r\n return cats.length > 0 ? cats : ['Geral', 'Processos', 'Style Guide', 'Onboarding'];\r\n }, [articles]);\r\n\r\n const filteredArticles = useMemo(() => {\r\n return articles.filter(a =>\r\n a.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\r\n a.content.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\r\n a.category.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\r\n );\r\n }, [articles, searchQuery]);\r\n\r\n const selectedArticle = useMemo(() => {\r\n return articles.find(a => a.id === selectedArticleId) || null;\r\n }, [articles, selectedArticleId]);\r\n\r\n const handleCreateNew = () => {\r\n const newArticle: Partial = {\r\n title: 'Nova Documentação',\r\n content: '# Novo Artigo\\nEscreva sua documentação aqui utilizando markdown.',\r\n category: 'Geral',\r\n tags: [],\r\n isInternal: true\r\n };\r\n setEditData(newArticle);\r\n setIsEditing(true);\r\n setSelectedArticleId(null);\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleEdit = (article: WikiArticle) => {\r\n setEditData(article);\r\n setIsEditing(true);\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleSave = () => {\r\n if (!editData.title || !editData.content) {\r\n toast.error('Título e conteúdo são obrigatórios.');\r\n return;\r\n }\r\n\r\n if (editData.id) {\r\n updateWikiArticle(editData as WikiArticle);\r\n toast.success('Documentação atualizada!');\r\n } else {\r\n addWikiArticle(editData as Omit);\r\n toast.success('Novo artigo criado!');\r\n }\r\n setIsEditing(false);\r\n setEditData({});\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleDelete = (id: string) => {\r\n if (confirm('Tem certeza que deseja excluir esta documentação?')) {\r\n deleteWikiArticle(id);\r\n toast.info('Artigo removido.');\r\n if (selectedArticleId === id) setSelectedArticleId(null);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n return (\r\n
    \r\n {/* Sidebar */}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n

    \r\n \r\n Company Wiki\r\n

    \r\n

    Base de Conhecimento

    \r\n
    \r\n\r\n
    \r\n \r\n setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n
    \r\n {categories.map(category => (\r\n
    \r\n

    \r\n \r\n {category}\r\n

    \r\n
    \r\n {filteredArticles.filter(a => a.category === category).map(article => (\r\n { setSelectedArticleId(article.id); setIsEditing(false); }}\r\n className={cn(\r\n \"w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-left text-sm transition-all duration-300\",\r\n selectedArticleId === article.id\r\n ? \"bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 scale-[1.02]\"\r\n : \"hover:bg-primary/10 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground\"\r\n )}\r\n >\r\n \r\n {article.title}\r\n \r\n ))}\r\n {filteredArticles.filter(a => a.category === category).length === 0 && (\r\n

    Nenhum artigo nesta pasta

    \r\n )}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n ))}\r\n
    \r\n     \r\n
    \r\n\r\n {/* Main Content Area */}\r\n
    \r\n {isEditing ? (\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n

    {editData.id ? 'Editar Artigo' : 'Novo Artigo'}

    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setEditData({ ...editData, title: e.target.value })}\r\n className=\"h-12 text-lg font-bold border-primary/10\"\r\n placeholder=\"Ex: Guia de Estilo Visual 2026\"\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setEditData({ ...editData, category: e.target.value })}\r\n className=\"h-12 border-primary/10\"\r\n placeholder=\"Ex: Style Guide\"\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setEditData({ ...editData, content: e.target.value })}\r\n placeholder=\"# Use Markdown para formatar seu texto...\"\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n ) : selectedArticle ? (\r\n
    \r\n {/* Article Header */}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n {selectedArticle.category}\r\n \r\n {selectedArticle.isInternal && (\r\n \r\n Interno\r\n \r\n )}\r\n
    \r\n

    {selectedArticle.title}

    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n Atualizado em {new Date(selectedArticle.lastUpdated).toLocaleDateString('pt-BR')}\r\n \r\n \r\n Revisado\r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n\r\n {/* Article Content */}\r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n {selectedArticle.content}\r\n \r\n
    \r\n     \r\n\r\n {/* Footer Info */}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n

    Status Confidencial

    \r\n

    Este documento é propriedade da empresa Intelix Dash.

    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n ) : (\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n

    Sua Base de Conhecimento

    \r\n

    \r\n Selecione um documento na barra lateral ou crie uma nova documentação para começar a estruturar o conhecimento da sua equipe.\r\n

    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n

    Processos Operacionais

    \r\n

    Crie manuais passo-a-passo para garantir qualidade no delivery.

    \r\n     \r\n \r\n \r\n

    Guias de Estilo

    \r\n

    Documente as regras de branding para o modo White-Label.

    \r\n     \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n )}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n );\r\n};\r\n","src/contexts/AppContext.tsx":"import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, ReactNode, useCallback, useMemo, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { storageService } from '@/services/storageService';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\nimport { useAuth } from './AuthContext';\n\nexport interface Project {\n id: string;\n name: string;\n color: string;\n}\n\nexport interface Note {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n userId?: string;\n title: string;\n content: string;\n isFavorite: boolean;\n accessLevel?: 'private' | 'shared';\n createdAt: string;\n updatedAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface Prompt {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n userId?: string;\n title: string;\n content: string;\n notes: string;\n tags: string[];\n isFavorite: boolean;\n accessLevel?: 'private' | 'shared';\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface Snippet {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n userId?: string;\n title: string;\n code: string;\n language: string;\n tags: string[];\n isFavorite: boolean;\n accessLevel?: 'private' | 'shared';\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface CheatsheetItem {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n title: string;\n content: string;\n category: string;\n isFavorite: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface KanbanTask {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n userId?: string;\n title: string;\n description: string;\n column: 'todo' | 'inProgress' | 'done';\n recurrence?: 'daily' | 'weekly' | 'none';\n accessLevel?: 'private' | 'shared';\n completedAt?: string;\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface Password {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n title: string;\n username: string;\n password: string;\n url: string;\n notes: string;\n}\n\nexport interface Contact {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n nomeCompleto: string;\n telefones: string[];\n emails: string[];\n empresa: string;\n cargo: string;\n tags: string[];\n notas: string;\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface ChecklistItem {\n id: string;\n texto: string;\n concluido: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface Checklist {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n titulo: string;\n itens: ChecklistItem[];\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface Bookmark {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n title: string;\n url: string;\n description: string;\n favicon?: string;\n category: string;\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface DiaryEntry {\n id: string;\n date: string;\n content: string;\n moodScore?: number | null;\n projetoId?: string;\n origem?: string;\n dataHoraRegistro?: string;\n}\n\nexport interface FinancialAccount {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n name: string;\n initialBalance: number;\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface FinancialCategory {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n name: string;\n type: 'income' | 'expense';\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface FinancialBudget {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n categoryId: string;\n limit: number;\n month: string;\n}\n\nexport interface FinancialTransaction {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n date: string;\n description: string;\n amount: number;\n type: 'income' | 'expense';\n categoryId: string;\n accountId: string;\n recurrence: 'never' | 'monthly' | 'yearly';\n lastRecurrence?: string;\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface PomodoroStats {\n focusSessions: number;\n totalMinutes: number;\n}\n\nexport interface WellnessBreakRecord {\n id: string;\n dataHora: string;\n tipoCiclo: 'short' | 'long';\n adesaoStatus: 'Concluida' | 'Pulada';\n duracaoPausa: number;\n}\n\nexport interface WellnessStats {\n breaks: WellnessBreakRecord[];\n}\n\nexport interface Badge {\n id: string;\n name: string;\n description: string;\n icon: string;\n unlockedAt?: string;\n}\n\nexport interface AppNotification {\n id: string;\n title: string;\n message: string;\n type: 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'achievement';\n read: boolean;\n createdAt: string;\n link?: string;\n}\n\nexport interface GamificationStats {\n pontos: number;\n nivel: number;\n historico: Array<{\n id: string;\n tipo: string;\n pontos: number;\n descricao: string;\n timestamp: string;\n }>;\n badges: Badge[];\n focusDuration: number;\n shortBreakDuration: number;\n longBreakDuration: number;\n}\n\nexport interface WikiArticle {\n id: string;\n title: string;\n content: string;\n category: string;\n tags: string[];\n lastUpdated: string;\n projectId?: string;\n isInternal: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface Asset {\n id: string;\n name: string;\n type: string;\n size: number;\n url: string; // Blob URL for preview\n category: 'image' | 'document' | 'other';\n projectId?: string;\n createdAt: string;\n blob?: Blob; // For persistence in IndexedDB\n}\n\nexport interface ActivityLog {\n id: string;\n userId: string;\n userName: string;\n action: string;\n entityType: string;\n entityId?: string;\n details: string;\n timestamp: string;\n severity: 'info' | 'warning' | 'critical';\n ipAddress?: string;\n}\n\nexport interface Integration {\n id: string;\n provider: string;\n name: string;\n description: string;\n icon: string;\n status: 'connected' | 'disconnected' | 'pending' | 'error';\n category: 'dev' | 'comm' | 'productivity' | 'cloud' | 'ai';\n lastSync?: string;\n config?: Record;\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface BillingInfo {\n companyName: string;\n address: string;\n taxId: string;\n logoUrl: string;\n email: string;\n phone: string;\n}\n\nexport interface ServiceCatalogItem {\n id: string;\n description: string;\n unitPrice: number;\n useIdealHourlyRate?: boolean;\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface BudgetItem {\n id: string;\n description: string;\n quantity: number;\n unitPrice: number;\n total: number;\n}\n\nexport interface Budget {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n clientId: string;\n items: BudgetItem[];\n subtotal: number;\n discount: number;\n total: number;\n terms: string;\n status: 'draft' | 'sent' | 'approved';\n createdAt: string;\n updatedAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface PricingData {\n fixedCosts: number;\n desiredSalary: number;\n taxesPercent: number;\n hoursPerDay: number;\n daysPerMonth: number;\n idealHourlyRate: number;\n}\n\nexport interface StockMaterial {\n id: string;\n nomeMaterial: string;\n qtdEmbalagem: number;\n unidadeEmbalagem: string;\n precoPago: number;\n custoUnitario: number;\n createdAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface TechSheetItem {\n id: string;\n materialId: string;\n materialName: string;\n quantidadeUsada: number;\n unidade: string;\n custoUnitario: number;\n custoTotalItem: number;\n}\n\nexport interface TechSheet {\n id: string;\n projectId: string;\n nomeProduto: string;\n rendimento: string;\n itens: TechSheetItem[];\n custoTotalProduto: number;\n custoPorUnidade: number;\n createdAt: string;\n updatedAt: string;\n}\n\nexport interface AppState {\n projects: Project[];\n notes: Note[];\n prompts: Prompt[];\n snippets: Snippet[];\n cheatsheet: CheatsheetItem[];\n kanban: KanbanTask[];\n passwords: Password[];\n bookmarks: Bookmark[];\n diary: DiaryEntry[];\n draft: string;\n pomodoroStats: PomodoroStats;\n wellnessStats: WellnessStats;\n gamificationStats: GamificationStats;\n noteTemplates: string[];\n taskTemplates: Omit[];\n encryptedPasswords?: string;\n financialAccounts: FinancialAccount[];\n financialCategories: FinancialCategory[];\n financialBudgets: FinancialBudget[];\n financialTransactions: FinancialTransaction[];\n encryptedFinancial?: string;\n contacts: Contact[];\n contactTags: string[];\n encryptedContacts?: string;\n checklists: Checklist[];\n encryptedChecklists?: string;\n musicPlayerVolume: number;\n musicPlayerShuffle: boolean;\n musicPlayerRepeat: boolean;\n billingInfo: BillingInfo;\n serviceCatalog: ServiceCatalogItem[];\n budgets: Budget[];\n encryptedBudgets?: string;\n pricingData: PricingData;\n encryptedPricingData?: string;\n stockMaterials: StockMaterial[];\n encryptedStock?: string;\n techSheets: TechSheet[];\n encryptedTechSheets?: string;\n enabledModules: string[];\n notifications: AppNotification[];\n integrations: Integration[];\n wikiArticles: WikiArticle[];\n assets: Asset[];\n activityLogs: ActivityLog[];\n}\n\ninterface AppContextType {\n state: AppState;\n currentProject: string;\n setCurrentProject: (id: string) => void;\n currentTab: string;\n setCurrentTab: (tab: string) => void;\n theme: 'light' | 'dark';\n toggleTheme: () => void;\n addProject: (project: Omit) => void;\n updateProject: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteProject: (id: string) => void;\n addNote: (note: Omit) => void;\n updateNote: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteNote: (id: string) => void;\n addPrompt: (prompt: Omit) => void;\n updatePrompt: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deletePrompt: (id: string) => void;\n addSnippet: (snippet: Omit) => void;\n updateSnippet: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteSnippet: (id: string) => void;\n addCheatsheetItem: (item: Omit) => void;\n updateCheatsheetItem: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteCheatsheetItem: (id: string) => void;\n addKanbanTask: (task: Omit) => void;\n updateKanbanTask: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteKanbanTask: (id: string) => void;\n addPassword: (password: Omit) => void;\n updatePassword: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deletePassword: (id: string) => void;\n addBookmark: (bookmark: Omit) => void;\n updateBookmark: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteBookmark: (id: string) => void;\n addDiaryEntry: (entry: Omit) => void;\n updateDiaryEntry: (date: string, content: string, moodScore?: number | null, projetoId?: string) => void;\n updateDraft: (content: string) => void;\n updatePomodoroStats: (stats: Partial) => void;\n addWellnessBreak: (breakRecord: Omit) => void;\n addGamificationPoints: (pontos: number, tipo: string, descricao: string) => void;\n unlockBadge: (badgeId: string) => void;\n updateFocusDurations: (focus: number, shortBreak: number, longBreak: number) => void;\n searchQuery: string;\n setSearchQuery: (query: string) => void;\n addFinancialAccount: (account: Omit) => void;\n updateFinancialAccount: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteFinancialAccount: (id: string) => void;\n addFinancialCategory: (category: Omit) => void;\n updateFinancialCategory: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteFinancialCategory: (id: string) => void;\n addFinancialBudget: (budget: Omit) => void;\n updateFinancialBudget: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteFinancialBudget: (id: string) => void;\n addFinancialTransaction: (transaction: Omit) => void;\n updateFinancialTransaction: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteFinancialTransaction: (id: string) => void;\n setMusicPlayerVolume: (volume: number) => void;\n setMusicPlayerShuffle: (shuffle: boolean) => void;\n setMusicPlayerRepeat: (repeat: boolean) => void;\n addContact: (contact: Omit) => void;\n updateContact: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteContact: (id: string) => void;\n addContactTag: (tag: string) => void;\n deleteContactTag: (tag: string) => void;\n addChecklist: (checklist: Omit) => void;\n updateChecklist: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteChecklist: (id: string) => void;\n addChecklistItem: (checklistId: string, item: Omit) => void;\n updateChecklistItem: (checklistId: string, itemId: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteChecklistItem: (checklistId: string, itemId: string) => void;\n updateBillingInfo: (info: Partial) => void;\n addServiceCatalogItem: (item: Omit) => void;\n updateServiceCatalogItem: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteServiceCatalogItem: (id: string) => void;\n addBudget: (budget: Omit) => void;\n updateBudget: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteBudget: (id: string) => void;\n updatePricingData: (data: PricingData) => void;\n addStockMaterial: (material: Omit) => void;\n updateStockMaterial: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteStockMaterial: (id: string) => void;\n addTechSheet: (sheet: Omit) => void;\n updateTechSheet: (id: string, updates: Partial) => void;\n deleteTechSheet: (id: string) => void;\n toggleModule: (moduleId: string) => void;\n addNotification: (notification: Omit) => void;\n markNotificationAsRead: (id: string) => void;\n markAllNotificationsAsRead: () => void;\n deleteNotification: (id: string) => void;\n toggleIntegration: (id: string) => void;\n updateIntegrationConfig: (id: string, config: Record) => void;\n addWikiArticle: (article: Omit) => void;\n updateWikiArticle: (article: WikiArticle) => void;\n deleteWikiArticle: (id: string) => void;\n addAsset: (asset: Omit) => void;\n deleteAsset: (id: string) => void;\n addActivityLog: (log: Omit) => void;\n isCommandPaletteOpen: boolean;\n setIsCommandPaletteOpen: (open: boolean) => void;\n}\n\nconst AppContext = createContext(undefined);\n\nexport const AVAILABLE_BADGES: Badge[] = [\n { id: 'foco10', name: 'Focado', description: 'Completou 10 ciclos de foco', icon: 'Target' },\n { id: 'foco25', name: 'Concentrado', description: 'Completou 25 ciclos de foco', icon: 'Brain' },\n { id: 'foco50', name: 'Mestre do Foco', description: 'Completou 50 ciclos de foco', icon: 'Trophy' },\n { id: 'pausa10', name: 'Cuidadoso', description: 'Completou 10 pausas ativas', icon: 'Heart' },\n { id: 'pausa25', name: 'Bem-Estar', description: 'Completou 25 pausas ativas', icon: 'Smile' },\n { id: 'streak7', name: 'Consistente', description: '7 dias consecutivos com ciclos', icon: 'Zap' },\n { id: 'meditacao5', name: 'Zen', description: 'Completou 5 meditações', icon: 'Flower' },\n { id: 'nivel5', name: 'Evoluído', description: 'Alcançou nível 5', icon: 'Star' },\n { id: 'notes10', name: 'Escritor', description: 'Criou suas primeiras 10 notas', icon: 'FileText' },\n { id: 'tasks20', name: 'Executor', description: 'Concluiu 20 tarefas no Kanban', icon: 'Package' },\n { id: 'prompts5', name: 'Engenheiro de IA', description: 'Salvou 5 prompts úteis', icon: 'Lightbulb' },\n { id: 'snippets5', name: 'Dev Pro', description: 'Guardou 5 trechos de código', icon: 'Code' },\n { id: 'budget1', name: 'Economista', description: 'Criou seu primeiro orçamento', icon: 'DollarSign' },\n { id: 'diary5', name: 'Reflexivo', description: 'Escreveu 5 entradas no diário', icon: 'Book' },\n];\n\nconst initialState: AppState = {\n projects: [{ id: 'default', name: 'Projeto Padrão', color: '#dc3545' }],\n notes: [],\n prompts: [],\n snippets: [],\n cheatsheet: [],\n kanban: [],\n passwords: [],\n bookmarks: [],\n diary: [],\n draft: '',\n pomodoroStats: { focusSessions: 0, totalMinutes: 0 },\n wellnessStats: { breaks: [] },\n gamificationStats: {\n pontos: 0,\n nivel: 1,\n historico: [],\n badges: [],\n focusDuration: 25,\n shortBreakDuration: 5,\n longBreakDuration: 15,\n },\n noteTemplates: [],\n taskTemplates: [],\n financialAccounts: [],\n financialCategories: [],\n financialBudgets: [],\n financialTransactions: [],\n contacts: [],\n contactTags: [],\n checklists: [],\n musicPlayerVolume: 0.7,\n musicPlayerShuffle: false,\n musicPlayerRepeat: false,\n billingInfo: {\n companyName: '',\n address: '',\n taxId: '',\n logoUrl: '',\n email: '',\n phone: '',\n },\n serviceCatalog: [],\n budgets: [],\n pricingData: {\n fixedCosts: 0,\n desiredSalary: 0,\n taxesPercent: 0,\n hoursPerDay: 8,\n daysPerMonth: 22,\n idealHourlyRate: 0,\n },\n stockMaterials: [],\n techSheets: [],\n enabledModules: ['dashboard', 'explorer', 'tutorial', 'wellness', 'musica', 'videos', 'favorites', 'notes', 'prompts', 'snippets', 'cheatsheet', 'kanban', 'checklists', 'passwords', 'contacts', 'orcamentos', 'precificador', 'estoque', 'fichatecnica', 'finance', 'diary', 'draft', 'settings', 'profile', 'billing', 'integrations', 'analytics', 'wiki', 'assets', 'activity'],\n notifications: [],\n integrations: [\n { id: 'github', provider: 'github', name: 'GitHub', description: 'Sincronize seus repositórios e gerencie issues diretamente do dashboard.', icon: 'Github', status: 'disconnected', category: 'dev', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },\n { id: 'slack', provider: 'slack', name: 'Slack', description: 'Receba notificações e envie atualizações para seus canais de equipe.', icon: 'Slack', status: 'disconnected', category: 'comm', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },\n { id: 'discord', provider: 'discord', name: 'Discord', description: 'Integração com webhooks e bots para monitoramento em tempo real.', icon: 'MessageSquare', status: 'disconnected', category: 'comm', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },\n { id: 'gcalendar', provider: 'google', name: 'Google Calendar', description: 'Visualize seus compromissos e prazos integrados ao seu Kanban.', icon: 'Calendar', status: 'disconnected', category: 'productivity', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },\n { id: 'openai', provider: 'openai', name: 'OpenAI (GPT-4)', description: 'Poder de IA para seus prompts, notas e geração automática de código.', icon: 'Zap', status: 'disconnected', category: 'ai', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },\n ],\n wikiArticles: [],\n assets: [],\n activityLogs: [],\n};\n\nexport const AppProvider = ({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) => {\n const [state, setState] = useState(initialState);\n const [currentProject, setCurrentProjectState] = useState('default');\n const [currentTab, setCurrentTab] = useState('dashboard');\n const [theme, setTheme] = useState<'light' | 'dark'>('dark');\n const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n const [isCommandPaletteOpen, setIsCommandPaletteOpenState] = useState(false);\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);\n const { user } = useAuth();\n\n // Ref to track previous state for incremental diff\n const prevStateRef = useRef(null);\n\n // ── Async Load from IndexedDB + Settings Store ──────────────────────────\n useEffect(() => {\n storageService.loadAll()\n .then((loaded) => {\n // Ensure new modules like 'videos' are added to the list for existing users\n const stateWithVideos = { ...loaded.state };\n if (stateWithVideos.enabledModules && !stateWithVideos.enabledModules.includes('videos')) {\n stateWithVideos.enabledModules = [...stateWithVideos.enabledModules, 'videos'];\n }\n\n if (stateWithVideos.notifications && stateWithVideos.notifications.length === 0) {\n stateWithVideos.notifications = [{\n id: 'welcome',\n title: 'Bem-vindo ao Pure Dev!',\n message: 'Seu Notification Hub está ativo. Aqui você receberá alertas de conquistas, lembretes de bem-estar e atualizações de sistema.',\n type: 'info',\n read: false,\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString()\n }];\n }\n\n setState(stateWithVideos);\n setCurrentProjectState(loaded.currentProject);\n const loadedTheme = (loaded.theme === 'light' ? 'light' : 'dark') as 'light' | 'dark';\n setTheme(loadedTheme);\n document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', loadedTheme === 'dark');\n prevStateRef.current = stateWithVideos;\n setIsLoading(false);\n })\n .catch((err) => {\n console.error('[AppContext] Failed to load state:', err);\n setIsLoading(false);\n });\n }, []);\n\n // ── Plan Management ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n useEffect(() => {\n if (user?.plan) {\n storageService.setPlan(user.plan);\n }\n }, [user?.plan]);\n\n // ── Real-time Sync between Tabs ─────────────────────────────────────────\n useEffect(() => {\n storageService.onRemoteUpdate(() => {\n console.log('[AppContext] Remote update detected, reloading state...');\n storageService.loadAll().then((loaded) => {\n // Only update if state has actually changed or the user is not currently interacting\n // To keep it simple and 'Elite', we refresh everything.\n setState(loaded.state);\n setCurrentProjectState(loaded.currentProject);\n\n const newTheme = loaded.theme === 'light' ? 'light' : 'dark';\n if (newTheme !== theme) {\n setTheme(newTheme);\n document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', newTheme === 'dark');\n }\n\n prevStateRef.current = loaded.state;\n });\n });\n }, [theme]);\n\n // ── Smart Incremental Save (diff by reference) ─────────────────────────\n useEffect(() => {\n if (isLoading) return;\n const prev = prevStateRef.current;\n if (!prev) {\n prevStateRef.current = state;\n return;\n }\n\n // Delegate diffing + debounced writes to storageService\n storageService.diffAndPersist(prev, state);\n prevStateRef.current = state;\n }, [state, isLoading]);\n\n // ── Achievement Tracker ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\n useEffect(() => {\n if (isLoading) return;\n\n const checkAchievements = () => {\n // Pomodoro & Focus\n if (state.pomodoroStats.focusSessions >= 10) unlockBadge('foco10');\n if (state.pomodoroStats.focusSessions >= 25) unlockBadge('foco25');\n if (state.pomodoroStats.focusSessions >= 50) unlockBadge('foco50');\n\n // Wellness\n if (state.wellnessStats.breaks.length >= 10) unlockBadge('pausa10');\n if (state.wellnessStats.breaks.length >= 25) unlockBadge('pausa25');\n\n // Productivity\n if (state.notes.length >= 10) unlockBadge('notes10');\n if (state.kanban.filter(t => t.column === 'done').length >= 20) unlockBadge('tasks20');\n\n // Knowledge\n if (state.prompts.length >= 5) unlockBadge('prompts5');\n if (state.snippets.length >= 5) unlockBadge('snippets5');\n\n // System\n if (state.gamificationStats.nivel >= 5) unlockBadge('nivel5');\n if (state.diary.length >= 5) unlockBadge('diary5');\n if (state.budgets.length >= 1) unlockBadge('budget1');\n };\n\n const timer = setTimeout(checkAchievements, 2000); // Check shortly after state changes\n return () => clearTimeout(timer);\n }, [\n state.notes.length,\n state.kanban.length,\n state.pomodoroStats.focusSessions,\n state.wellnessStats.breaks.length,\n state.prompts.length,\n state.snippets.length,\n state.diary.length,\n state.budgets.length,\n state.gamificationStats.nivel,\n isLoading\n ]);\n\n // ── Persist currentProject changes ──────────────────────────────────────\n const setCurrentProject = useCallback((id: string) => {\n setCurrentProjectState(id);\n storageService.queueSettingsWrite({ currentProject: id });\n }, []);\n\n // ── Check for recurring tasks ───────────────────────────────────────────\n useEffect(() => {\n if (isLoading) return;\n\n const checkRecurringTasks = async () => {\n const today = new Date().toDateString();\n const settings = await storageService.getSettings(['lastRecurringCheck']);\n\n if (settings.lastRecurringCheck === today) return;\n\n const updatedTasks = [...state.kanban];\n let hasChanges = false;\n\n state.kanban.forEach(task => {\n if (task.column === 'done' && task.recurrence && task.recurrence !== 'none' && task.completedAt) {\n const completedDate = new Date(task.completedAt);\n const now = new Date();\n\n let shouldRecreate = false;\n if (task.recurrence === 'daily') {\n shouldRecreate = now.getDate() !== completedDate.getDate();\n } else if (task.recurrence === 'weekly') {\n const daysDiff = Math.floor((now.getTime() - completedDate.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));\n shouldRecreate = daysDiff >= 7;\n }\n\n if (shouldRecreate) {\n updatedTasks.push({\n ...task,\n id: `${task.id}-${Date.now()}`,\n column: 'todo',\n completedAt: undefined,\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n });\n hasChanges = true;\n }\n }\n });\n\n if (hasChanges) {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, kanban: updatedTasks }));\n }\n\n storageService.queueSettingsWrite({ lastRecurringCheck: today });\n };\n\n checkRecurringTasks();\n }, [isLoading]);\n\n // ── Check for recurring financial transactions ──────────────────────────\n useEffect(() => {\n if (isLoading) return;\n\n const checkRecurringTransactions = async () => {\n const today = new Date().toDateString();\n const settings = await storageService.getSettings(['lastFinancialRecurringCheck']);\n\n if (settings.lastFinancialRecurringCheck === today) return;\n\n const updatedTransactions = [...(state.financialTransactions || [])];\n let hasChanges = false;\n\n (state.financialTransactions || []).forEach(transaction => {\n if (transaction.recurrence !== 'never' && transaction.lastRecurrence) {\n const lastDate = new Date(transaction.lastRecurrence);\n const now = new Date();\n\n let shouldRecreate = false;\n if (transaction.recurrence === 'monthly') {\n const monthsDiff = (now.getFullYear() - lastDate.getFullYear()) * 12 +\n (now.getMonth() - lastDate.getMonth());\n shouldRecreate = monthsDiff >= 1;\n } else if (transaction.recurrence === 'yearly') {\n const yearsDiff = now.getFullYear() - lastDate.getFullYear();\n shouldRecreate = yearsDiff >= 1;\n }\n\n if (shouldRecreate) {\n updatedTransactions.push({\n ...transaction,\n id: `${transaction.id}-${Date.now()}`,\n date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],\n lastRecurrence: new Date().toISOString(),\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n });\n hasChanges = true;\n }\n }\n });\n\n if (hasChanges) {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, financialTransactions: updatedTransactions }));\n }\n\n storageService.queueSettingsWrite({ lastFinancialRecurringCheck: today });\n };\n\n checkRecurringTransactions();\n }, [isLoading]);\n\n // ── Theme toggle ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n const toggleTheme = () => {\n const newTheme = theme === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light';\n setTheme(newTheme);\n document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark');\n storageService.queueSettingsWrite({ theme: newTheme });\n };\n\n // ── CRUD Operations (all unchanged, same API) ──────────────────────────\n\n const addProject = (project: Omit) => {\n const newProject = { ...project, id: Date.now().toString() };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, projects: [...prev.projects, newProject] }));\n };\n\n const updateProject = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n projects: prev.projects.map(p => p.id === id ? { ...p, ...updates } : p),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteProject = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n projects: prev.projects.filter(p => p.id !== id),\n }));\n };\n\n const addNote = (note: Omit) => {\n const newNote: Note = {\n ...note,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, notes: [...prev.notes, newNote] }));\n };\n\n const updateNote = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n notes: prev.notes.map(n =>\n n.id === id ? { ...n, ...updates, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } : n\n ),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteNote = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, notes: prev.notes.filter(n => n.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const addPrompt = (prompt: Omit) => {\n const newPrompt: Prompt = {\n ...prompt,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, prompts: [...prev.prompts, newPrompt] }));\n };\n\n const updatePrompt = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n prompts: prev.prompts.map(p => p.id === id ? { ...p, ...updates } : p),\n }));\n };\n\n const deletePrompt = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, prompts: prev.prompts.filter(p => p.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const addSnippet = (snippet: Omit) => {\n const newSnippet: Snippet = {\n ...snippet,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, snippets: [...prev.snippets, newSnippet] }));\n };\n\n const updateSnippet = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n snippets: prev.snippets.map(s => s.id === id ? { ...s, ...updates } : s),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteSnippet = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, snippets: prev.snippets.filter(s => s.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const addCheatsheetItem = (item: Omit) => {\n const newItem: CheatsheetItem = { ...item, id: Date.now().toString() };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, cheatsheet: [...prev.cheatsheet, newItem] }));\n };\n\n const updateCheatsheetItem = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n cheatsheet: prev.cheatsheet.map(item => item.id === id ? { ...item, ...updates } : item),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteCheatsheetItem = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, cheatsheet: prev.cheatsheet.filter(item => item.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const addKanbanTask = (task: Omit) => {\n const newTask: KanbanTask = {\n ...task,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, kanban: [...prev.kanban, newTask] }));\n };\n\n const updateKanbanTask = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n kanban: prev.kanban.map(task => task.id === id ? { ...task, ...updates } : task),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteKanbanTask = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, kanban: prev.kanban.filter(task => task.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const addPassword = (password: Omit) => {\n const newPassword: Password = { ...password, id: Date.now().toString() };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, passwords: [...prev.passwords, newPassword] }));\n };\n\n const updatePassword = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n passwords: prev.passwords.map(p => p.id === id ? { ...p, ...updates } : p),\n }));\n };\n\n const deletePassword = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, passwords: prev.passwords.filter(p => p.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const addBookmark = (bookmark: Omit) => {\n const newBookmark: Bookmark = {\n ...bookmark,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, bookmarks: [...prev.bookmarks, newBookmark] }));\n };\n\n const updateBookmark = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n bookmarks: prev.bookmarks.map(b => b.id === id ? { ...b, ...updates } : b),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteBookmark = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, bookmarks: prev.bookmarks.filter(b => b.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const addDiaryEntry = (entry: Omit) => {\n const newEntry: DiaryEntry = { ...entry, id: Date.now().toString() };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, diary: [...prev.diary, newEntry] }));\n };\n\n const updateDiaryEntry = (date: string, content: string, moodScore?: number | null, projetoId?: string) => {\n setState(prev => {\n const existing = prev.diary.find(e => e.date === date);\n const dataHoraRegistro = new Date().toISOString();\n\n if (existing) {\n return {\n ...prev,\n diary: prev.diary.map(e =>\n e.date === date\n ? {\n ...e,\n content,\n moodScore,\n projetoId,\n origem: 'Diario',\n dataHoraRegistro\n }\n : e\n ),\n };\n }\n return {\n ...prev,\n diary: [...prev.diary, {\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n date,\n content,\n moodScore,\n projetoId,\n origem: 'Diario',\n dataHoraRegistro\n }],\n };\n });\n };\n\n const updateDraft = (content: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, draft: content }));\n };\n\n const updatePomodoroStats = (stats: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n pomodoroStats: { ...prev.pomodoroStats, ...stats },\n }));\n };\n\n const addWellnessBreak = (breakRecord: Omit) => {\n const newBreak: WellnessBreakRecord = {\n ...breakRecord,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n };\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n wellnessStats: {\n ...prev.wellnessStats,\n breaks: [...prev.wellnessStats.breaks, newBreak],\n },\n }));\n };\n\n const addGamificationPoints = (pontos: number, tipo: string, descricao: string) => {\n setState(prev => {\n const novoHistorico = {\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n tipo,\n pontos,\n descricao,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n };\n\n const novosPontos = prev.gamificationStats.pontos + pontos;\n const novoNivel = Math.floor(novosPontos / 150) + 1;\n\n return {\n ...prev,\n gamificationStats: {\n ...prev.gamificationStats,\n pontos: novosPontos,\n nivel: novoNivel,\n historico: [...prev.gamificationStats.historico, novoHistorico],\n },\n };\n });\n };\n\n const unlockBadge = (badgeId: string) => {\n setState(prev => {\n const badge = AVAILABLE_BADGES.find(b => b.id === badgeId);\n if (!badge || prev.gamificationStats.badges.some(b => b.id === badgeId)) {\n return prev;\n }\n\n toast.success(`Conquista desbloqueada: ${badge.name}`, {\n description: badge.description,\n position: 'top-center'\n });\n\n addNotification({\n title: 'Nova Conquista!',\n message: `Você desbloqueou o selo: ${badge.name}. ${badge.description}`,\n type: 'achievement'\n });\n\n return {\n ...prev,\n gamificationStats: {\n ...prev.gamificationStats,\n badges: [...prev.gamificationStats.badges, { ...badge, unlockedAt: new Date().toISOString() }],\n },\n };\n });\n };\n\n const updateFocusDurations = (focus: number, shortBreak: number, longBreak: number) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n gamificationStats: {\n ...prev.gamificationStats,\n focusDuration: focus,\n shortBreakDuration: shortBreak,\n longBreakDuration: longBreak,\n },\n }));\n };\n\n const addFinancialAccount = (account: Omit) => {\n const newAccount: FinancialAccount = {\n ...account,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, financialAccounts: [...prev.financialAccounts, newAccount] }));\n };\n\n const updateFinancialAccount = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n financialAccounts: prev.financialAccounts.map(a => a.id === id ? { ...a, ...updates } : a),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteFinancialAccount = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, financialAccounts: prev.financialAccounts.filter(a => a.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const addFinancialCategory = (category: Omit) => {\n const newCategory: FinancialCategory = {\n ...category,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, financialCategories: [...prev.financialCategories, newCategory] }));\n };\n\n const updateFinancialCategory = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n financialCategories: prev.financialCategories.map(c => c.id === id ? { ...c, ...updates } : c),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteFinancialCategory = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, financialCategories: prev.financialCategories.filter(c => c.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const addFinancialBudget = (budget: Omit) => {\n const newBudget: FinancialBudget = { ...budget, id: Date.now().toString() };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, financialBudgets: [...prev.financialBudgets, newBudget] }));\n };\n\n const updateFinancialBudget = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n financialBudgets: prev.financialBudgets.map(b => b.id === id ? { ...b, ...updates } : b),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteFinancialBudget = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, financialBudgets: prev.financialBudgets.filter(b => b.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const addFinancialTransaction = (transaction: Omit) => {\n const newTransaction: [...prev.financialTransactions, newTransaction] }));\n };\n\n const updateFinancialTransaction = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n financialTransactions: prev.financialTransactions.filter(t => t.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const setMusicPlayerVolume = (volume: number) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, musicPlayerVolume: volume }));\n };\n\n const setMusicPlayerShuffle = (shuffle: boolean) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, musicPlayerShuffle: shuffle }));\n };\n\n const setMusicPlayerRepeat = (repeat: boolean) => {\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, musicPlayerRepeat: repeat }));\n };\n\n const addContact = (contact: Omit) => {\n const newContact: Contact = {\n ...contact,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: new prev.contacts.filter(c => c.id !== id) }));\n };\n\n const addContactTag = (tag: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n contactTags: [...prev.contactTags, tag],\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteContactTag = (tag: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n contactTags: prev.contactTags.filter(t => t !== tag),\n }));\n };\n\n const addChecklist = (checklist: Omit) => {\n const newChecklist: Checklist = {\n ...checklist,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n };\n setState(prev => ({ ...prev, checklists: [...prev.checklists, newChecklist] }));\n };\n\n const updateChecklist = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n checklists: prev.checklists.map(c => c.id === id ? { ...c, ...updates } : c),\n }));\n updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n budgets: prev.budgets.map(budget =>\n budget.id === id ? { ...budget, ...updates, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } : budget\n ),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteBudget = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n budgets: prev.budgets.filter(budget => budget.id !== id),\n }));\n };\n\n const updatePricingData = (data: PricingData) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n pricingData: data,\n }));\n };\n\n const addStockMaterial = (material: Omit) => {\n const custoUnitario = material.precoPago / material.qtdEmbalagem;\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n stockMaterials: [...prev.stockMaterials, {\n ...material,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n custoUnitario,\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n }],\n }));\n };\n\n const updateStockMaterial = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n stockMaterials: prev.stockMaterials.map(material => {\n if (material.id === id) {\n const updated = { ...material, ...updates };\n if (updates.precoPago !== undefined || updates.qtdEmbalagem !== undefined) {\n updated.custoUnitario = updated.precoPago / updated.qtdEmbalagem;\n }\n return updated;\n }\n return material;\n }),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteStockMaterial = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n stockMaterials: prev.stockMaterials.filter(material => material.id !== id),\n }));\n };\n\n const addTechSheet = (sheet: Omit) => {\n const now = new Date().toISOString();\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n techSheets: [...prev.techSheets, {\n ...sheet,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: now,\n updatedAt: now,\n }],\n }));\n };\n\n const updateTechSheet = (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n techSheets: prev.techSheets.map(sheet =>\n sheet.id === id ? { ...sheet, ...updates, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() } : sheet\n ),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteTechSheet = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n techSheets: prev.techSheets.filter(sheet => sheet.id !== id),\n }));\n };\n\n const toggleModule = (moduleId: string) => {\n setState(prev => {\n const isEnabled = prev.enabledModules.includes(moduleId);\n return {\n ...prev,\n enabledModules: isEnabled\n ? prev.enabledModules.filter(id => id !== moduleId)\n : [...prev.enabledModules, moduleId],\n };\n });\n };\n\n const addNotification = (notification: Omit) => {\n const newNotification: AppNotification = {\n ...notification,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n read: false,\n };\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n notifications: [newNotification, ...prev.notifications].slice(0, 50),\n }));\n };\n\n const markNotificationAsRead = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n notifications: prev.notifications.map(n => n.id === id ? { ...n, read: true } : n),\n }));\n };\n\n const markAllNotificationsAsRead = () => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n notifications: prev.notifications.map(n => ({ ...n, read: true })),\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteNotification = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n notifications: prev.notifications.filter(n => n.id !== id),\n }));\n };\n\n const toggleIntegration = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n integrations: prev.integrations.map(i => {\n if (i.id === id) {\n const newStatus = i.status === 'connected' ? 'disconnected' : 'connected';\n if (newStatus === 'connected') {\n addNotification({\n title: 'Integração Ativada',\n message: `A integração com ${i.name} foi estabelecida com sucesso!`,\n type: 'success'\n });\n }\n return { ...i, status: newStatus as any, lastSync: newStatus === 'connected' ? new Date().toISOString() : i.lastSync };\n }\n return i;\n }),\n }));\n };\n\n const updateIntegrationConfig = (id: string, config: Record) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n integrations: prev.integrations.map(i => i.id === id ? { ...i, config } : i),\n }));\n };\n\n const addWikiArticle = (article: Omit) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n wikiArticles: [...prev.wikiArticles, {\n ...article,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString()\n }]\n }));\n };\n\n const updateWikiArticle = (article: WikiArticle) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n wikiArticles: prev.wikiArticles.map(a => a.id === article.id ? { ...article, lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString() } : a)\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteWikiArticle = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n wikiArticles: prev.wikiArticles.filter(a => a.id !== id)\n }));\n };\n\n const addAsset = (asset: Omit) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n assets: [...prev.assets, {\n ...asset,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n createdAt: new Date().toISOString()\n }]\n }));\n };\n\n const deleteAsset = (id: string) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n assets: prev.assets.filter(a => a.id !== id)\n }));\n };\n\n const addActivityLog = (log: Omit) => {\n setState(prev => ({\n ...prev,\n activityLogs: [\n {\n ...log,\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n userId: user?.id || 'system',\n userName: user?.name || 'Sistema'\n },\n ...prev.activityLogs\n ].slice(0, 500) // Keep last 500 logs\n }));\n };\n\n // ── Memoized Context Value ──────────────────────────────────────────────\n const contextValue = useMemo(() => ({\n state,\n currentProject,\n setCurrentProject,\n currentTab,\n setCurrentTab,\n theme,\n toggleTheme,\n addProject,\n updateProject,\n deleteProject,\n addNote,\n updateNote,\n deleteNote,\n addPrompt,\n updatePrompt,\n deletePrompt,\n addSnippet,\n updateSnippet,\n deleteSnippet,\n addCheatsheetItem,\n updateCheatsheetItem,\n deleteCheatsheetItem,\n addKanbanTask,\n updateKanbanTask,\n deleteKanbanTask,\n addPassword,\n updatePassword,\n deletePassword,\n addBookmark,\n updateBookmark,\n deleteBookmark,\n addDiaryEntry,\n updateDiaryEntry,\n updateDraft,\n updatePomodoroStats,\n addWellnessBreak,\n addGamificationPoints,\n unlockBadge,\n updateFocusDurations,\n searchQuery,\n setSearchQuery,\n addFinancialAccount,\n updateFinancialAccount,\n deleteFinancialAccount,\n addFinancialCategory,\n updateFinancialCategory,\n deleteFinancialCategory,\n addFinancialBudget,\n updateFinancialBudget,\n deleteFinancialBudget,\n addFinancialTransaction,\n updateFinancialTransaction,\n deleteFinancialTransaction,\n setMusicPlayerVolume,\n setMusicPlayerShuffle,\n setMusicPlayerRepeat,\n addContact,\n updateContact,\n deleteContact,\n addContactTag,\n deleteContactTag,\n addChecklist,\n updateChecklist,\n deleteChecklist,\n addChecklistItem,\n updateChecklistItem,\n deleteChecklistItem,\n updateBillingInfo,\n addServiceCatalogItem,\n updateServiceCatalogItem,\n deleteServiceCatalogItem,\n addBudget,\n updateBudget,\n deleteBudget,\n updatePricingData,\n addStockMaterial,\n updateStockMaterial,\n deleteStockMaterial,\n addTechSheet,\n updateTechSheet,\n deleteTechSheet,\n toggleModule,\n toggleIntegration,\n updateIntegrationConfig,\n addWikiArticle,\n updateWikiArticle,\n deleteWikiArticle,\n addAsset,\n deleteAsset,\n addActivityLog,\n addNotification,\n markNotificationAsRead,\n markAllNotificationsAsRead,\n deleteNotification,\n isCommandPaletteOpen,\n setIsCommandPaletteOpen: setIsCommandPaletteOpenState,\n }), [state, currentProject, currentTab, theme, searchQuery, isCommandPaletteOpen]);\n\n // ── Loading State ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n if (isLoading) {\n return (\n
    \n
    Carregando dados...
    \n
    \n );\n }\n\n return (\n \n {children}\n \n );\n};\n\nexport const useApp = () => {\n const context = useContext(AppContext);\n if (!context) throw new Error('useApp must be used within AppProvider');\n return context;\n};\n","src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx":"import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, ReactNode } from 'react';\r\nimport { db } from '@/services/db';\r\n\r\ninterface User {\r\n id: string;\r\n email: string;\r\n name?: string | null;\r\n avatar_url?: string | null;\r\n bio?: string | null;\r\n role: 'user' | 'admin';\r\n plan: 'free' | 'pro' | 'team';\r\n organization_id?: string | null;\r\n sub_role?: 'org_admin' | 'manager' | 'employee' | 'user';\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface Branding {\r\n name: string;\r\n logo_url: string;\r\n primary_color: string;\r\n accent_color?: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\ninterface AuthContextType {\r\n user: User | null;\r\n token: string | null;\r\n isAuthenticated: boolean;\r\n isAdmin: boolean;\r\n isOrgAdmin: boolean;\r\n isLoading: boolean;\r\n branding: Branding | null;\r\n login: (token: string, user: User) => void;\r\n logout: () => void;\r\n refreshBranding: () => Promise;\r\n updateProfile: (updates: Partial) => Promise;\r\n updatePlan: (plan: 'free' | 'pro' | 'team') => Promise;\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst AuthContext = createContext(undefined);\r\n\r\nconst API_URL = '/api';\r\n\r\nexport const AuthProvider = ({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) => {\r\n const [user, setUser] = useState(null);\r\n const [token, setToken] = useState(localStorage.getItem('auth_token'));\r\n const [branding, setBranding] = useState(null);\r\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);\r\n\r\n const applyBranding = (data: Branding) => {\r\n if (data.primary_color) {\r\n document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--primary', data.primary_color);\r\n document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--ring', data.primary_color);\r\n document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent', data.primary_color);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const refreshBranding = async () => {\r\n if (!token || !user?.organization_id) {\r\n setBranding(null);\r\n return;\r\n }\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch('/api/org/branding', {\r\n headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }\r\n });\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n const data = await res.json();\r\n setBranding(data);\r\n applyBranding(data);\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n console.error('Failed to fetch branding:', error);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const updateProfile = async (updates: Partial) => {\r\n if (!token || !user) return;\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch('/api/auth/me', {\r\n method: 'PATCH',\r\n headers: {\r\n 'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`\r\n },\r\n body: JSON.stringify(updates)\r\n });\r\n\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n const newUser = { ...user, ...updates };\r\n setUser(newUser);\r\n localStorage.setItem('auth_user', JSON.stringify(newUser));\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n console.error('Failed to update profile:', error);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const updatePlan = async (plan: 'free' | 'pro' | 'team') => {\r\n if (!token || !user) return;\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch('/api/auth/billing/plan', {\r\n method: 'PATCH',\r\n headers: {\r\n 'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`\r\n },\r\n body: JSON.stringify({ plan })\r\n });\r\n\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n const newUser = { ...user, plan };\r\n setUser(newUser);\r\n localStorage.setItem('auth_user', JSON.stringify(newUser));\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n console.error('Failed to update plan:', error);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n useEffect(() => {\r\n const savedUser = localStorage.getItem('auth_user');\r\n if (savedUser && token) {\r\n setUser(JSON.parse(savedUser));\r\n }\r\n setIsLoading(false);\r\n }, [token]);\r\n\r\n useEffect(() => {\r\n if (user?.organization_id && token) {\r\n refreshBranding();\r\n } else {\r\n setBranding(null);\r\n document.documentElement.style.removeProperty('--primary');\r\n document.documentElement.style.removeProperty('--ring');\r\n document.documentElement.style.removeProperty('--accent');\r\n }\r\n }, [user?.organization_id, token]);\r\n\r\n const login = (newToken: string, newUser: User) => {\r\n setToken(newToken);\r\n setUser(newUser);\r\n localStorage.setItem('auth_token', newToken);\r\n localStorage.setItem('auth_user', JSON.stringify(newUser));\r\n };\r\n\r\n const logout = () => {\r\n setToken(null);\r\n setUser(null);\r\n setBranding(null);\r\n localStorage.removeItem('auth_token');\r\n localStorage.removeItem('auth_user');\r\n db.clearAll().catch(err => console.error('Failed to clear DB on logout:', err));\r\n };\r\n\r\n return (\r\n \r\n {children}\r\n \r\n );\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport const useAuth = () => {\r\n const context = useContext(AuthContext);\r\n if (!context) throw new Error('useAuth must be used within an AuthProvider');\r\n return context;\r\n};\r\n","src/contexts/MusicPlayerContext.tsx":"import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useRef, useEffect, ReactNode } from 'react';\nimport { MusicTrack } from '@/hooks/useMusicLibrary';\n\ninterface MusicPlayerContextType {\n currentTrack: MusicTrack | null;\n isPlaying: boolean;\n currentTime: number;\n duration: number;\n volume: number;\n shuffle: boolean;\n repeat: boolean;\n audioRef: React.RefObject;\n play: () => void;\n pause: () => void;\n togglePlayPause: () => void;\n playTrack: (track: MusicTrack, urlResolver?: (id: string) => Promise) => Promise;\n playNext: (urlResolver?: (id: string) => Promise) => Promise;\n playPrevious: (urlResolver?: (id: string) => Promise) => Promise;\n seek: (time: number) => void;\n setVolume: (volume: number) => void;\n setShuffle: (shuffle: boolean) => void;\n setRepeat: (repeat: boolean) => void;\n setPlaylist: (tracks: MusicTrack[]) => void;\n playlist: MusicTrack[];\n}\n\nconst MusicPlayerContext = createContext(undefined);\n\nexport const useMusicPlayer = () => {\n const context = useContext(MusicPlayerContext);\n if (!context) {\n throw new Error('useMusicPlayer must be used within MusicPlayerProvider');\n }\n return context;\n};\n\ninterface MusicPlayerProviderProps {\n children: ReactNode;\n}\n\nexport const MusicPlayerProvider: React.FC = ({ children }) => {\n const [playlist, setPlaylist] = useState([]);\n const [currentTrack, setCurrentTrack] = useState(null);\n const [isPlaying, setIsPlaying] = useState(false);\n const [currentTime, setCurrentTime] = useState(0);\n const [duration, setDuration] = useState(0);\n const [volume, setVolumeState] = useState(0.7);\n const [shuffle, setShuffle] = useState(false);\n const [repeat, setRepeat] = useState(false);\n const audioRef = useRef(null);\n\n const updateMediaSession = (track: MusicTrack) => {\n if ('mediaSession' in navigator) {\n navigator.mediaSession.metadata = new MediaMetadata({\n title: track.title,\n artist: track.artist,\n album: track.album,\n artwork: track.artwork ? [{ src: track.artwork, sizes: '512x512', type: 'image/jpeg' }] : undefined,\n });\n }\n };\n\n const play = () => {\n if (audioRef.current) {\n audioRef.current.play()\n .then(() => setIsPlaying(true))\n .catch(error => console.error('Error playing track:', error));\n }\n };\n\n const pause = () => {\n if (audioRef.current) {\n audioRef.current.pause();\n setIsPlaying(false);\n }\n };\n\n const togglePlayPause = () => {\n if (isPlaying) {\n pause();\n } else {\n play();\n }\n };\n\n const playTrack = async (track: MusicTrack, urlResolver?: (id: string) => Promise) => {\n if (audioRef.current && urlResolver) {\n const url = await urlResolver(track.id);\n if (url) {\n setCurrentTrack(track);\n audioRef.current.src = url;\n audioRef.current.volume = volume;\n updateMediaSession(track);\n play();\n }\n }\n };\n\n const playNext = async (urlResolver?: (id: string) => Promise) => {\n if (playlist.length === 0 || !currentTrack || !urlResolver) return;\n\n const currentIndex = playlist.findIndex(t => t.id === currentTrack.id);\n let nextIndex;\n\n if (shuffle) {\n nextIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * playlist.length);\n } else {\n nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % playlist.length;\n }\n\n await playTrack(playlist[nextIndex], urlResolver);\n };\n\n const playPrevious = async (urlResolver?: (id: string) => Promise) => {\n if (playlist.length === 0 || !currentTrack || !urlResolver) return;\n\n const currentIndex = playlist.findIndex(t => t.id === currentTrack.id);\n const prevIndex = (currentIndex - 1 + playlist.length) % playlist.length;\n\n await playTrack(playlist[prevIndex], urlResolver);\n };\n\n const seek = (time: number) => {\n if (audioRef.current) {\n audioRef.current.currentTime = time;\n setCurrentTime(time);\n }\n };\n\n const setVolume = (newVolume: number) => {\n setVolumeState(newVolume);\n if (audioRef.current) {\n audioRef.current.volume = newVolume;\n }\n };\n\n const handleTimeUpdate = () => {\n if (audioRef.current) {\n setCurrentTime(audioRef.current.currentTime);\n }\n };\n\n const handleLoadedMetadata = () => {\n if (audioRef.current) {\n setDuration(audioRef.current.duration);\n }\n };\n\n const handleEnded = () => {\n setIsPlaying(false);\n if (repeat) {\n if (audioRef.current) {\n audioRef.current.currentTime = 0;\n play();\n }\n }\n };\n\n useEffect(() => {\n (window as any).musicPlayerContext = {\n play,\n pause,\n isPlaying,\n };\n }, [isPlaying]);\n\n return (\n \n {children}\n \n \n );\n};\n","src/hooks/use-mobile.tsx":"import * as React from \"react\";\n\nconst MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 768;\n\nexport function useIsMobile() {\n const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = React.useState(undefined);\n\n React.useEffect(() => {\n const mql = window.matchMedia(`(max-width: ${MOBILE_BREAKPOINT - 1}px)`);\n const onChange = () => {\n setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT);\n };\n mql.addEventListener(\"change\", onChange);\n setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT);\n return () => mql.removeEventListener(\"change\", onChange);\n }, []);\n\n return !!isMobile;\n}\n","src/hooks/use-toast.ts":"import * as React from \"react\";\n\nimport type { ToastActionElement, ToastProps } from \"@/components/ui/toast\";\n\nconst TOAST_LIMIT = 1;\nconst TOAST_REMOVE_DELAY = 1000000;\n\ntype ToasterToast = ToastProps & {\n id: string;\n title?: React.ReactNode;\n description?: React.ReactNode;\n action?: ToastActionElement;\n};\n\nconst actionTypes =
