{\n ADD_TOAST: \"ADD_TOAST\",\n UPDATE_TOAST: \"UPDATE_TOAST\",\n DISMISS_TOAST: \"DISMISS_TOAST\",\n REMOVE_TOAST: \"REMOVE_TOAST\",\n} as const;\n\nlet count = 0;\n\nfunction genId() {\n count = (count + 1) % Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;\n return count.toString();\n}\n\ntype ActionType = typeof actionTypes;\n\ntype Action =\n | {\n type: ActionType[\"ADD_TOAST\"];\n toast: ToasterToast;\n }\n | {\n type: ActionType[\"UPDATE_TOAST\"];\n toast: Partial;\n }\n | {\n type: ActionType[\"DISMISS_TOAST\"];\n toastId?: ToasterToast[\"id\"];\n }\n | {\n type: ActionType[\"REMOVE_TOAST\"];\n toastId?: ToasterToast[\"id\"];\n };\n\ninterface State {\n toasts: ToasterToast[];\n}\n\nconst toastTimeouts = new Map>();\n\nconst addToRemoveQueue = (toastId: string) => {\n if (toastTimeouts.has(toastId)) {\n return;\n }\n\n const timeout = setTimeout(() => {\n toastTimeouts.delete(toastId);\n dispatch({\n type: \"REMOVE_TOAST\",\n toastId: toastId,\n });\n }, TOAST_REMOVE_DELAY);\n\n toastTimeouts.set(toastId, timeout);\n};\n\nexport const reducer = (state: State, action: Action): State => {\n switch (action.type) {\n case \"ADD_TOAST\":\n return {\n ...state,\n toasts: [action.toast, ...state.toasts].slice(0, TOAST_LIMIT),\n };\n\n case \"UPDATE_TOAST\":\n return {\n ...state,\n toasts: state.toasts.map((t) => (t.id === action.toast.id ? { ...t, ...action.toast } : t)),\n };\n\n case \"DISMISS_TOAST\": {\n const { toastId } = action;\n\n // ! Side effects ! - This could be extracted into a dismissToast() action,\n // but I'll keep it here for simplicity\n if (toastId) {\n addToRemoveQueue(toastId);\n } else {\n state.toasts.forEach((toast) => {\n addToRemoveQueue(toast.id);\n });\n }\n\n return {\n ...state,\n toasts: state.toasts.map((t) =>\n t.id === toastId || toastId === undefined\n ? {\n ...t,\n open: false,\n }\n : t,\n ),\n };\n }\n case \"REMOVE_TOAST\":\n if (action.toastId === undefined) {\n return {\n ...state,\n toasts: [],\n };\n }\n return {\n ...state,\n toasts: state.toasts.filter((t) => t.id !== action.toastId),\n };\n }\n};\n\nconst listeners: Array<(state: State) => void> = [];\n\nlet memoryState: State = { toasts: [] };\n\nfunction dispatch(action: Action) {\n memoryState = reducer(memoryState, action);\n listeners.forEach((listener) => {\n listener(memoryState);\n });\n}\n\ntype Toast = Omit;\n\nfunction toast({ ...props }: Toast) {\n const id = genId();\n\n const update = (props: ToasterToast) =>\n dispatch({\n type: \"UPDATE_TOAST\",\n toast: { ...props, id },\n });\n const dismiss = () => dispatch({ type: \"DISMISS_TOAST\", toastId: id });\n\n dispatch({\n type: \"ADD_TOAST\",\n toast: {\n ...props,\n id,\n open: true,\n onOpenChange: (open) => {\n if (!open) dismiss();\n },\n },\n });\n\n return {\n id: id,\n dismiss,\n update,\n };\n}\n\nfunction useToast() {\n const [state, setState] = React.useState(memoryState);\n\n React.useEffect(() => {\n listeners.push(setState);\n return () => {\n const index = listeners.indexOf(setState);\n if (index > -1) {\n listeners.splice(index, 1);\n }\n };\n }, [state]);\n\n return {\n ...state,\n toast,\n dismiss: (toastId?: string) => dispatch({ type: \"DISMISS_TOAST\", toastId }),\n };\n}\n\nexport { useToast, toast };\n","src/hooks/useDebounce.ts":"import { useEffect, useRef, useCallback, useState } from 'react';\n\nexport function useDebounce unknown>(\n callback: T,\n delay: number\n): T {\n const timeoutRef = useRef>();\n const callbackRef = useRef(callback);\n\n // Update the callback ref when callback changes\n useEffect(() => {\n callbackRef.current = callback;\n }, [callback]);\n\n // Cleanup on unmount\n useEffect(() => {\n return () => {\n if (timeoutRef.current) {\n clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n }\n };\n }, []);\n\n const debouncedCallback = useCallback(\n (...args: Parameters) => {\n if (timeoutRef.current) {\n clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n }\n timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n callbackRef.current(...args);\n }, delay);\n },\n [delay]\n ) as T;\n\n return debouncedCallback;\n}\n\nexport function useDebouncedValue(value: T, delay: number): T {\n const [debouncedValue, setDebouncedValue] = useState(value);\n const timeoutRef = useRef>();\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (timeoutRef.current) {\n clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n }\n timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n setDebouncedValue(value);\n }, delay);\n\n return () => {\n if (timeoutRef.current) {\n clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n }\n };\n }, [value, delay]);\n\n return debouncedValue;\n}\n","src/hooks/useMusicLibrary.ts":"import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\nimport { db } from '@/services/db';\n\nexport interface MusicTrack {\n id: string;\n name: string;\n title: string;\n artist: string;\n album: string;\n artwork?: string;\n playlistId: string;\n}\n\nexport interface Playlist {\n id: string;\n name: string;\n trackIds: string[];\n}\n\n// Memory-only cache for object URLs to prevent leaks\nconst blobUrlCache: Record = {};\n\nexport const useMusicLibrary = () => {\n const [playlists, setPlaylists] = useState([]);\n const [tracks, setTracks] = useState>({});\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);\n\n // 1. Initial Load\n useEffect(() => {\n const loadLibrary = async () => {\n try {\n const savedPlaylists = localStorage.getItem('musicPlaylists');\n const savedTracks = localStorage.getItem('musicTracksMetadata');\n\n if (savedPlaylists) setPlaylists(JSON.parse(savedPlaylists));\n if (savedTracks) setTracks(JSON.parse(savedTracks));\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error loading music library:', error);\n } finally {\n setIsLoading(false);\n }\n };\n loadLibrary();\n }, []);\n\n // 2. Persistence\n useEffect(() => {\n localStorage.setItem('musicPlaylists', JSON.stringify(playlists));\n }, [playlists]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n localStorage.setItem('musicTracksMetadata', JSON.stringify(tracks));\n }, [tracks]);\n\n // 3. Helper to get/create Blob URL\n const getTrackUrl = async (trackId: string): Promise => {\n if (blobUrlCache[trackId]) return blobUrlCache[trackId];\n\n try {\n const fileData: any = await db.getAll('music').then(all => (all as any[]).find(m => m.id === trackId));\n if (fileData && fileData.file) {\n const url = URL.createObjectURL(fileData.file);\n blobUrlCache[trackId] = url;\n return url;\n }\n } catch (err) {\n console.error('Error getting track URL:', err);\n }\n return null;\n };\n\n const extractMetadata = async (file: File): Promise> => {\n return new Promise((resolve) => {\n // @ts-ignore\n if (typeof window.jsmediatags === 'undefined') {\n resolve({\n title: file.name.replace(/\\.[^/.]+$/, ''),\n artist: 'Artista Desconhecido',\n album: 'Álbum Desconhecido',\n });\n return;\n }\n\n // @ts-ignore\n window.jsmediatags.read(file, {\n onSuccess: (tag: any) => {\n const tags = tag.tags;\n let artwork: string | undefined;\n\n if (tags.picture) {\n const { data, format } = tags.picture;\n const byteArray = new Uint8Array(data);\n const blob = new Blob([byteArray], { type: format });\n artwork = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n }\n\n resolve({\n title: tags.title || file.name.replace(/\\.[^/.]+$/, ''),\n artist: tags.artist || 'Artista Desconhecido',\n album: tags.album || 'Álbum Desconhecido',\n artwork,\n });\n },\n onError: () => {\n resolve({\n title: file.name.replace(/\\.[^/.]+$/, ''),\n artist: 'Artista Desconhecido',\n album: 'Álbum Desconhecido',\n });\n },\n });\n });\n };\n\n const addTracksToPlaylist = async (playlistId: string, files: FileList) => {\n try {\n setIsLoading(true);\n const newTracks: MusicTrack[] = [];\n\n for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {\n const file = files[i];\n if (/\\.(mp3|m4a|ogg|wav|flac)$/i.test(file.name)) {\n const metadata = await extractMetadata(file);\n const trackId = `track-${Date.now()}-${i}`;\n\n const track: MusicTrack = {\n id: trackId,\n name: file.name,\n title: metadata.title || file.name,\n artist: metadata.artist || 'Artista Desconhecido',\n album: metadata.album || 'Álbum Desconhecido',\n artwork: metadata.artwork,\n playlistId,\n };\n\n // Store file in IndexedDB\n await db.put('music', { id: trackId, file });\n\n newTracks.push(track);\n }\n }\n\n if (newTracks.length === 0) {\n toast.error('Nenhum arquivo de áudio válido encontrado');\n return;\n }\n\n // Update state\n const trackMap = { ...tracks };\n newTracks.forEach(t => trackMap[t.id] = t);\n setTracks(trackMap);\n\n setPlaylists(prev => prev.map(p =>\n p.id === playlistId\n ? { ...p, trackIds: [...p.trackIds, ...newTracks.map(t => t.id)] }\n : p\n ));\n\n toast.success(`${newTracks.length} música(s) adicionada(s)`);\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error adding tracks:', error);\n toast.error('Erro ao salvar as músicas localmente');\n } finally {\n setIsLoading(false);\n }\n };\n\n const createPlaylist = (name: string) => {\n const id = `pl-${Date.now()}`;\n const newPlaylist: Playlist = {\n id,\n name,\n trackIds: [],\n };\n setPlaylists(prev => [...prev, newPlaylist]);\n toast.success(`Playlist \"${name}\" criada`);\n return id;\n };\n\n const removeTrack = async (playlistId: string, trackId: string) => {\n setPlaylists(prev => prev.map(p =>\n p.id === playlistId ? { ...p, trackIds: p.trackIds.filter(id => id !== trackId) } : p\n ));\n\n // Revoke URL if cached\n if (blobUrlCache[trackId]) {\n URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrlCache[trackId]);\n delete blobUrlCache[trackId];\n }\n\n // Optional: Only delete from DB if not in any other playlist\n // For simplicity, we delete it here\n await db.delete('music', trackId);\n\n setTracks(prev => {\n const next = { ...prev };\n delete next[trackId];\n return next;\n });\n\n toast.success('Música removida');\n };\n\n const removePlaylist = async (playlistId: string) => {\n const playlist = playlists.find(p => p.id === playlistId);\n if (playlist) {\n for (const tId of playlist.trackIds) {\n await removeTrack(playlistId, tId);\n }\n }\n setPlaylists(prev => prev.filter(p => p.id !== playlistId));\n toast.success('Playlist removida');\n };\n\n const clearLibrary = async () => {\n setPlaylists([]);\n setTracks({});\n await db.clear('music');\n // Revoke all\n Object.values(blobUrlCache).forEach(url => URL.revokeObjectURL(url));\n Object.keys(blobUrlCache).forEach(k => delete blobUrlCache[k]);\n toast.info('Biblioteca limpa');\n };\n\n const getAllTracks = (): MusicTrack[] => {\n return Object.values(tracks);\n };\n\n return {\n playlists,\n tracks,\n isLoading,\n isConnected: playlists.length > 0,\n addTracksToPlaylist,\n createPlaylist,\n removeTrack,\n removePlaylist,\n clearLibrary,\n getTrackUrl,\n getAllTracks\n };\n};\n","src/hooks/useVideoLibrary.ts":"import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\n\nexport interface VideoItem {\n id: string;\n file: File;\n name: string;\n url: string;\n title: string;\n thumbnail?: string;\n playlist: string;\n}\n\nexport interface VideoPlaylist {\n id: string;\n name: string;\n videos: VideoItem[];\n}\n\nexport const useVideoLibrary = () => {\n const [playlists, setPlaylists] = useState([]);\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n const saved = localStorage.getItem('videoPlaylists');\n if (saved) {\n try {\n setPlaylists(JSON.parse(saved));\n } catch (e) {\n console.error('Erro ao carregar playlists de vídeo:', e);\n }\n }\n }, []);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (playlists.length > 0) {\n localStorage.setItem('videoPlaylists', JSON.stringify(playlists));\n }\n }, [playlists]);\n\n const generateThumbnail = (file: File): Promise => {\n return new Promise((resolve) => {\n try {\n const video = document.createElement('video');\n video.preload = 'metadata';\n video.muted = true;\n const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);\n video.src = url;\n\n video.onloadeddata = () => {\n video.currentTime = Math.min(1, video.duration / 4);\n };\n\n video.onseeked = () => {\n const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n canvas.width = 160;\n canvas.height = 90;\n const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n if (ctx) {\n ctx.drawImage(video, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n resolve(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.7));\n } else {\n resolve(undefined);\n }\n URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n };\n\n video.onerror = () => {\n URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n resolve(undefined);\n };\n } catch {\n resolve(undefined);\n }\n });\n };\n\n const addVideosToPlaylist = async (playlistId: string, files: FileList) => {\n try {\n setIsLoading(true);\n const newVideos: VideoItem[] = [];\n\n for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {\n const file = files[i];\n if (/\\.(mp4|webm|ogg|mkv|avi|mov)$/i.test(file.name)) {\n const thumbnail = await generateThumbnail(file);\n newVideos.push({\n id: `${Date.now()}-${i}`,\n file,\n name: file.name,\n url: URL.createObjectURL(file),\n title: file.name.replace(/\\.[^/.]+$/, ''),\n thumbnail,\n playlist: playlistId,\n });\n }\n }\n\n if (newVideos.length === 0) {\n toast.error('Nenhum arquivo de vídeo encontrado');\n return;\n }\n\n setPlaylists(prev => {\n const existing = prev.find(p => p.id === playlistId);\n if (existing) {\n return prev.map(p =>\n p.id === playlistId\n ? { ...p, videos: [...p.videos, ...newVideos] }\n : p\n );\n }\n return [...prev, { id: playlistId, name: playlistId, videos: newVideos }];\n });\n\n toast.success(`${newVideos.length} vídeo(s) adicionado(s)`);\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Erro ao adicionar vídeos:', error);\n toast.error('Erro ao adicionar vídeos');\n } finally {\n setIsLoading(false);\n }\n };\n\n const createPlaylist = (name: string) => {\n const id = name.toLowerCase().replace(/\\s+/g, '-');\n setPlaylists(prev => [...prev, { id, name, videos: [] }]);\n toast.success(`Playlist \"${name}\" criada`);\n return id;\n };\n\n const removeVideo = (playlistId: string, videoId: string) => {\n setPlaylists(prev =>\n prev.map(p =>\n p.id === playlistId\n ? { ...p, videos: p.videos.filter(v => v.id !== videoId) }\n : p\n )\n );\n toast.success('Vídeo removido');\n };\n\n const removePlaylist = (playlistId: string) => {\n setPlaylists(prev => prev.filter(p => p.id !== playlistId));\n toast.success('Playlist removida');\n };\n\n const clearLibrary = () => {\n setPlaylists([]);\n localStorage.removeItem('videoPlaylists');\n toast.info('Biblioteca de vídeos limpa');\n };\n\n return {\n playlists,\n isLoading,\n isConnected: playlists.length > 0,\n addVideosToPlaylist,\n createPlaylist,\n removeVideo,\n removePlaylist,\n clearLibrary,\n };\n};\n","src/index.css":"@tailwind base;\n@tailwind components;\n@tailwind utilities;\n\n/* Definition of the design system. All colors, gradients, fonts, etc should be defined here. \nAll colors MUST be HSL.\n*/\n\n@layer base {\n :root {\n --background: 0 0% 98%;\n --foreground: 220 13% 13%;\n\n --card: 0 0% 100%;\n --card-foreground: 220 13% 13%;\n\n --popover: 0 0% 100%;\n --popover-foreground: 220 13% 13%;\n\n --primary: 355 78% 56%;\n --primary-foreground: 0 0% 100%;\n\n --secondary: 220 13% 95%;\n --secondary-foreground: 220 13% 13%;\n\n --muted: 220 13% 95%;\n --muted-foreground: 220 9% 46%;\n\n --accent: 355 78% 56%;\n --accent-foreground: 0 0% 100%;\n\n --destructive: 0 84% 60%;\n --destructive-foreground: 0 0% 100%;\n\n --border: 220 13% 91%;\n --input: 220 13% 91%;\n --ring: 355 78% 56%;\n\n --radius: 0.5rem;\n\n --success: 142 71% 45%;\n --warning: 38 92% 50%;\n --info: 199 89% 48%;\n\n --nav-height: 64px;\n --transition-smooth: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);\n }\n\n .dark {\n --background: 222 47% 11%;\n --foreground: 210 40% 98%;\n\n --card: 222 47% 14%;\n --card-foreground: 210 40% 98%;\n\n --popover: 222 47% 14%;\n --popover-foreground: 210 40% 98%;\n\n --primary: 355 78% 56%;\n --primary-foreground: 0 0% 100%;\n\n --secondary: 217 33% 20%;\n --secondary-foreground: 210 40% 98%;\n\n --muted: 217 33% 20%;\n --muted-foreground: 215 20% 65%;\n\n --accent: 355 78% 56%;\n --accent-foreground: 0 0% 100%;\n\n --destructive: 0 63% 31%;\n --destructive-foreground: 210 40% 98%;\n\n --border: 217 33% 20%;\n --input: 217 33% 20%;\n --ring: 355 78% 56%;\n\n --success: 142 71% 45%;\n --warning: 38 92% 50%;\n --info: 199 89% 48%;\n }\n}\n\n@layer base {\n * {\n @apply border-border;\n }\n\n body {\n @apply bg-background text-foreground;\n }\n\n /* Mini Player Adjustments */\n .mini-player-visible {\n padding-top: 70px;\n }\n\n /* Custom Scrollbar Styling */\n ::-webkit-scrollbar {\n width: 6px;\n height: 6px;\n }\n\n ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n background: transparent;\n }\n\n ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n background: hsl(var(--muted-foreground) / 0.3);\n border-radius: 10px;\n transition: background 0.2s ease;\n }\n\n ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {\n background: hsl(var(--primary) / 0.5);\n }\n\n /* Firefox Scrollbar */\n * {\n scrollbar-width: thin;\n scrollbar-color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground) / 0.3) transparent;\n }\n}\n\n/* Chrome Extension Side Panel Styles */\n@layer components {\n\n /* Extension container - full screen for new tab */\n .extension-container {\n width: 100%;\n height: 100vh;\n overflow-y: auto;\n }\n\n /* Extension content area */\n .extension-content {\n @apply text-sm;\n }\n\n /* Compact cards for extension */\n .extension-content .card {\n @apply p-3;\n }\n\n /* Compact buttons */\n .extension-content .btn-compact {\n @apply h-8 px-3 text-xs;\n }\n\n /* Compact inputs */\n .extension-content input,\n .extension-content textarea {\n @apply text-sm;\n }\n\n /* Compact tables */\n .extension-content table {\n @apply text-xs;\n }\n\n .extension-content th,\n .extension-content td {\n @apply px-2 py-1.5;\n }\n\n /* Compact headings */\n .extension-content h1 {\n @apply text-lg font-bold;\n }\n\n .extension-content h2 {\n @apply text-base font-semibold;\n }\n\n .extension-content h3 {\n @apply text-sm font-medium;\n }\n\n /* Kanban columns - horizontal in full screen */\n .extension-content .kanban-board {\n @apply flex-row gap-3;\n }\n\n .extension-content .kanban-column {\n @apply min-w-[250px] min-h-[150px];\n }\n\n /* Grid adjustments - responsive columns */\n .extension-content .grid-compact {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));\n gap: 0.75rem;\n }\n\n /* Charts - flexible height */\n .extension-content canvas {\n max-height: 400px !important;\n }\n}\n\n/* Print Styles for Budget Preview */\n@media print {\n body * {\n visibility: hidden;\n }\n\n #budget-print,\n #budget-print * {\n visibility: visible;\n }\n\n #budget-print {\n position: absolute;\n left: 0;\n top: 0;\n width: 100%;\n }\n\n .print\\:hidden {\n display: none !important;\n }\n\n .print\\:p-8 {\n padding: 2rem !important;\n }\n\n @page {\n margin: 1cm;\n }\n}","src/lib/utils.ts":"import { clsx, type ClassValue } from \"clsx\";\nimport { twMerge } from \"tailwind-merge\";\n\nexport function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {\n return twMerge(clsx(inputs));\n}\n","src/main.tsx":"import { createRoot } from \"react-dom/client\";\nimport App from \"./App.tsx\";\nimport \"./index.css\";\n\ncreateRoot(document.getElementById(\"root\")!).render();\n","src/pages/Admin.tsx":"import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\r\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';\r\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\r\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\r\nimport { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';\r\nimport { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';\r\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';\r\nimport {\r\n Users,\r\n Database,\r\n Activity,\r\n Shield,\r\n Search,\r\n ArrowLeft,\r\n RefreshCw,\r\n UserCircle,\r\n BadgeCheck,\r\n Trash2,\r\n Eye,\r\n Megaphone,\r\n Hammer,\r\n BarChart3,\r\n Key,\r\n Building\r\n} from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport {\r\n AlertDialog,\r\n AlertDialogAction,\r\n AlertDialogCancel,\r\n AlertDialogContent,\r\n AlertDialogDescription,\r\n AlertDialogFooter,\r\n AlertDialogHeader,\r\n AlertDialogTitle,\r\n} from \"@/components/ui/alert-dialog\";\r\nimport {\r\n BarChart,\r\n Bar,\r\n XAxis,\r\n YAxis,\r\n CartesianGrid,\r\n Tooltip,\r\n ResponsiveContainer,\r\n Cell\r\n} from 'recharts';\r\nimport { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\r\nimport { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';\r\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\r\n\r\ninterface AdminUser {\r\n id: string;\r\n email: string;\r\n role: string;\r\n sub_role: string;\r\n plan: string;\r\n organization_id: string | null;\r\n created_at: string;\r\n total_entities: number;\r\n last_activity: string | null;\r\n}\r\n\r\ninterface AdminStats {\r\n users: number;\r\n organizations: { count: number };\r\n dataPoints: number;\r\n composition: { type: string, count: number }[];\r\n}\r\n\r\ninterface AdminOrganization {\r\n id: string;\r\n name: string;\r\n slug: string;\r\n owner_id: string;\r\n plan: string;\r\n total_users: number;\r\n created_at: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\ninterface SystemConfig {\r\n maintenance_mode: string;\r\n global_broadcast: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst COLORS = ['#8884d8', '#82ca9d', '#ffc658', '#ff8042', '#0088FE', '#00C49F', '#FFBB28', '#FF8042'];\r\n\r\nconst Admin = () => {\r\n const { isAdmin, token } = useAuth();\r\n const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n const [users, setUsers] = useState([]);\r\n const [organizations, setOrganizations] = useState([]);\r\n const [stats, setStats] = useState(null);\r\n const [config, setConfig] = useState(null);\r\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);\r\n const [isUpdating, setIsUpdating] = useState(null);\r\n const [search, setSearch] = useState('');\r\n const [broadcastMsg, setBroadcastMsg] = useState('');\r\n const [userToDelete, setUserToDelete] = useState(null);\r\n\r\n useEffect(() => {\r\n if (!isAdmin) {\r\n navigate('/');\r\n return;\r\n }\r\n fetchData();\r\n }, [isAdmin]);\r\n\r\n const fetchData = async () => {\r\n setIsLoading(true);\r\n try {\r\n const [usersRes, orgsRes, statsRes, configRes] = await Promise.all([\r\n fetch('/api/admin/users', { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` } }),\r\n fetch('/api/admin/organizations', { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` } }),\r\n fetch('/api/admin/stats', { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` } }),\r\n fetch('/api/admin/config', { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` } })\r\n ]);\r\n\r\n if (usersRes.ok && orgsRes.ok && statsRes.ok && configRes.ok) {\r\n setUsers(await usersRes.json());\r\n setOrganizations(await orgsRes.json());\r\n setStats(await statsRes.json());\r\n setConfig(await configRes.json());\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Erro ao carregar dados administrativos');\r\n } finally {\r\n setIsLoading(false);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleUpdateUser = async (id: string, updates: Partial) => {\r\n setIsUpdating(id);\r\n const toastId = toast.loading('Atualizando usuário...');\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/users/${id}`, {\r\n method: 'PATCH',\r\n headers: {\r\n 'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`\r\n },\r\n body: JSON.stringify(updates)\r\n });\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n toast.success('Usuário atualizado com sucesso', { id: toastId });\r\n fetchData();\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Erro ao atualizar usuário', { id: toastId });\r\n } finally {\r\n setIsUpdating(null);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleUpdateConfig = async (updates: Partial) => {\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch('/api/admin/config', {\r\n method: 'PATCH',\r\n headers: {\r\n 'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`\r\n },\r\n body: JSON.stringify(updates)\r\n });\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n toast.success('Configurações atualizadas');\r\n fetchData();\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Erro ao atualizar configurações');\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleSendBroadcast = async () => {\r\n if (!broadcastMsg) return;\r\n const toastId = toast.loading('Enviando broadcast...');\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch('/api/admin/broadcast', {\r\n method: 'POST',\r\n headers: {\r\n 'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`\r\n },\r\n body: JSON.stringify({ message: broadcastMsg })\r\n });\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n toast.success('Broadcast enviado com sucesso', { id: toastId });\r\n setBroadcastMsg('');\r\n fetchData();\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Erro ao enviar broadcast', { id: toastId });\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleDeleteUser = async (id: string) => {\r\n const toastId = toast.loading('Removendo usuário...');\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/users/${id}`, {\r\n method: 'PATCH',\r\n headers: {\r\n 'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`\r\n },\r\n body: JSON.stringify({ role: 'suspended' })\r\n });\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n toast.success('Usuário suspenso com sucesso', { id: toastId });\r\n fetchData();\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Erro ao remover usuário', { id: toastId });\r\n } finally {\r\n setUserToDelete(null);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleResetPassword = async (id: string) => {\r\n const toastId = toast.loading('Resetando senha...');\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/users/${id}/reset-password`, {\r\n method: 'POST',\r\n headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }\r\n });\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n const data = await res.json();\r\n toast.success(data.message, { id: toastId, duration: 5000 });\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Erro ao resetar senha', { id: toastId });\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const filteredUsers = users.filter(u =>\r\n u.email.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())\r\n );\r\n\r\n const chartData = stats?.composition.map(c => ({\r\n name: c.type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + c.type.slice(1),\r\n count: c.count\r\n })) || [];\r\n\r\n if (!isAdmin) return null;\r\n\r\n return (\r\n
    \r\n {/* Header */}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n

    Painel de Controle Elite

    \r\n

    Infraestrutura administrativa e monitoramento SaaS.

    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n\r\n {/* Info Cards */}\r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n Usuários B2C\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    {stats?.users || 0}
    \r\n

    Plataforma global

    \r\n     \r\n     \r\n \r\n \r\n Organizações B2B\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    {stats?.organizations?.count || 0}
    \r\n

    Empresas registradas

    \r\n     \r\n     \r\n \r\n \r\n Entidades Cloud\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    {stats?.dataPoints || 0}
    \r\n

    Sincronização global ativa

    \r\n     \r\n     \r\n \r\n \r\n Server Health\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    100.0%
    \r\n

    Status: Operational

    \r\n     \r\n     \r\n
    \r\n\r\n {/* Charts & System Controls */}\r\n
    \r\n {/* Data Composition Chart */}\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Distribuição de Dados\r\n \r\n Volume de informações sincronizadas por módulo.\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n `${value}`}\r\n />\r\n \r\n \r\n {chartData.map((entry, index) => (\r\n \r\n ))}\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n\r\n {/* System Settings Side Panel */}\r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Modo Manutenção\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n handleUpdateConfig({ maintenance_mode: String(val) })}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n

    \r\n * Apenas administradores poderão realizar alterações enquanto ativo.\r\n

    \r\n     \r\n     \r\n\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Broadcast Global\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n setBroadcastMsg(e.target.value)}\r\n className=\"h-9\"\r\n />\r\n \r\n {config?.global_broadcast && (\r\n
    \r\n Ativo: {config.global_broadcast}\r\n handleUpdateConfig({ global_broadcast: '' })}\r\n >\r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n )}\r\n     \r\n     \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n\r\n {/* User Table Section */}\r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n Gestão de Usuários\r\n Controle de privilégios e planos de assinatura.\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setSearch(e.target.value)}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n     \r\n \r\n
    \r\n {/* Mobile View: Cards */}\r\n
    \r\n {filteredUsers.map(u => (\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    {u.email}
    \r\n
    \r\n {u.organization_id ? 'Empresa vinculado' : 'B2C Individual'}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n {u.plan.toUpperCase()}\r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n Cargo: {u.sub_role || 'member'}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n Cloud: {u.total_entities} itens\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n Ativo: {u.last_activity ? new Date(u.last_activity).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n handleUpdateUser(u.id, { plan: u.plan === 'pro' ? 'free' : 'pro' })}\r\n >\r\n {u.plan === 'pro' ? 'Downgrade' : 'Pro'}\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n ))}\r\n
    \r\n\r\n {/* Desktop View: Table */}\r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n {filteredUsers.map(u => (\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n ))}\r\n \r\n
    Usuário / EmpresaPlano / CargoDados CloudÚltima AtividadeAções Elites
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n {u.email}\r\n {u.role === 'admin' && }\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n {u.organization_id ? (\r\n <>\r\n \r\n {organizations.find(o => o.id === u.organization_id)?.name || 'Empresa vinculada'}\r\n \r\n ) : (\r\n 'Usuário Individual (B2C)'\r\n )}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n     		\r\n \r\n {u.plan.toUpperCase()}\r\n \r\n
    \r\n {u.sub_role || 'member'}\r\n
    \r\n     		{u.total_entities}\r\n {u.last_activity ? new Date(u.last_activity).toLocaleDateString() : 'Sem rastro'}\r\n \r\n
    \r\n handleUpdateUser(u.id, { plan: u.plan === 'pro' ? 'free' : 'pro' })}\r\n className={u.plan === 'pro' ? 'text-amber-500 hover:text-amber-600' : 'text-primary'}\r\n >\r\n {u.plan === 'pro' ? 'Downgrade' : 'Tornar Pro'}\r\n \r\n handleResetPassword(u.id)}\r\n >\r\n \r\n \r\n toast.info(`Acesso restrito para logs de ${u.email}`)}\r\n >\r\n \r\n \r\n setUserToDelete(u)}\r\n >\r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n     \r\n     \r\n\r\n {/* Organization Management Section */}\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Gestão de Organizações (B2B)\r\n \r\n Administração de contas corporativas e tenants.\r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n {/* Mobile Organizations: Cards */}\r\n
    \r\n {organizations.map(org => (\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    {org.name}
    \r\n
    Slug: /{org.slug}
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n {org.plan.replace('_', ' ').toUpperCase()}\r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n Membros: {org.total_users}\r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n ))}\r\n
    \r\n\r\n {/* Desktop Organizations: Table */}\r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n {organizations.map(org => (\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n ))}\r\n \r\n
    EmpresaSlug / URLPlanoMembrosAções
    \r\n
    {org.name}
    \r\n
    ID: {org.id.slice(0, 8)}
    \r\n     		\r\n /{org.slug}\r\n \r\n \r\n {org.plan.replace('_', ' ').toUpperCase()}\r\n \r\n \r\n {org.total_users}\r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n     \r\n     \r\n
    \r\n\r\n {/* Delete Confirmation */}\r\n !open && setUserToDelete(null)}>\r\n \r\n \r\n Suspender Usuário?\r\n \r\n Isso irá revogar o acesso de {userToDelete?.email} instantaneamente.\r\n O usuário não poderá mais sincronizar dados com o servidor.\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Manter Ativo\r\n userToDelete && handleDeleteUser(userToDelete.id)} className=\"bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700\">\r\n Confirmar Suspensão\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n );\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport default Admin;\r\n","src/pages/Auth.tsx":"import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\r\nimport { useNavigate, useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom';\r\nimport { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';\r\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\r\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\r\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';\r\nimport { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';\r\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';\r\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\r\nimport { Lock, Mail, UserPlus, LogIn, Github, KeyRound, ArrowRight, ShieldCheck, Building, User } from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport {\r\n Dialog,\r\n DialogContent,\r\n DialogDescription,\r\n DialogFooter,\r\n DialogHeader,\r\n DialogTitle,\r\n} from \"@/components/ui/dialog\";\r\n\r\nconst Auth = () => {\r\n const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\r\n const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\r\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\r\n const [regType, setRegType] = useState<'individual' | 'company'>('individual');\r\n const [companyName, setCompanyName] = useState('');\r\n const [companySlug, setCompanySlug] = useState('');\r\n const { login } = useAuth();\r\n const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();\r\n const [inviteToken, setInviteToken] = useState(searchParams.get('invite') || '');\r\n const [invitationInfo, setInvitationInfo] = useState<{ org_name: string, role: string } | null>(null);\r\n\r\n useEffect(() => {\r\n if (inviteToken) {\r\n validateInvite(inviteToken);\r\n }\r\n }, [inviteToken]);\r\n\r\n const validateInvite = async (token: string) => {\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch(`/api/auth/invitation/${token}`);\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n const data = await res.json();\r\n setInvitationInfo({ org_name: data.org_name, role: data.role });\r\n setEmail(data.email);\r\n } else {\r\n toast.error('Convite inválido ou expirado');\r\n setInviteToken('');\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n console.error('Invite validation failed');\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n // Forgot Password State\r\n const [isForgotModalOpen, setIsForgotModalOpen] = useState(false);\r\n const [resetStep, setResetStep] = useState(1);\r\n const [resetEmail, setResetEmail] = useState('');\r\n const [resetCode, setResetCode] = useState('');\r\n const [newPassword, setNewPassword] = useState('');\r\n\r\n const handleForgotPassword = async () => {\r\n if (!resetEmail) return toast.error('Digite seu e-mail');\r\n setIsLoading(true);\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch('/api/auth/forgot-password', {\r\n method: 'POST',\r\n headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\r\n body: JSON.stringify({ email: resetEmail }),\r\n });\r\n const data = await res.json();\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n toast.success(data.message);\r\n setResetStep(2);\r\n // In dev, we can auto-fill the token if returned\r\n if (data.dev_token) {\r\n console.log('Dev Reset Token:', data.dev_token);\r\n setResetCode(data.dev_token);\r\n }\r\n } else {\r\n throw new Error(data.error);\r\n }\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n toast.error(error.message);\r\n } finally {\r\n setIsLoading(false);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleResetPassword = async () => {\r\n if (!resetCode || !newPassword) return toast.error('Preencha todos os campos');\r\n setIsLoading(true);\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch('/api/auth/reset-password', {\r\n method: 'POST',\r\n headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\r\n body: JSON.stringify({ email: resetEmail, token: resetCode, newPassword }),\r\n });\r\n const data = await res.json();\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n toast.success(data.message);\r\n setIsForgotModalOpen(false);\r\n setResetStep(1);\r\n } else {\r\n throw new Error(data.error);\r\n }\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n toast.error(error.message);\r\n } finally {\r\n setIsLoading(false);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleAuth = async (type: 'login' | 'register') => {\r\n setIsLoading(true);\r\n try {\r\n const payload = type === 'login'\r\n ? { email, password }\r\n : { email, password, type: regType, companyName, companySlug, inviteToken };\r\n\r\n const response = await fetch(`/api/auth/${type}`, {\r\n method: 'POST',\r\n headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\r\n body: JSON.stringify(payload),\r\n });\r\n\r\n const data = await response.json();\r\n\r\n if (!response.ok) {\r\n throw new Error(data.error || 'Erro na autenticação');\r\n }\r\n\r\n login(data.token, data.user);\r\n toast.success(type === 'login' ? 'Bem-vindo de volta!' : 'Conta criada com sucesso!');\r\n navigate('/');\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n toast.error(error.message);\r\n } finally {\r\n setIsLoading(false);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n return (\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n\r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n Pure Dev Dashboard\r\n \r\n Sua central de produtividade personalizada\r\n \r\n     \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Login\r\n Registro\r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setEmail(e.target.value)}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setPassword(e.target.value)}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n setIsForgotModalOpen(true)}\r\n className=\"text-xs text-primary hover:underline font-medium\"\r\n >\r\n Esqueci minha senha\r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n handleAuth('login')}\r\n disabled={isLoading}\r\n >\r\n {isLoading ? 'Carregando...' : <> Entrar}\r\n \r\n     \r\n\r\n \r\n {invitationInfo ? (\r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    Você foi convidado!
    \r\n
    \r\n Juntando-se a {invitationInfo.org_name} como {invitationInfo.role}.\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n ) : (\r\n /* Type Selector */\r\n
    \r\n setRegType('individual')}\r\n className={`p-3 rounded-xl border transition-all flex flex-col items-center gap-2 ${regType === 'individual' ? 'border-primary bg-primary/10 ring-1 ring-primary' : 'border-primary/10 hover:border-primary/30'}`}\r\n >\r\n \r\n Individual\r\n \r\n setRegType('company')}\r\n className={`p-3 rounded-xl border transition-all flex flex-col items-center gap-2 ${regType === 'company' ? 'border-primary bg-primary/10 ring-1 ring-primary' : 'border-primary/10 hover:border-primary/30'}`}\r\n >\r\n \r\n Empresa\r\n \r\n
    \r\n )}\r\n\r\n {!invitationInfo && regType === 'company' && (\r\n <>\r\n
    \r\n \r\n setCompanyName(e.target.value)}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n /\r\n setCompanySlug(e.target.value.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, ''))}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n )}\r\n\r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setEmail(e.target.value)}\r\n disabled={!!invitationInfo}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setPassword(e.target.value)}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n handleAuth('register')}\r\n disabled={isLoading}\r\n >\r\n {isLoading ? 'Criando conta...' : <> {regType === 'company' ? 'Registrar Empresa' : 'Criar Conta'}}\r\n \r\n     \r\n     \r\n     \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n Ou continue com\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n

    \r\n Ao continuar, você concorda com nossos Termos de Serviço e Política de Privacidade.\r\n

    \r\n     \r\n     \r\n\r\n {/* Forgot Password Modal */}\r\n {\r\n setIsForgotModalOpen(open);\r\n if (!open) setResetStep(1);\r\n }}>\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Recuperar Senha\r\n \r\n \r\n {resetStep === 1\r\n ? \"Digite seu e-mail para receber um código de recuperação.\"\r\n : \"Digite o código enviado e sua nova senha.\"}\r\n \r\n \r\n\r\n
    \r\n {resetStep === 1 ? (\r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setResetEmail(e.target.value)}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n ) : (\r\n <>\r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setResetCode(e.target.value)}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setNewPassword(e.target.value)}\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n )}\r\n
    \r\n\r\n \r\n \r\n {isLoading ? 'Aguarde...' : (\r\n resetStep === 1\r\n ? <> Enviar Código\r\n : <> Alterar Senha\r\n )}\r\n \r\n \r\n     \r\n     \r\n
    \r\n );\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport default Auth;\r\n","src/pages/Index.tsx":"import { useApp } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\nimport { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';\nimport { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport { ExtensionNavbar } from '@/components/ExtensionNavbar';\nimport { MusicPlayerBar } from '@/components/MusicPlayerBar';\nimport { CommandPalette } from '@/components/CommandPalette';\nimport { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils';\nimport React, { memo, useEffect, useState } from 'react';\nimport { DailyVerse } from '@/components/DailyVerse';\n\n// Direct imports for instant loading\nimport { Dashboard } from '@/components/Dashboard';\nimport { Notes } from '@/components/Notes';\nimport { Prompts } from '@/components/Prompts';\nimport { Snippets } from '@/components/Snippets';\nimport { Cheatsheet } from '@/components/Cheatsheet';\nimport { Kanban } from '@/components/Kanban';\nimport { Passwords } from '@/components/Passwords';\nimport { Contacts } from '@/components/Contacts';\nimport { Checklists } from '@/components/Checklists';\nimport { Finance } from '@/components/Finance';\nimport { Diary } from '@/components/Diary';\nimport { Draft } from '@/components/Draft';\nimport { Favorites } from '@/components/Favorites';\nimport { Wellness } from '@/components/Wellness';\nimport { Settings } from '@/components/Settings';\nimport { MusicPlayer } from '@/components/MusicPlayer';\nimport { Budgets } from '@/components/Budgets';\nimport { Pricing } from '@/components/Pricing';\nimport { Stock } from '@/components/Stock';\nimport { TechSheet } from '@/components/TechSheet';\nimport Tutorial from '@/components/Tutorial';\nimport { VideoPlayer } from '@/components/VideoPlayer';\nimport { UserProfile } from '@/components/UserProfile';\nimport { Billing } from '@/components/Billing';\nimport { ProjectExplorer } from '@/components/ProjectExplorer';\nimport { Integrations } from '@/components/Integrations';\nimport { Analytics } from '@/components/Analytics';\nimport { Wiki } from '@/components/Wiki';\nimport { AssetManager } from '@/components/AssetManager';\nimport { ActivityLog } from '@/components/ActivityLog';\n\n// Component map for cleaner rendering\nconst COMPONENT_MAP: Record = {\n dashboard: Dashboard,\n explorer: ProjectExplorer,\n tutorial: Tutorial,\n favorites: Favorites,\n notes: Notes,\n prompts: Prompts,\n snippets: Snippets,\n cheatsheet: Cheatsheet,\n kanban: Kanban,\n checklists: Checklists,\n passwords: Passwords,\n contacts: Contacts,\n orcamentos: Budgets,\n precificador: Pricing,\n estoque: Stock,\n fichatecnica: TechSheet,\n finance: Finance,\n diary: Diary,\n wellness: Wellness,\n musica: MusicPlayer,\n videos: VideoPlayer,\n draft: Draft,\n settings: Settings,\n profile: UserProfile,\n billing: Billing,\n integrations: Integrations,\n analytics: Analytics,\n wiki: Wiki,\n assets: AssetManager,\n activity: ActivityLog,\n};\n\nconst MainContent = memo(() => {\n const { currentTab, state, setCurrentTab } = useApp();\n\n // Redirect to dashboard if module is disabled\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!state.enabledModules.includes(currentTab)) {\n setCurrentTab('dashboard');\n }\n }, [currentTab, state.enabledModules, setCurrentTab]);\n\n const Component = COMPONENT_MAP[currentTab] || Dashboard;\n\n return (\n \n
    \n \n
    \n     \n );\n});\nMainContent.displayName = 'MainContent';\n\nconst Index = () => {\n const { isAuthenticated, isLoading: authLoading } = useAuth();\n const navigate = useNavigate();\n const [isPlayerVisible, setIsPlayerVisible] = useState(() => {\n const saved = localStorage.getItem('mini-player-visible');\n return saved !== 'false';\n });\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!authLoading && !isAuthenticated) {\n navigate('/auth');\n }\n }, [isAuthenticated, authLoading, navigate]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n const checkVisibility = () => {\n const saved = localStorage.getItem('mini-player-visible');\n setIsPlayerVisible(saved !== 'false');\n };\n\n window.addEventListener('storage', checkVisibility);\n\n return () => {\n window.removeEventListener('storage', checkVisibility);\n };\n }, []);\n\n return (\n
    \n {/* Mini Player */}\n {isPlayerVisible && }\n\n {/* Daily Verse */}\n \n\n {/* Extension Navbar */}\n \n\n {/* Main Content */}\n \n\n {/* Command Palette */}\n \n
    \n );\n};\n\nexport default Index;\n","src/pages/NotFound.tsx":"import { useLocation } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { useEffect } from \"react\";\n\nconst NotFound = () => {\n const location = useLocation();\n\n useEffect(() => {\n console.error(\"404 Error: User attempted to access non-existent route:\", location.pathname);\n }, [location.pathname]);\n\n return (\n
    \n
    \n

    404

    \n

    Oops! Page not found

    \n \n Return to Home\n \n
    \n
    \n );\n};\n\nexport default NotFound;\n","src/pages/OrgAdmin.tsx":"import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\r\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardFooter } from '@/components/ui/card';\r\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';\r\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';\r\nimport { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';\r\nimport { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';\r\nimport {\r\n Users,\r\n UserPlus,\r\n Building,\r\n ArrowLeft,\r\n Mail,\r\n Trash2,\r\n Shield,\r\n RefreshCw,\r\n Copy,\r\n CheckCircle2,\r\n Database,\r\n Clock,\r\n Palette,\r\n Layout,\r\n Image as ImageIcon\r\n} from 'lucide-react';\r\nimport { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\r\nimport { useAuth, Branding } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';\r\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\r\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\";\r\n\r\ninterface OrgMember {\r\n id: string;\r\n email: string;\r\n sub_role: string;\r\n created_at: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\ninterface Invitation {\r\n id: string;\r\n email: string;\r\n role: string;\r\n status: string;\r\n expires_at: string;\r\n token: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\ninterface OrgStats {\r\n members: number;\r\n pendingInvites: number;\r\n sharedAssets: number;\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst OrgAdmin = () => {\r\n const { user, token, isOrgAdmin, branding: globalBranding, refreshBranding } = useAuth();\r\n const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n\r\n // Member & Stats State\r\n const [members, setMembers] = useState([]);\r\n const [invitations, setInvitations] = useState([]);\r\n const [stats, setStats] = useState(null);\r\n const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);\r\n\r\n // Form state for invitations\r\n const [inviteEmail, setInviteEmail] = useState('');\r\n const [inviteRole, setInviteRole] = useState<'employee' | 'manager'>('employee');\r\n\r\n // State for branding\r\n const [brandingForm, setBrandingForm] = useState({\r\n name: '',\r\n logo_url: '',\r\n primary_color: '355 78% 56%',\r\n accent_color: '355 78% 56%'\r\n });\r\n\r\n useEffect(() => {\r\n if (!isOrgAdmin) {\r\n navigate('/');\r\n return;\r\n }\r\n fetchData();\r\n if (globalBranding) {\r\n setBrandingForm(globalBranding);\r\n }\r\n }, [isOrgAdmin, globalBranding]);\r\n\r\n const fetchData = async () => {\r\n setIsLoading(true);\r\n try {\r\n const headers = { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` };\r\n const [membersRes, invitesRes, statsRes, brandingRes] = await Promise.all([\r\n fetch('/api/org/members', { headers }),\r\n fetch('/api/org/invitations', { headers }),\r\n fetch('/api/org/stats', { headers }),\r\n fetch('/api/org/branding', { headers })\r\n ]);\r\n\r\n if (membersRes.ok && invitesRes.ok && statsRes.ok) {\r\n setMembers(await membersRes.json());\r\n setInvitations(await invitesRes.json());\r\n setStats(await statsRes.json());\r\n }\r\n if (brandingRes.ok) {\r\n const bData = await brandingRes.json();\r\n setBrandingForm(bData);\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Erro ao carregar dados da empresa');\r\n } finally {\r\n setIsLoading(false);\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleUpdateBranding = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\r\n e.preventDefault();\r\n const toastId = toast.loading('Salvando alterações...');\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch('/api/org/branding', {\r\n method: 'PATCH',\r\n headers: {\r\n 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`,\r\n 'Content-Type': 'application/json'\r\n },\r\n body: JSON.stringify(brandingForm)\r\n });\r\n\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n toast.success('Branding corporativo atualizado!', { id: toastId });\r\n refreshBranding();\r\n } else {\r\n toast.error('Erro ao atualizar branding', { id: toastId });\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Erro na conexão', { id: toastId });\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const handleInvite = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\r\n e.preventDefault();\r\n if (!inviteEmail) return;\r\n\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch('/api/org/invitations', {\r\n method: 'POST',\r\n headers: {\r\n 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`,\r\n 'Content-Type': 'application/json'\r\n },\r\n body: JSON.stringify({ email: inviteEmail, role: inviteRole })\r\n });\r\n\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n toast.success('Convite enviado com sucesso!');\r\n setInviteEmail('');\r\n fetchData();\r\n } else {\r\n const data = await res.json();\r\n toast.error(data.error || 'Erro ao enviar convite');\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Erro na conexão');\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n const copyInviteLink = (inviteToken: string) => {\r\n const link = `${window.location.origin}/#/auth?invite=${inviteToken}`;\r\n navigator.clipboard.writeText(link);\r\n toast.success('Link de convite copiado!');\r\n };\r\n\r\n const revokeInvitation = async (id: string) => {\r\n try {\r\n const res = await fetch(`/api/org/invitations/${id}`, {\r\n method: 'DELETE',\r\n headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }\r\n });\r\n if (res.ok) {\r\n toast.success('Convite revogado');\r\n fetchData();\r\n }\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n toast.error('Erro ao revogar convite');\r\n }\r\n };\r\n\r\n if (!isOrgAdmin) return null;\r\n\r\n return (\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n {/* Header */}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n

    \r\n {brandingForm.logo_url ? (\r\n \r\n ) : (\r\n \r\n )}\r\n {brandingForm.name || 'Painel Corporativo'}\r\n

    \r\n

    Gerencie sua identidade visual e equipe.

    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Visão Geral\r\n \r\n \r\n Branding & Estilo\r\n \r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n {/* Quick Stats */}\r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n Membros Ativos\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    {stats?.members || 0}
    \r\n     \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n Convites Pendentes\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    {stats?.pendingInvites || 0}
    \r\n     \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n Assets Compartilhados\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    {stats?.sharedAssets || 0}
    \r\n     \r\n \r\n
    \r\n\r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Equipe do Workspace\r\n \r\n Gerencie quem tem acesso aos recursos da sua empresa.\r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n {members.map((member) => (\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n {member.email[0].toUpperCase()}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    {member.email}
    \r\n
    \r\n {member.sub_role || 'employee'}\r\n
    \r\n Desde {new Date(member.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n Ativo\r\n {user?.id !== member.id && (\r\n \r\n )}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n ))}\r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n\r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Convidar Membro\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setInviteEmail(e.target.value)}\r\n className=\"h-10 border-primary/20 focus-visible:ring-primary\"\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n setInviteRole('employee')}\r\n >\r\n Funcionário\r\n \r\n setInviteRole('manager')}\r\n >\r\n Gerente\r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n     \r\n     \r\n\r\n {invitations.length > 0 && (\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Aguardando Aceite\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n {invitations.map((invite) => (\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n {invite.email}\r\n {invite.role}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n copyInviteLink(invite.token)}\r\n >\r\n Copiar Link\r\n \r\n revokeInvitation(invite.id)}\r\n >\r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n ))}\r\n     \r\n     \r\n )}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n\r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n Identidade Visual\r\n \r\n Personalize as cores e logo do Workspace para sua equipe.\r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n setBrandingForm({ ...brandingForm, name: e.target.value })}\r\n placeholder=\"Sua Empresa Ltda\"\r\n className=\"h-11 border-primary/20\"\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n\r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n setBrandingForm({ ...brandingForm, logo_url: e.target.value })}\r\n placeholder=\"https://sua-empresa.com/logo.png\"\r\n className=\"h-11 border-primary/20\"\r\n />\r\n
    \r\n {brandingForm.logo_url ? (\r\n \r\n ) : (\r\n \r\n )}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n\r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n setBrandingForm({ ...brandingForm, primary_color: e.target.value })}\r\n placeholder=\"355 78% 56%\"\r\n className=\"h-11 border-primary/20 font-mono text-xs\"\r\n />\r\n \r\n
    \r\n

    Exemplo: 220 70% 50% (Azul), 142 70% 45% (Verde)

    \r\n
    \r\n\r\n \r\n
    \r\n     \r\n     \r\n\r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n Prévia ao Vivo\r\n \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n {brandingForm.logo_url ? (\r\n \r\n ) : (\r\n \r\n )}\r\n {brandingForm.name || 'Sua Marca'}\r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n \r\n \r\n
    \r\n
    \r\n );\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport default OrgAdmin;\r\n","src/services/db.ts":"/**\n * IndexedDB Service Layer\n * Manages all high-volume entity data (notes, tasks, transactions, etc.)\n * Provides async CRUD with automatic connection management.\n */\n\n\ninterface StoreConfig {\n keyPath: string;\n indexes: Array<{ name: string; keyPath: string; unique?: boolean }>;\n}\n\n// Schema definition for all object stores\nconst STORE_SCHEMAS: Record = {\n notes: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n prompts: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n snippets: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n cheatsheet: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: 'category', keyPath: 'category' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n kanban: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: 'column', keyPath: 'column' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n passwords: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n bookmarks: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: 'category', keyPath: 'category' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n diary: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'date', keyPath: 'date' }, { name: 'projetoId', keyPath: 'projetoId' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n contacts: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n checklists: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n financialAccounts: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n financialCategories: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: 'type', keyPath: 'type' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n financialBudgets: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: 'month', keyPath: 'month' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n financialTransactions: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: 'date', keyPath: 'date' }, { name: 'categoryId', keyPath: 'categoryId' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n wellnessBreaks: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'dataHora', keyPath: 'dataHora' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n gamificationHistory: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'timestamp', keyPath: 'timestamp' }, { name: 'tipo', keyPath: 'tipo' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n budgets: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: 'status', keyPath: 'status' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n serviceCatalog: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n stockMaterials: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n techSheets: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n syncQueue: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'timestamp', keyPath: 'timestamp' }] },\n music: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [] },\n notifications: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }, { name: 'read', keyPath: 'read' }] },\n wikiArticles: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: 'category', keyPath: 'category' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n assets: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'projectId', keyPath: 'projectId' }, { name: 'category', keyPath: 'category' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n activityLogs: { keyPath: 'id', indexes: [{ name: 'entityType', keyPath: 'entityType' }, { name: 'severity', keyPath: 'severity' }, { name: 'timestamp', keyPath: 'timestamp' }, { name: '_updated', keyPath: '_updated' }] },\n};\n\nconst DB_VERSION = 4; // Incremented version to apply schema changes\nconst DB_NAME = 'devCenterDB';\n\nclass DevCenterDB {\n private db: IDBDatabase | null = null;\n private openPromise: Promise | null = null;\n\n /** Open (or reuse) the database connection */\n async open(): Promise {\n if (this.db) return this.db;\n if (this.openPromise) return this.openPromise;\n\n this.openPromise = new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n const request = indexedDB.open(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);\n\n request.onupgradeneeded = (event) => {\n const db = (event.target as IDBOpenDBRequest).result;\n for (const [storeName, config] of Object.entries(STORE_SCHEMAS)) {\n if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains(storeName)) {\n const store = db.createObjectStore(storeName, { keyPath: config.keyPath });\n for (const idx of config.indexes) {\n store.createIndex(idx.name, idx.keyPath, { unique: idx.unique ?? false });\n }\n }\n }\n };\n\n request.onsuccess = () => {\n this.db = request.result;\n // Handle unexpected close (e.g., browser upgrade)\n this.db.onclose = () => {\n this.db = null;\n this.openPromise = null;\n };\n resolve(this.db);\n };\n\n request.onerror = () => {\n this.openPromise = null;\n reject(request.error);\n };\n });\n\n return this.openPromise;\n }\n\n /** Get all records from a store */\n async getAll(storeName: string): Promise {\n const db = await this.open();\n return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n const tx = db.transaction(storeName, 'readonly');\n const store = tx.objectStore(storeName);\n const request = store.getAll();\n request.onsuccess = () => resolve(request.result as T[]);\n request.onerror = () => reject(request.error);\n });\n }\n\n /** Put (upsert) a single record */\n async put(storeName: string, item: T): Promise {\n const db = await this.open();\n return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n const tx = db.transaction(storeName, 'readwrite');\n const store = tx.objectStore(storeName);\n store.put(item);\n tx.oncomplete = () => resolve();\n tx.onerror = () => reject(tx.error);\n });\n }\n\n /** Delete a record by key */\n async delete(storeName: string, key: string): Promise {\n const db = await this.open();\n return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n const tx = db.transaction(storeName, 'readwrite');\n const store = tx.objectStore(storeName);\n store.delete(key);\n tx.oncomplete = () => resolve();\n tx.onerror = () => reject(tx.error);\n });\n }\n\n /** Replace all records in a store (clear + bulkPut in single transaction) */\n async replaceAll(storeName: string, items: T[]): Promise {\n const db = await this.open();\n return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n const tx = db.transaction(storeName, 'readwrite');\n const store = tx.objectStore(storeName);\n store.clear();\n for (const item of items) {\n store.put(item);\n }\n tx.oncomplete = () => resolve();\n tx.onerror = () => reject(tx.error);\n });\n }\n\n /** Clear a single store */\n async clear(storeName: string): Promise {\n const db = await this.open();\n return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n const tx = db.transaction(storeName, 'readwrite');\n const store = tx.objectStore(storeName);\n store.clear();\n tx.oncomplete = () => resolve();\n tx.onerror = () => reject(tx.error);\n });\n }\n\n /** Clear all stores (used during import) */\n async clearAll(): Promise {\n const db = await this.open();\n const storeNames = Array.from(db.objectStoreNames);\n return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n const tx = db.transaction(storeNames, 'readwrite');\n for (const name of storeNames) {\n tx.objectStore(name).clear();\n }\n tx.oncomplete = () => resolve();\n tx.onerror = () => reject(tx.error);\n });\n }\n\n /** Get store names for validation */\n getStoreNames(): string[] {\n return Object.keys(STORE_SCHEMAS);\n }\n}\n\n// Singleton\nexport const db = new DevCenterDB();\n","src/services/settingsStore.ts":"/**\n * Settings Store Adapter\n * Uses chrome.storage.local when available (Chrome Extension context),\n * falls back to localStorage with a prefix for web/preview environments.\n * Handles lightweight data: preferences, UI state, flags, small configs.\n */\n\nconst STORAGE_PREFIX = 'dcc_';\n\n// Runtime-safe access to chrome API (avoids TS errors outside extension context)\nconst getChromeStorage = (): typeof chrome.storage.local | null => {\n try {\n const g = globalThis as any;\n if (g.chrome?.storage?.local) {\n return g.chrome.storage.local;\n }\n } catch {\n // Not in Chrome extension context\n }\n return null;\n};\n\nclass SettingsStore {\n /** Get a single value */\n async get(key: string): Promise {\n const storage = getChromeStorage();\n if (storage) {\n return new Promise((resolve) => {\n storage.get(key, (result: Record) => {\n resolve(result[key] as T | undefined);\n });\n });\n }\n const raw = localStorage.getItem(`${STORAGE_PREFIX}${key}`);\n if (raw === null) return undefined;\n try {\n return JSON.parse(raw) as T;\n } catch {\n return undefined;\n }\n }\n\n /** Get multiple values at once */\n async getMany>(keys: string[]): Promise> {\n const storage = getChromeStorage();\n if (storage) {\n return new Promise((resolve) => {\n storage.get(keys, (result: Record) => {\n resolve(result as Partial);\n });\n });\n }\n const result: Record = {};\n for (const key of keys) {\n const raw = localStorage.getItem(`${STORAGE_PREFIX}${key}`);\n if (raw !== null) {\n try {\n result[key] = JSON.parse(raw);\n } catch {\n // Skip malformed entries\n }\n }\n }\n return result as Partial;\n }\n\n /** Set a single value */\n async set(key: string, value: any): Promise {\n const storage = getChromeStorage();\n if (storage) {\n return new Promise((resolve) => {\n storage.set({ [key]: value }, () => resolve());\n });\n }\n localStorage.setItem(`${STORAGE_PREFIX}${key}`, JSON.stringify(value));\n }\n\n /** Set multiple values at once (batched) */\n async setMany(items: Record): Promise {\n const storage = getChromeStorage();\n if (storage) {\n return new Promise((resolve) => {\n storage.set(items, () => resolve());\n });\n }\n for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(items)) {\n localStorage.setItem(`${STORAGE_PREFIX}${key}`, JSON.stringify(value));\n }\n }\n\n /** Remove a single key */\n async remove(key: string): Promise {\n const storage = getChromeStorage();\n if (storage) {\n return new Promise((resolve) => {\n storage.remove(key, () => resolve());\n });\n }\n localStorage.removeItem(`${STORAGE_PREFIX}${key}`);\n }\n\n /** Remove multiple keys */\n async removeMany(keys: string[]): Promise {\n const storage = getChromeStorage();\n if (storage) {\n return new Promise((resolve) => {\n storage.remove(keys, () => resolve());\n });\n }\n for (const key of keys) {\n localStorage.removeItem(`${STORAGE_PREFIX}${key}`);\n }\n }\n}\n\n// Singleton\nexport const settingsStore = new SettingsStore();\n","src/services/storageService.ts":"/**\n * Unified Storage Service\n * Orchestrates IndexedDB (entities) + SettingsStore (config) + in-memory cache.\n * Provides debounced incremental writes, automatic migration from localStorage,\n * and a clean API for the AppContext to consume.\n */\n\nimport { db } from './db';\nimport { settingsStore } from './settingsStore';\nimport type { AppState } from '@/contexts/AppContext';\n\n// For real-time sync between tabs\nconst syncChannel = new BroadcastChannel('devcenter-sync');\n\n// ─── Entity Mapping ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// Maps IDB store names to their accessor functions on AppState.\n// Used for both loading (reconstructing state) and saving (diffing).\n\ninterface EntityMapping {\n store: string;\n get: (state: AppState) => any[];\n}\n\nexport const ENTITY_MAP: EntityMapping[] = [\n { store: 'notes', get: (s) => s.notes },\n { store: 'prompts', get: (s) => s.prompts },\n { store: 'snippets', get: (s) => s.snippets },\n { store: 'cheatsheet', get: (s) => s.cheatsheet },\n { store: 'kanban', get: (s) => s.kanban },\n { store: 'passwords', get: (s) => s.passwords },\n { store: 'bookmarks', get: (s) => s.bookmarks },\n { store: 'diary', get: (s) => s.diary },\n { store: 'contacts', get: (s) => s.contacts },\n { store: 'checklists', get: (s) => s.checklists },\n { store: 'financialAccounts', get: (s) => s.financialAccounts },\n { store: 'financialCategories', get: (s) => s.financialCategories },\n { store: 'financialBudgets', get: (s) => s.financialBudgets },\n { store: 'financialTransactions', get: (s) => s.financialTransactions },\n { store: 'wellnessBreaks', get: (s) => s.wellnessStats.breaks },\n { store: 'gamificationHistory', get: (s) => s.gamificationStats.historico },\n { store: 'budgets', get: (s) => s.budgets },\n { store: 'serviceCatalog', get: (s) => s.serviceCatalog },\n { store: 'stockMaterials', get: (s) => s.stockMaterials },\n { store: 'techSheets', get: (s) => s.techSheets },\n { store: 'notifications', get: (s) => s.notifications },\n { store: 'wikiArticles', get: (s) => s.wikiArticles },\n { store: 'assets', get: (s) => s.assets },\n { store: 'activityLogs', get: (s) => s.activityLogs },\n];\n\n// Settings keys that map directly from AppState\nconst SETTINGS_KEYS = [\n 'projects', 'pomodoroStats', 'billingInfo', 'pricingData', 'draft',\n 'noteTemplates', 'taskTemplates', 'contactTags', 'enabledModules',\n 'musicPlayerVolume', 'musicPlayerShuffle', 'musicPlayerRepeat',\n 'encryptedPasswords', 'encryptedFinancial', 'encryptedContacts',\n 'encryptedChecklists', 'encryptedBudgets', 'encryptedPricingData',\n 'encryptedStock', 'encryptedTechSheets', 'integrations',\n] as const;\n\n// ─── Loaded Data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nexport interface LoadedData {\n state: AppState;\n currentProject: string;\n theme: string;\n}\n\n// ─── Storage Service ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nclass StorageService {\n private flushTimer: ReturnType | null = null;\n private pendingSyncs: Set = new Set(); // Store names that need syncing\n private pendingSettings: Record = {};\n private readonly DEBOUNCE_MS = 1000;\n private checkInterval: ReturnType | null = null;\n private currentPlan: string = 'free';\n\n private onRemoteUpdateCallback: (() => void) | null = null;\n\n constructor() {\n this.scheduleFlush = this.scheduleFlush.bind(this);\n this.processSyncQueue = this.processSyncQueue.bind(this);\n\n // Start background sync process (every 60 seconds for differential)\n this.checkInterval = setInterval(() => this.processSyncQueue(), 60000);\n\n // Listen for updates from other tabs\n syncChannel.onmessage = (event) => {\n console.log('[StorageService] Broadcast received:', event.data.type);\n if (this.onRemoteUpdateCallback) {\n this.onRemoteUpdateCallback();\n }\n };\n }\n\n onRemoteUpdate(callback: () => void) {\n this.onRemoteUpdateCallback = callback;\n }\n\n setPlan(plan: string) {\n this.currentPlan = plan || 'free';\n console.log(`[StorageService] Active Plan: ${this.currentPlan.toUpperCase()}`);\n }\n\n private broadcast(type: string, data?: any) {\n syncChannel.postMessage({ type, data, sender: Date.now() });\n }\n\n // ── Load ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n async loadAll(): Promise {\n const migrated = await settingsStore.get('dbMigrated');\n if (!migrated) {\n await this.migrateFromLocalStorage();\n }\n\n const entityResults = await Promise.all(\n ENTITY_MAP.map(async (m) => {\n try {\n const all = await db.getAll(m.store);\n // Filter out tombstones (deleted items) for the active state\n return { store: m.store, data: all.filter(item => !item._is_deleted) };\n } catch {\n return { store: m.store, data: [] };\n }\n })\n );\n\n const entityData: Record = {};\n for (const r of entityResults) {\n entityData[r.store] = r.data;\n }\n\n const allSettingsKeys = [\n ...SETTINGS_KEYS,\n 'currentProject', 'theme',\n 'lastRecurringCheck', 'lastFinancialRecurringCheck',\n 'gamificationCore',\n ];\n const settings = await settingsStore.getMany(allSettingsKeys);\n\n const gamificationCore = (settings as any).gamificationCore || {};\n const gamificationStats = {\n pontos: gamificationCore.pontos ?? 0,\n nivel: gamificationCore.nivel ?? 1,\n historico: entityData.gamificationHistory || [],\n badges: gamificationCore.badges || [],\n focusDuration: gamificationCore.focusDuration ?? 25,\n shortBreakDuration: gamificationCore.shortBreakDuration ?? 5,\n longBreakDuration: gamificationCore.longBreakDuration ?? 15,\n };\n\n const wellnessStats = {\n breaks: entityData.wellnessBreaks || [],\n };\n\n const state: AppState = {\n projects: (settings as any).projects || [{ id: 'default', name: 'Projeto Padrão', color: '#dc3545' }],\n notes: entityData.notes || [],\n prompts: entityData.prompts || [],\n snippets: entityData.snippets || [],\n cheatsheet: entityData.cheatsheet || [],\n kanban: entityData.kanban || [],\n passwords: entityData.passwords || [],\n bookmarks: entityData.bookmarks || [],\n diary: entityData.diary || [],\n draft: (settings as any).draft ?? '',\n pomodoroStats: (settings as any).pomodoroStats || { focusSessions: 0, totalMinutes: 0 },\n wellnessStats,\n gamificationStats,\n noteTemplates: (settings as any).noteTemplates || [],\n taskTemplates: (settings as any).taskTemplates || [],\n financialAccounts: entityData.financialAccounts || [],\n financialCategories: entityData.financialCategories || [],\n financialBudgets: entityData.financialBudgets || [],\n financialTransactions: entityData.financialTransactions || [],\n contacts: entityData.contacts || [],\n contactTags: (settings as any).contactTags || [],\n checklists: entityData.checklists || [],\n musicPlayerVolume: (settings as any).musicPlayerVolume ?? 0.7,\n musicPlayerShuffle: (settings as any).musicPlayerShuffle ?? false,\n musicPlayerRepeat: (settings as any).musicPlayerRepeat ?? false,\n billingInfo: (settings as any).billingInfo || {\n companyName: '', address: '', taxId: '', logoUrl: '', email: '', phone: '',\n },\n serviceCatalog: entityData.serviceCatalog || [],\n budgets: entityData.budgets || [],\n pricingData: (settings as any).pricingData || {\n fixedCosts: 0, desiredSalary: 0, taxesPercent: 0,\n hoursPerDay: 8, daysPerMonth: 22, idealHourlyRate: 0,\n },\n stockMaterials: entityData.stockMaterials || [],\n techSheets: entityData.techSheets || [],\n enabledModules: (settings as any).enabledModules || [\n 'dashboard', 'explorer', 'tutorial', 'wellness', 'musica', 'videos', 'favorites', 'notes',\n 'prompts', 'snippets', 'cheatsheet', 'kanban', 'checklists',\n 'passwords', 'contacts', 'orcamentos', 'precificador', 'estoque',\n 'fichatecnica', 'finance', 'diary', 'draft', 'settings', 'profile', 'billing', 'integrations', 'analytics', 'wiki', 'assets', 'activity'\n ],\n notifications: entityData.notifications || [],\n integrations: (settings as any).integrations || [\n { id: 'github', provider: 'github', name: 'GitHub', description: 'Sincronize seus repositórios e gerencie issues diretamente do dashboard.', icon: 'Github', status: 'disconnected', category: 'dev', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },\n { id: 'slack', provider: 'slack', name: 'Slack', description: 'Receba notificações e envie atualizações para seus canais de equipe.', icon: 'Slack', status: 'disconnected', category: 'comm', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },\n { id: 'discord', provider: 'discord', name: 'Discord', description: 'Integração com webhooks e bots para monitoramento em tempo real.', icon: 'MessageSquare', status: 'disconnected', category: 'comm', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },\n { id: 'gcalendar', provider: 'google', name: 'Google Calendar', description: 'Visualize seus compromissos e prazos integrados ao seu Kanban.', icon: 'Calendar', status: 'disconnected', category: 'productivity', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },\n { id: 'openai', provider: 'openai', name: 'OpenAI (GPT-4)', description: 'Poder de IA para seus prompts, notas e geração automática de código.', icon: 'Zap', status: 'disconnected', category: 'ai', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },\n ],\n wikiArticles: entityData.wikiArticles || [],\n assets: entityData.assets || [],\n activityLogs: entityData.activityLogs || [],\n encryptedPasswords: (settings as any).encryptedPasswords,\n encryptedFinancial: (settings as any).encryptedFinancial,\n encryptedContacts: (settings as any).encryptedContacts,\n encryptedChecklists: (settings as any).encryptedChecklists,\n encryptedBudgets: (settings as any).encryptedBudgets,\n encryptedPricingData: (settings as any).encryptedPricingData,\n encryptedStock: (settings as any).encryptedStock,\n encryptedTechSheets: (settings as any).encryptedTechSheets,\n };\n\n return {\n state,\n currentProject: (settings as any).currentProject || 'default',\n theme: (settings as any).theme || 'dark',\n };\n }\n\n // ── Diff & Persist ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\n async diffAndPersist(prev: AppState, next: AppState): Promise {\n const timestamp = Date.now();\n\n for (const mapping of ENTITY_MAP) {\n const prevData = mapping.get(prev) || [];\n const nextData = mapping.get(next) || [];\n\n if (prevData === nextData) continue;\n\n const prevMap = new Map(prevData.map((i: any) => [i.id, i]));\n const nextMap = new Map(nextData.map((i: any) => [i.id, i]));\n\n const changes: Promise[] = [];\n\n // Detect Added or Modified\n for (const item of nextData) {\n const prevItem = prevMap.get(item.id);\n if (!prevItem || JSON.stringify(prevItem) !== JSON.stringify(item)) {\n // Optimized: Only write if truly different\n changes.push(db.put(mapping.store, { ...item, _updated: timestamp }));\n }\n }\n\n // Detect Deleted (Tombstones)\n for (const item of prevData) {\n if (!nextMap.has(item.id)) {\n changes.push(db.put(mapping.store, { ...item, _is_deleted: true, _updated: timestamp }));\n }\n }\n\n if (changes.length > 0) {\n await Promise.all(changes);\n this.pendingSyncs.add(mapping.store);\n this.scheduleFlush();\n }\n }\n\n // Settings logic remains similar but debounced\n const settingsChanges: Record = {};\n for (const key of SETTINGS_KEYS) {\n if ((prev as any)[key] !== (next as any)[key]) {\n settingsChanges[key] = (next as any)[key];\n }\n }\n\n if (\n prev.gamificationStats.pontos !== next.gamificationStats.pontos ||\n prev.gamificationStats.nivel !== next.gamificationStats.nivel ||\n prev.gamificationStats.badges !== next.gamificationStats.badges ||\n prev.gamificationStats.focusDuration !== next.gamificationStats.focusDuration ||\n prev.gamificationStats.shortBreakDuration !== next.gamificationStats.shortBreakDuration ||\n prev.gamificationStats.longBreakDuration !== next.gamificationStats.longBreakDuration\n ) {\n settingsChanges.gamificationCore = {\n pontos: next.gamificationStats.pontos,\n nivel: next.gamificationStats.nivel,\n badges: next.gamificationStats.badges,\n focusDuration: next.gamificationStats.focusDuration,\n shortBreakDuration: next.gamificationStats.shortBreakDuration,\n longBreakDuration: next.gamificationStats.longBreakDuration,\n };\n }\n\n if (Object.keys(settingsChanges).length > 0) {\n this.queueSettingsWrite(settingsChanges);\n }\n }\n\n queueSettingsWrite(updates: Record): void {\n Object.assign(this.pendingSettings, updates);\n this.scheduleFlush();\n\n const cloudSettings = ['theme', 'enabledModules', 'currentProject'];\n const filtered: any = {};\n for (const key of cloudSettings) {\n if (updates[key] !== undefined) filtered[key] = updates[key];\n }\n if (Object.keys(filtered).length > 0) {\n this.syncSettingsToCloud(filtered);\n }\n }\n\n private async syncSettingsToCloud(settings: any) {\n const token = localStorage.getItem('auth_token');\n if (!token) return;\n try {\n await fetch('/api/settings', {\n method: 'POST',\n headers: {\n 'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`\n },\n body: JSON.stringify(settings)\n });\n } catch (err) {\n console.warn('[StorageService] Settings sync failed:', err);\n }\n }\n\n async getSettings(keys: string[]): Promise> {\n return settingsStore.getMany(keys);\n }\n\n private scheduleFlush(): void {\n if (this.flushTimer) clearTimeout(this.flushTimer);\n this.flushTimer = setTimeout(() => this.flush(), this.DEBOUNCE_MS);\n }\n\n // ── Flush ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n async flush(): Promise {\n if (this.flushTimer) {\n clearTimeout(this.flushTimer);\n this.flushTimer = null;\n }\n\n // 1. Flush Settings\n if (Object.keys(this.pendingSettings).length > 0) {\n await settingsStore.setMany({ ...this.pendingSettings });\n this.pendingSettings = {};\n }\n\n // 2. Differential Cloud Sync\n const token = localStorage.getItem('auth_token');\n if (token && this.currentPlan === 'pro' && this.pendingSyncs.size > 0) {\n const storesToSync = Array.from(this.pendingSyncs);\n this.pendingSyncs.clear();\n\n for (const store of storesToSync) {\n try {\n const syncKey = `lastSync_${store}`;\n const lastSync = await settingsStore.get(syncKey) || 0;\n\n // Fetch only items modified since last sync\n const allItems = await db.getAll(store);\n const modifiedItems = allItems.filter(item => (item._updated || 0) > lastSync);\n\n if (modifiedItems.length === 0) continue;\n\n console.log(`[StorageService] Syncing ${modifiedItems.length} items for ${store}...`);\n\n const res = await fetch(`/api/entities/${store}/sync`, {\n method: 'POST',\n headers: {\n 'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`\n },\n body: JSON.stringify({ items: modifiedItems })\n });\n\n if (res.ok) {\n const result = await res.json();\n await settingsStore.set(syncKey, Date.now());\n\n // Post-Sync Cleanup: Physically remove tombstones that are now on server\n const tombstones = modifiedItems.filter(i => i._is_deleted);\n for (const t of tombstones) {\n await db.delete(store, t.id);\n }\n\n if (result.conflicts?.length > 0) {\n console.warn(`[StorageService] Conflicts in ${store} handled.`, result.conflicts);\n for (const c of result.conflicts) {\n await db.put(store, { ...c.serverData, _v: c.serverVersion, _updated: Date.now() });\n }\n this.broadcast('local-update');\n }\n } else {\n // Queue for later\n await this.saveToSyncQueue(store, modifiedItems);\n }\n } catch (err) {\n console.error(`[StorageService] Failed to sync ${store}:`, err);\n }\n }\n }\n\n this.broadcast('local-update');\n }\n\n // ── Sync Queue ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n private async saveToSyncQueue(store: string, items: any[]): Promise {\n const queueItem = {\n id: `${store}-${Date.now()}`,\n store,\n items,\n timestamp: Date.now(),\n attempts: 0\n };\n await db.put('syncQueue', queueItem);\n }\n\n async processSyncQueue(): Promise {\n const token = localStorage.getItem('auth_token');\n if (!token || this.currentPlan !== 'pro') return;\n\n try {\n const queue = await db.getAll('syncQueue');\n if (queue.length === 0) return;\n\n for (const item of queue) {\n try {\n const res = await fetch(`/api/entities/${item.store}/sync`, {\n method: 'POST',\n headers: {\n 'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`\n },\n body: JSON.stringify({ items: item.items })\n });\n\n if (res.ok) {\n await db.delete('syncQueue', item.id);\n // Cleanup tombstones if any\n for (const i of item.items) {\n if (i._is_deleted) await db.delete(item.store, i.id);\n }\n } else {\n item.attempts = (item.attempts || 0) + 1;\n if (item.attempts > 10) await db.delete('syncQueue', item.id);\n else await db.put('syncQueue', item);\n }\n } catch (e) { break; }\n }\n } catch (err) { console.error('[StorageService] Queue error:', err); }\n }\n\n // ── Cloud Fetch ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n /** Fetch all data
