from cloud and merge into local DB */\n async syncFromCloud(): Promise {\n const token = localStorage.getItem('auth_token');\n if (!token) return;\n\n try {\n console.log('[StorageService] Syncing from cloud...');\n\n // 1. Sync Settings\n const setRes = await fetch('/api/settings', {\n headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }\n });\n if (setRes.ok) {\n const settings = await setRes.json();\n if (Object.keys(settings).length > 0) {\n await settingsStore.setMany(settings);\n // Trigger theme application if needed (simplified here, AppContext handles it normally on next load)\n }\n }\n\n // 2. Sync Entities\n const results = await Promise.all(\n ENTITY_MAP.map(async (m) => {\n const res = await fetch(`/api/entities/${m.store}`, {\n headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }\n });\n if (res.ok) return { store: m.store, items: await res.json() };\n return { store: m.store, items: [] };\n })\n );\n\n const dbPromises = results.map(r => {\n if (r.items.length > 0) {\n // Map cloud items back to local format with versioning\n const localItems = r.items.map((i: any) => ({\n ...i,\n _v: i._serverV,\n projectId: i._projectId || i.projectId\n }));\n return db.replaceAll(r.store, localItems);\n }\n return Promise.resolve();\n });\n\n await Promise.all(dbPromises);\n console.log('[StorageService] Cloud sync complete.');\n } catch (err) {\n console.error('[StorageService] Cloud fetch failed:', err);\n }\n }\n\n // ── Import ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n /** Import full AppState from an external source (backup restore) */\n async importAll(appState: AppState, extras?: { theme?: string; currentProject?: string }): Promise {\n // Clear all IDB stores\n await db.clearAll();\n\n // Write entity data to IDB\n const entityPromises: Promise[] = [];\n for (const mapping of ENTITY_MAP) {\n const items = mapping.get(appState);\n if (items && items.length > 0) {\n entityPromises.push(db.replaceAll(mapping.store, items));\n }\n }\n await Promise.all(entityPromises);\n\n // Write settings\n const settingsData: Record = {\n dbMigrated: true,\n };\n\n for (const key of SETTINGS_KEYS) {\n if ((appState as any)[key] !== undefined) {\n settingsData[key] = (appState as any)[key];\n }\n }\n\n // Gamification core\n settingsData.gamificationCore = {\n pontos: appState.gamificationStats.pontos,\n nivel: appState.gamificationStats.nivel,\n badges: appState.gamificationStats.badges,\n focusDuration: appState.gamificationStats.focusDuration,\n shortBreakDuration: appState.gamificationStats.shortBreakDuration,\n longBreakDuration: appState.gamificationStats.longBreakDuration,\n };\n\n // Extra settings\n if (extras?.theme) settingsData.theme = extras.theme;\n if (extras?.currentProject) settingsData.currentProject = extras.currentProject;\n\n await settingsStore.setMany(settingsData);\n }\n\n // ── Migration ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n /** One-time migration from old localStorage JSON blob */\n private async migrateFromLocalStorage(): Promise {\n const raw = localStorage.getItem('devCommandCenter');\n if (!raw) {\n await settingsStore.set('dbMigrated', true);\n return;\n }\n\n try {\n const data = JSON.parse(raw);\n\n // Write entity data to IDB\n const entityWrites: Promise[] = [];\n const entityFieldMap: Record = {\n notes: 'notes',\n prompts: 'prompts',\n snippets: 'snippets',\n cheatsheet: 'cheatsheet',\n kanban: 'kanban',\n passwords: 'passwords',\n bookmarks: 'bookmarks',\n diary: 'diary',\n contacts: 'contacts',\n checklists: 'checklists',\n financialAccounts: 'financialAccounts',\n financialCategories: 'financialCategories',\n financialBudgets: 'financialBudgets',\n financialTransactions: 'financialTransactions',\n budgets: 'budgets',\n serviceCatalog: 'serviceCatalog',\n stockMaterials: 'stockMaterials',\n techSheets: 'techSheets',\n };\n\n for (const [store, field] of Object.entries(entityFieldMap)) {\n const items = data[field];\n if (Array.isArray(items) && items.length > 0) {\n entityWrites.push(db.replaceAll(store, items));\n }\n }\n\n // Special nested fields\n if (data.wellnessStats?.breaks?.length > 0) {\n entityWrites.push(db.replaceAll('wellnessBreaks', data.wellnessStats.breaks));\n }\n if (data.gamificationStats?.historico?.length > 0) {\n entityWrites.push(db.replaceAll('gamificationHistory', data.gamificationStats.historico));\n }\n\n await Promise.all(entityWrites);\n\n // Write settings\n const settingsData: Record = {\n dbMigrated: true,\n };\n\n // Simple settings\n for (const key of SETTINGS_KEYS) {\n if (data[key] !== undefined) {\n settingsData[key] = data[key];\n }\n }\n\n // Gamification core (without historico)\n if (data.gamificationStats) {\n settingsData.gamificationCore = {\n pontos: data.gamificationStats.pontos ?? 0,\n nivel: data.gamificationStats.nivel ?? 1,\n badges: data.gamificationStats.badges || [],\n focusDuration: data.gamificationStats.focusDuration ?? 25,\n shortBreakDuration: data.gamificationStats.shortBreakDuration ?? 5,\n longBreakDuration: data.gamificationStats.longBreakDuration ?? 15,\n };\n }\n\n // Migrate theme, currentProject from separate localStorage keys\n const theme = localStorage.getItem('theme');\n if (theme) settingsData.theme = theme;\n\n const currentProject = localStorage.getItem('currentProject');\n if (currentProject) settingsData.currentProject = currentProject;\n\n const lastRecurringCheck = localStorage.getItem('lastRecurringCheck');\n if (lastRecurringCheck) settingsData.lastRecurringCheck = lastRecurringCheck;\n\n const lastFinancialCheck = localStorage.getItem('lastFinancialRecurringCheck');\n if (lastFinancialCheck) settingsData.lastFinancialRecurringCheck = lastFinancialCheck;\n\n await settingsStore.setMany(settingsData);\n\n console.log('[StorageService] Migration from localStorage complete.');\n } catch (err) {\n console.error('[StorageService] Migration failed:', err);\n // Mark as migrated to avoid retry loops; old data remains in localStorage as backup\n await settingsStore.set('dbMigrated', true);\n }\n }\n}\n\n// Singleton\nexport const storageService = new StorageService();\n","src/vite-env.d.ts":"/// \n","public/audios/lofi/.gitkeep":"# Coloque seus arquivos de música lo-fi aqui\n# Formato: .mp3, .wav, .ogg\n# Exemplo: lofi-beats.mp3\n","public/audios/meditation/.gitkeep":"# Coloque seus arquivos de meditação aqui\n# Formato: .mp3, .wav, .ogg\n# Exemplo: meditation-1.mp3\n","public/audios/whitenoise/.gitkeep":"# Coloque seus arquivos de ruído branco aqui\n# Formato: .mp3, .wav, .ogg\n# Exemplo: whitenoise-calm.mp3\n","public/background.js":"// Background service worker for Chrome Extension\n// Opens a new tab when extension icon is clicked\n\nchrome.action.onClicked.addListener(() => {\n chrome.tabs.create({ url: chrome.runtime.getURL('index.html') });\n});\n\n// Listen for installation\nchrome.runtime.onInstalled.addListener(() => {\n console.log('DevCenter extension installed');\n});\n","public/manifest.json":"{\n \"manifest_version\": 3,\n \"name\": \"DevCenter - Central de Comando\",\n \"description\": \"Hub completo para desenvolvedores: Notas, Kanban, Snippets, Prompts IA, Gerenciador de Senhas e mais\",\n \"version\": \"1.0.0\",\n \"icons\": {\n \"16\": \"icons/icon16.png\",\n \"32\": \"icons/icon32.png\",\n \"48\": \"icons/icon48.png\",\n \"128\": \"icons/icon128.png\"\n },\n \"action\": {\n \"default_icon\": {\n \"16\": \"icons/icon16.png\",\n \"32\": \"icons/icon32.png\",\n \"48\": \"icons/icon48.png\"\n },\n \"default_title\": \"Abrir DevCenter\"\n },\n \"permissions\": [\n \"storage\"\n ],\n \"background\": {\n \"service_worker\": \"background.js\",\n \"type\": \"module\"\n }\n}\n","public/placeholder.svg":"","public/robots.txt":"User-agent: Googlebot\nAllow: /\n\nUser-agent: Bingbot\nAllow: /\n\nUser-agent: Twitterbot\nAllow: /\n\nUser-agent: facebookexternalhit\nAllow: /\n\nUser-agent: *\nAllow: /\n","server/.env":"PORT=5000\r\nJWT_SECRET=super-secret-dev-key-123\r\nALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:8080,http://localhost:8081,https://young-months-jam.loca.lt,https://cake-respondent-passengers-quotes.trycloudflare.com\r\nDATABASE_URL=database.sqlite\r\nNODE_ENV=development\r\n","server/package-lock.json":"{\n \"name\": \"server\",\n \"version\": \"1.0.0\",\n \"lockfileVersion\": 3,\n \"requires\": true,\n \"packages\": {\n \"\": {\n \"name\": \"server\",\n \"version\": \"1.0.0\",\n \"license\": \"ISC\",\n \"dependencies\": {\n \"@types/express-rate-limit\": \"^5.1.3\",\n \"bcryptjs\": \"^3.0.3\",\n \"better-sqlite3\": \"^12.6.2\",\n \"cors\": \"^2.8.6\",\n \"dotenv\": \"^17.3.1\",\n \"express\": \"^5.2.1\",\n \"express-rate-limit\": \"^8.3.0\",\n \"express-slow-down\": \"^3.0.1\",\n \"helmet\": \"^8.1.0\",\n \"hpp\": \"^0.2.3\",\n \"jsonwebtoken\": \"^9.0.3\",\n \"morgan\": \"^1.10.1\",\n \"uuid\": \"^13.0.0\",\n \"zod\": \"^4.3.6\"\n },\n \"devDependencies\": {\n \"@types/bcryptjs\": \"^2.4.6\",\n \"@types/better-sqlite3\": \"^7.6.13\",\n \"@types/cors\": \"^2.8.19\",\n \"@types/express\": \"^5.0.6\",\n \"@types/jsonwebtoken\": \"^9.0.10\",\n \"@types/morgan\": \"^1.9.10\",\n \"@types/node\": \"^25.3.5\",\n \"@types/uuid\": \"^10.0.0\",\n \"ts-node-dev\": \"^2.0.0\",\n \"typescript\": \"^5.9.3\"\n }\n },\n \"node_modules/@cspotcode/source-map-support\": {\n \"version\": \"0.8.1\",\n \"resolved\": \"https://registry.npmjs.org/@cspotcode/source-map-support/-/source-map-support-0.8.1.tgz\",\n \"integrity\": \"sha512-IchNf6dN4tHoMFIn/7OE8LWZ19Y6q/67Bmf6vnGREv8RSbBVb9LPJxEcnwrcwX6ixSvaiGoomAUvu4YSxXrVgw==\",\n \"dev\": true,\n \"license\": \"MIT\",\n \"dependencies\": {\n \"@jridgewell/trace-mapping\": \"0.3.9\"\n },\n \"engines\": {\n \"node\": \">=12\"\n }\n },\n \"node_modules/@jridgewell/resolve-uri\": {\n \"version\": \"3.1.2\",\n \"resolved\": \"https://registry.npmjs.org/@jridgewell/resolve-uri/-/resolve-uri-3.1.2.tgz\",\n \"integrity\": \"sha512-bRISgCIjP20/tbWSPWMEi54QVPRZExkuD9lJL+UIxUKtwVJA8wW1Trb1jMs1RFXo1CBTNZ/5hpC9QvmKWdopKw==\",\n \"dev\": true,\n \"license\": \"MIT\",\n \"engines\": {\n \"node\": \">=6.0.0\"\n }\n },\n \"node_modules/@jridgewell/sourcemap-codec\": {\n \"version\": \"1.5.5\",\n \"resolved\": \"https://registry.npmjs.org/@jridgewell/sourcemap-codec/-/sourcemap-codec-1.5.5.tgz\",\n \"integrity\": \"sha512-cYQ9310grqxueWbl+WuIUIaiUaDcj7WOq5fVhEljNVgRfOUhY9fy2zTvfoqWsnebh8Sl70VScFbICvJnLKB0Og==\",\n \"dev\": true,\n \"license\": \"MIT\"\n },\n \"node_modules/@jridgewell/trace-mapping\": {\n \"version\": \"0.3.9\",\n \"resolved\": \"https://registry.npmjs.org/@jridgewell/trace-mapping/-/trace-mapping-0.3.9.tgz\",\n \"integrity\": \"sha512-3Belt6tdc8bPgAtbcmdtNJlirVoTmEb5e2gC94PnkwEW9jI6CAHUeoG85tjWP5WquqfavoMtMwiG4P926ZKKuQ==\",\n \"dev\": true,\n \"license\": \"MIT\",\n \"dependencies\": {\n \"@jridgewell/resolve-uri\": \"^3.0.3\",\n \"@jridgewell/sourcemap-codec\": \"^1.4.10\"\n }\n },\n \"node_modules/@tsconfig/node10\": {\n \"version\": \"1.0.12\",\n \"resolved\": \"https://registry.npmjs.org/@tsconfig/node10/-/node10-1.0.12.tgz\",\n \"integrity\": \"sha512-UCYBaeFvM11aU2y3YPZ//O5Rhj+xKyzy7mvcIoAjASbigy8mHMryP5cK7dgjlz2hWxh1g5pLw084E0a/wlUSFQ==\",\n \"dev\": true,\n \"license\": \"MIT\"\n },\n \"node_modules/@tsconfig/node12\": {\n \"version\": \"1.0.11\",\n \"resolved\": \"https://registry.npmjs.org/@tsconfig/node12/-/node12-1.0.11.tgz\",\n \"integrity\": \"sha512-cqefuRsh12pWyGsIoBKJA9luFu3mRxCA+ORZvA4ktLSzIuCUtWVxGIuXigEwO5/ywWFMZ2QEGKWvkZG1zDMTag==\",\n \"dev\": true,\n \"license\": \"MIT\"\n },\n \"node_modules/@tsconfig/node14\": {\n \"version\": \"1.0.3\",\n \"resolved\": \"https://registry.npmjs.org/@tsconfig/node14/-/node14-1.0.3.tgz\",\n \"integrity\": \"sha512-ysT8mhdixWK6Hw3i1V2AeRqZ5WfXg1G43mqoYlM2nc6388Fq5jcXyr5mRsqViLx/GJYdoL0bfXD8nmF+Zn/Iow==\",\n \"dev\": true,\n \"license\": \"MIT\"\n },\n \"node_modules/@tsconfig/node16\": {\n \"version\": \"1.0.4\",\n \"resolved\": \"https://registry.npmjs.org/@tsconfig/node16/-/node16-1.0.4.tgz\",\n \"integrity\": \"sha512-vxhUy4J8lyeyinH7Azl1pdd43GJhZH/tP2weN8TntQblOY+A0XbT8DJk1/oCPuOOyg/Ja757rG0CgHcWC8OfMA==\",\n \"dev\": true,\n \"license\": \"MIT\"\n },\n \"node_modules/@types/bcryptjs\": {\n \"version\": \"2.4.6\",\n \"resolved\": \"https://registry.npmjs.org/@types/bcryptjs/-/bcryptjs-2.4.6.tgz\",\n \"integrity\": \"sha512-9xlo6R2qDs5uixm0bcIqCeMCE6HiQsIyel9KQySStiyqNl2tnj2mP3DX1Nf56MD6KMenNNlBBsy3LJ7gUEQPXQ==\",\n \"dev\": true,\n \"license\": \"MIT\"\n },\n \"node_modules/@types/better-sqlite3\": {\n \"ISC\",\n \"type\": \"commonjs\",\n \"dependencies\": {\n \"@types/express-rate-limit\": \"^5.1.3\",\n \"bcryptjs\": \"^3.0.3\",\n \"better-sqlite3\": \"^12.6.2\",\n \"cors\": \"^2.8.6\",\n \"dotenv\": \"^17.3.1\",\n \"express\": \"^5.2.1\",\n \"express-rate-limit\": \"^8.3.0\",\n \"express-slow-down\": \"^3.0.1\",\n \"helmet\": \"^8.1.0\",\n \"hpp\": \"^0.2.3\",\n \"jsonwebtoken\": \"^9.0.3\",\n \"morgan\": \"^1.10.1\",\n \"uuid\": \"^13.0.0\",\n \"zod\": \"^4.3.6\"\n },\n \"devDependencies\": {\n \"@types/bcryptjs\": \"^2.4.6\",\n \"@types/better-sqlite3\": \"^7.6.13\",\n \"@types/cors\": \"^2.8.19\",\n \"@types/express\": \"^5.0.6\",\n \"@types/jsonwebtoken\": \"^9.0.10\",\n \"@types/morgan\": \"^1.9.10\",\n \"@types/node\": \"^25.3.5\",\n \"@types/uuid\": \"^10.0.0\",\n \"ts-node-dev\": \"^2.0.0\",\n \"typescript\": \"^5.9.3\"\n }\n}\n","server/reset_pass_fixed.cjs":"const Database = require('better-sqlite3');\r\nconst bcrypt = require('bcryptjs');\r\nconst db = new Database('database.sqlite');\r\nconst email = 'dev.luizpaulo@gmail.com';\r\nconst newPass = 'dev123456';\r\n\r\nbcrypt.hash(newPass, 10, (err, hash) => {\r\n if (err) throw err;\r\n const result = db.prepare('UPDATE users SET password = ? WHERE email = ?').run(hash, email);\r\n if (result.changes > 0) {\r\n console.log('SUCCESS: Password for ' + email + ' reset to ' + newPass);\r\n } else {\r\n console.log('FAILED: User not found or no changes made.');\r\n }\r\n process.exit(0);\r\n});\r\n","server/reset_pass_local.cjs":"const Database = require('better-sqlite3');\r\nconst bcrypt = require('bcryptjs');\r\nconst db = new Database('server/database.sqlite');\r\nconst email = 'dev.luizpaulo@gmail.com';\r\nconst newPass = 'dev123456';\r\n\r\nbcrypt.hash(newPass, 10, (err, hash) => {\r\n if (err) throw err;\r\n const result = db.prepare('UPDATE users SET password = ? WHERE email = ?').run(hash, email);\r\n if (result.changes > 0) {\r\n console.log('SUCCESS: Password for ' + email + ' reset to ' + newPass);\r\n } else {\r\n console.log('FAILED: User not found or no changes made.');\r\n }\r\n process.exit(0);\r\n});\r\n","server/src/db/index.ts":"import Database from 'better-sqlite3';\r\nimport path from 'path';\r\n\r\nconst dbPath = path.join(__dirname, '../../database.sqlite');\r\nconst db = new Database(dbPath);\r\n\r\n// Enable foreign keys\r\ndb.pragma('foreign_keys = ON');\r\n\r\n// Initialize tables\r\nexport const initDB = () => {\r\n db.exec(`\r\n CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\r\n id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\r\n email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\r\n password TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n organization_id TEXT, -- NULL for B2C users\r\n sub_role TEXT DEFAULT 'user' -- org_admin, manager, user\r\n );\r\n\r\n CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS organizations (\r\n id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\r\n name TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n slug TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\r\n owner_id TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n plan TEXT DEFAULT 'corporate_starter',\r\n settings TEXT DEFAULT '{}',\r\n created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n FOREIGN KEY (owner_id) REFERENCES users(id)\r\n );\r\n\r\n CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS entities (\r\n id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\r\n userId TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n organization_id TEXT, -- To support shared assets\r\n access_level TEXT DEFAULT 'private', -- private or shared\r\n type TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n content TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\r\n FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL\r\n );\r\n\r\n CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS settings (\r\n userId TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\r\n theme TEXT DEFAULT 'dark',\r\n enabledModules TEXT,\r\n currentProject TEXT,\r\n FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\r\n );\r\n\r\n CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_configs (\r\n key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\r\n value TEXT NOT NULL\r\n );\r\n\r\n CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invitations (\r\n id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\r\n organization_id TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n email TEXT NOT NULL,\r\n role TEXT DEFAULT 'employee',\r\n token TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\r\n status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending, accepted, expired\r\n expires_at DATETIME NOT NULL,\r\n created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE\r\n );\r\n `);\r\n\r\n // Initialize default system configs\r\n const maintenance = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM system_configs WHERE key = ?').get('maintenance_mode');\r\n if (!maintenance) {\r\n db.prepare('INSERT INTO system_configs (key, value) VALUES (?, ?)').run('maintenance_mode', 'false');\r\n }\r\n const broadcast = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM system_configs WHERE key = ?').get('global_broadcast');\r\n if (!broadcast) {\r\n db.prepare('INSERT INTO system_configs (key, value) VALUES (?, ?)').run('global_broadcast', '');\r\n }\r\n\r\n // Migrations for entities table\r\n const columns = db.prepare(\"PRAGMA table_info(entities)\").all() as any[];\r\n const columnNames = columns.map(c => c.name);\r\n\r\n if (!columnNames.includes('version')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE entities ADD COLUMN version INTEGER DEFAULT 1\");\r\n }\r\n if (!columnNames.includes('project_id')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE entities ADD COLUMN project_id TEXT\");\r\n }\r\n if (!columnNames.includes('is_deleted')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE entities ADD COLUMN is_deleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT 0\");\r\n }\r\n if (!columnNames.includes('updated_at')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE entities ADD COLUMN updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\");\r\n }\r\n if (!columnNames.includes('organization_id')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE entities ADD COLUMN organization_id TEXT\");\r\n }\r\n if (!columnNames.includes('access_level')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE entities ADD COLUMN access_level TEXT DEFAULT 'private'\");\r\n }\r\n\r\n // Migrations for users table\r\n const userColumns = db.prepare(\"PRAGMA table_info(users)\").all() as any[];\r\n const userColumnNames = userColumns.map(c => c.name);\r\n\r\n if (!userColumnNames.includes('reset_token')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN reset_token TEXT\");\r\n }\r\n if (!userColumnNames.includes('reset_expires')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN reset_expires DATETIME\");\r\n }\r\n if (!userColumnNames.includes('role')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN role TEXT DEFAULT 'user'\");\r\n }\r\n if (!userColumnNames.includes('plan')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN plan TEXT DEFAULT 'free'\");\r\n }\r\n if (!userColumnNames.includes('stripe_customer_id')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN stripe_customer_id TEXT\");\r\n }\r\n if (!userColumnNames.includes('organization_id')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN organization_id TEXT\");\r\n }\r\n if (!userColumnNames.includes('sub_role')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN sub_role TEXT DEFAULT 'user'\");\r\n }\r\n if (!userColumnNames.includes('name')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN name TEXT\");\r\n }\r\n if (!userColumnNames.includes('avatar_url')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN avatar_url TEXT\");\r\n }\r\n if (!userColumnNames.includes('bio')) {\r\n db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN bio TEXT\");\r\n }\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport default db;\r\n","server/src/index.ts":"import express from 'express';\r\nimport cors from 'cors';\r\nimport morgan from 'morgan';\r\nimport dotenv from 'dotenv';\r\nimport { initDB } from './db';\r\nimport authRoutes from './routes/auth';\r\nimport entityRoutes from './routes/entities';\r\nimport settingsRoutes from './routes/settings';\r\nimport adminRoutes from './routes/admin';\r\nimport organizationRoutes from './routes/organization';\r\nimport helmet from 'helmet';\r\nimport { maintenanceMiddleware } from './middleware/maintenance';\r\nimport { authMiddleware } from './middleware/auth';\r\nimport { rateLimit } from 'express-rate-limit';\r\nimport slowDown from 'express-slow-down';\r\nimport hpp from 'hpp';\r\n\r\ndotenv.config();\r\n\r\nconst app = express();\r\nconst PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;\r\n\r\n// Middleware\r\napp.use(helmet({\r\n contentSecurityPolicy: {\r\n directives: {\r\n defaultSrc: [\"'self'\"],\r\n scriptSrc: [\"'self'\", \"'unsafe-inline'\"],\r\n styleSrc: [\"'self'\", \"'unsafe-inline'\"],\r\n imgSrc: [\"'self'\", \"data:\", \"https:\"],\r\n connectSrc: [\"'self'\"]\r\n },\r\n },\r\n hsts: {\r\n maxAge: 31536000,\r\n includeSubDomains: true,\r\n preload: true\r\n }\r\n})); // Enhanced Security Headers\r\n\r\nconst allowedOrigins = process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGINS?.split(',') || ['http://localhost:8080'];\r\napp.use(cors({\r\n origin: (origin, callback) => {\r\n if (!origin || allowedOrigins.includes(origin)) {\r\n callback(null, true);\r\n } else {\r\n callback(new Error('Not allowed by CORS'));\r\n }\r\n },\r\n methods: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'PATCH', 'DELETE', 'OPTIONS'],\r\n allowedHeaders: ['Content-Type', 'Authorization', 'X-Requested-With'],\r\n credentials: true\r\n}));\r\n\r\napp.use(express.json({ limit: '1mb' }));\r\napp.use(hpp()); // Prevent HTTP Parameter Pollution\r\napp.use(morgan('dev'));\r\napp.disable('x-powered-by');\r\n\r\n// Slow Down - Delays requests after a threshold to deter brute force\r\nconst speedLimiter = slowDown({\r\n windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000, // 15 minutes\r\n delayAfter: 100, // allow 100 requests per 15 minutes\r\n delayMs: (hits) => hits * 100, // add 100ms delay per request above threshold\r\n});\r\napp.use(speedLimiter);\r\n\r\n// Rate Limiting - Hard limit\r\nconst limiter = rateLimit({\r\n windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000,\r\n max: 200, // Limit each IP to 200 requests per 15 mins\r\n message: { error: 'Too many requests, please try again later.' },\r\n standardHeaders: true,\r\n legacyHeaders: false,\r\n});\r\napp.use(limiter);\r\n\r\n// Database\r\ninitDB();\r\n\r\n// Routes\r\napp.get('/', (req, res) => {\r\n res.send(`\r\n
    \r\n

    Pure Dev Dashboard - Backend API

    \r\n

    O servidor está rodando corretamente!

    \r\n

    Para acessar a interface do Dashboard, acesse: http://localhost:8080

    \r\n
    \r\n

    Endpoints: /api/auth, /api/entities, /health

    \r\n
    \r\n `);\r\n});\r\n\r\napp.get('/health', (req, res) => {\r\n res.json({ status: 'ok', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() });\r\n});\r\n\r\napp.use('/api/auth', authRoutes);\r\n\r\n// Apply auth for all following routes\r\napp.use(authMiddleware as any);\r\n\r\n// Apply maintenance mode check for general users\r\napp.use(maintenanceMiddleware as any);\r\n\r\napp.use('/api/entities', entityRoutes);\r\napp.use('/api/settings', settingsRoutes);\r\napp.use('/api/admin', adminRoutes);\r\napp.use('/api/org', organizationRoutes);\r\n\r\n// Global Error Handler\r\napp.use((err: any, req: express.Request, res: express.Response, next: express.NextFunction) => {\r\n console.error('[Unhandled Error]', err);\r\n const status = err.status || 500;\r\n res.status(status).json({\r\n error: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production' ? 'Erro interno no servidor' : err.message,\r\n ...(process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' && { stack: err.stack })\r\n });\r\n});\r\n\r\napp.listen(PORT, () => {\r\n console.log(`Server running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);\r\n});\r\n","server/src/middleware/admin.ts":"import { Response, NextFunction } from 'express';\r\nimport { AuthRequest } from './auth';\r\nimport db from '../db';\r\n\r\nexport const adminMiddleware = (req: AuthRequest, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\r\n try {\r\n const user: any = db.prepare('SELECT role FROM users WHERE id = ?').get(req.userId);\r\n\r\n if (!user || user.role !== 'admin') {\r\n console.warn(`[Security] Unauthorized admin access attempt by user ${req.userId}`);\r\n return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Acesso negado. Requer privilégios de administrador.' });\r\n }\r\n\r\n next();\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n console.error('[AdminMiddleware] Error:', error);\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao verificar permissões.' });\r\n }\r\n};\r\n","server/src/middleware/auth.ts":"import { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';\r\nimport jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';\r\n\r\nconst JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'secret';\r\n\r\nexport interface AuthRequest extends Request {\r\n userId?: string;\r\n organizationId?: string;\r\n subRole?: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport const authMiddleware = (req: AuthRequest, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\r\n const token = req.header('Authorization')?.replace('Bearer ', '');\r\n\r\n if (!token) {\r\n return res.status(401).json({ error: 'No token, authorization denied' });\r\n }\r\n\r\n try {\r\n const decoded: any = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET);\r\n req.userId = decoded.userId;\r\n req.organizationId = decoded.organizationId;\r\n req.subRole = decoded.subRole;\r\n next();\r\n } catch (err) {\r\n res.status(401).json({ error: 'Token is not valid' });\r\n }\r\n};\r\n","server/src/middleware/maintenance.ts":"import { Response, NextFunction } from 'express';\r\nimport { AuthRequest } from './auth';\r\nimport db from '../db';\r\n\r\nexport const maintenanceMiddleware = (req: AuthRequest, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\r\n try {\r\n const config: any = db.prepare('SELECT value FROM system_configs WHERE key = ?').get('maintenance_mode');\r\n\r\n if (config?.value === 'true') {\r\n const user: any = db.prepare('SELECT role FROM users WHERE id = ?').get(req.userId);\r\n\r\n if (!user || user.role !== 'admin') {\r\n return res.status(503).json({\r\n error: 'Sistema em Manutenção',\r\n message: 'Estamos realizando melhorias. Por favor, tente novamente em alguns instantes.'\r\n });\r\n }\r\n }\r\n\r\n next();\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n next(); // Default to allowing if config fails\r\n }\r\n};\r\n","server/src/routes/admin.ts":"import { Router, Response } from 'express';\r\nimport { AuthRequest, authMiddleware } from '../middleware/auth';\r\nimport { adminMiddleware } from '../middleware/admin';\r\nimport db from '../db';\r\n\r\nconst router = Router();\r\n\r\n// Secure all admin routes\r\nrouter.use(adminMiddleware);\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * GET /api/admin/users\r\n * Returns list of all users with high-level statistics\r\n */\r\nrouter.get('/users', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const users = db.prepare(`\r\n SELECT \r\n u.id, \r\n u.email, \r\n u.role, \r\n u.sub_role,\r\n u.plan, \r\n u.organization_id,\r\n u.created_at,\r\n (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM entities WHERE userId = u.id) as total_entities,\r\n (SELECT MAX(updated_at) FROM entities WHERE userId = u.id) as last_activity\r\n FROM users u\r\n ORDER BY u.created_at DESC\r\n `).all();\r\n\r\n res.json(users);\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n console.error('[Admin API] Error fetching users:', error);\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao buscar lista de usuários.' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * PATCH /api/admin/users/:id\r\n * Update user privileges or subscription plan\r\n */\r\nrouter.patch('/users/:id', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { id } = req.params;\r\n const { role, plan } = req.body;\r\n\r\n const updates: string[] = [];\r\n const params: any[] = [];\r\n\r\n if (role !== undefined) {\r\n updates.push('role = ?');\r\n params.push(role);\r\n }\r\n if (plan !== undefined) {\r\n updates.push('plan = ?');\r\n params.push(plan);\r\n }\r\n\r\n if (updates.length > 0) {\r\n params.push(id);\r\n db.prepare(`UPDATE users SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`).run(...params);\r\n }\r\n\r\n res.json({ message: 'Usuário atualizado com sucesso.' });\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n console.error(`[Admin API] Error updating user ${req.params.id}:`, error);\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao atualizar usuário.' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * POST /api/admin/users/:id/reset-password\r\n * Directly resets a user's password to a default or provided one\r\n */\r\nrouter.post('/users/:id/reset-password', async (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { id } = req.params;\r\n const defaultPass = '123456789';\r\n const hashedPassword = await import('bcryptjs').then(b => b.default.hash(defaultPass, 10));\r\n\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE users SET password = ? WHERE id = ?').run(hashedPassword, id);\r\n\r\n res.json({ message: `Senha resetada para o padrão: ${defaultPass}` });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao resetar senha.' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * GET /api/admin/stats\r\n * Global system statistics\r\n */\r\nrouter.get('/stats', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const stats = {\r\n totalUsers: db.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM users').get() as any,\r\n totalEntities: db.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM entities').get() as any,\r\n entitiesByType: db.prepare('SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM entities GROUP BY type').all(),\r\n recentLogins: [] // Placeholder for a future login_logs table\r\n };\r\n\r\n res.json({\r\n users: stats.totalUsers.count,\r\n organizations: db.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM organizations').get() as any,\r\n dataPoints: stats.totalEntities.count,\r\n composition: stats.entitiesByType\r\n });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao gerar estatísticas.' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * GET /api/admin/config\r\n * Retrieves all system configurations\r\n */\r\nrouter.get('/config', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const configs = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM system_configs').all();\r\n const configMap = (configs as any[]).reduce((acc, curr) => {\r\n acc[curr.key] = curr.value;\r\n return acc;\r\n }, {});\r\n res.json(configMap);\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao buscar configurações.' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * PATCH /api/admin/config\r\n * Updates system configurations\r\n */\r\nrouter.patch('/config', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const updates = req.body;\r\n const stmt = db.prepare('UPDATE system_configs SET value = ? WHERE key = ?');\r\n\r\n for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(updates)) {\r\n stmt.run(String(value), key);\r\n }\r\n\r\n res.json({ message: 'Configurações atualizadas.' });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao atualizar configurações.' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * POST /api/admin/broadcast\r\n * Placeholder for global notification trigger\r\n */\r\nrouter.post('/broadcast', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { message } = req.body;\r\n if (!message) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Mensagem é obrigatória.' });\r\n\r\n // Update global broadcast config\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE system_configs SET value = ? WHERE key = ?').run(message, 'global_broadcast');\r\n\r\n res.json({ message: 'Mensagem de broadcast enviada com sucesso.' });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao enviar broadcast.' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * GET /api/admin/organizations\r\n * List all registered organizations\r\n */\r\nrouter.get('/organizations', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const orgs = db.prepare(`\r\n SELECT \r\n o.*, \r\n (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE organization_id = o.id) as total_users\r\n FROM organizations o\r\n `).all();\r\n res.json(orgs);\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao buscar organizações.' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * POST /api/admin/organizations\r\n * Register a new organization manually\r\n */\r\nrouter.post('/organizations', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { name, slug, owner_email } = req.body;\r\n const owner: any = db.prepare('SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?').get(owner_email);\r\n\r\n if (!owner) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Owner user not found' });\r\n\r\n const orgId = require('uuid').v4();\r\n db.prepare(`\r\n INSERT INTO organizations (id, name, slug, owner_id) \r\n VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\r\n `).run(orgId, name, slug, owner.id);\r\n\r\n // Update owner's role to org_admin\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE users SET organization_id = ?, sub_role = ? WHERE id = ?').run(orgId, 'org_admin', owner.id);\r\n\r\n res.status(201).json({ id: orgId, message: 'Organização criada com sucesso.' });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao criar organização.' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\nexport default router;\r\n","server/src/routes/auth.ts":"import { Router, Response } from 'express';\r\nimport bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';\r\nimport jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';\r\nimport { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';\r\nimport db from '../db';\r\nimport { z } from 'zod';\r\nimport { rateLimit } from 'express-rate-limit';\r\nimport { authMiddleware, AuthRequest } from '../middleware/auth';\r\n\r\nconst router = Router();\r\n\r\n// Strict rate limit for auth endpoints to prevent brute force\r\nconst authLimiter = rateLimit({\r\n windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000, // 15 minutes\r\n max: 10, // Limit each IP to 10 attempts\r\n message: { error: 'Too many authentication attempts, please try again in 15 minutes.' },\r\n standardHeaders: true,\r\n legacyHeaders: false,\r\n});\r\nconst JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET;\r\nif (!JWT_SECRET || JWT_SECRET === 'secret') {\r\n console.warn('[Security] Warning: JWT_SECRET is not securely configured. Using weak fallback for development ONLY.');\r\n}\r\nconst ACTUAL_SECRET = JWT_SECRET || 'secret';\r\n\r\nconst registerSchema = z.object({\r\n email: z.string().email(),\r\n password: z.string().min(6),\r\n type: z.enum(['individual', 'company']).optional().default('individual'),\r\n companyName: z.string().optional(),\r\n companySlug: z.string().regex(/^[a-z0-9-]+$/).optional(),\r\n inviteToken: z.string().optional(),\r\n});\r\n\r\nrouter.post('/register', authLimiter, async (req, res) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { email, password, type, companyName, companySlug, inviteToken } = registerSchema.parse(req.body);\r\n\r\n const existingUser = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = ?').get(email);\r\n if (existingUser) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'User already exists' });\r\n }\r\n\r\n if (type === 'company') {\r\n if (!companyName || !companySlug) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Company name and slug are required for corporate registration.' });\r\n }\r\n const existingOrg = db.prepare('SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = ?').get(companySlug);\r\n if (existingOrg) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Company URL already taken.' });\r\n }\r\n }\r\n\r\n // Handle Invitation logic\r\n let inviteData: any = null;\r\n if (inviteToken) {\r\n inviteData = db.prepare(`\r\n SELECT * FROM invitations \r\n WHERE token = ? AND status = 'pending' AND expires_at > DATETIME('now')\r\n `).get(inviteToken);\r\n\r\n if (!inviteData) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid or expired invitation' });\r\n }\r\n }\r\n\r\n const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);\r\n const userId = uuidv4();\r\n let orgId: string | null = inviteData ? inviteData.organization_id : null;\r\n let subRole = inviteData ? inviteData.role : 'user';\r\n\r\n const transaction = db.transaction(() => {\r\n // Create the user\r\n db.prepare('INSERT INTO users (id, email, password) VALUES (?, ?, ?)').run(\r\n userId,\r\n email,\r\n hashedPassword\r\n );\r\n\r\n // Handle company creation\r\n if (type === 'company') {\r\n orgId = uuidv4();\r\n subRole = 'org_admin';\r\n db.prepare(`\r\n INSERT INTO organizations (id, name, slug, owner_id, plan) \r\n VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\r\n `).run(orgId, companyName, companySlug, userId, 'corporate_starter');\r\n\r\n // Update user with org info\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE users SET organization_id = ?, sub_role = ?, plan = ? WHERE id = ?').run(\r\n orgId,\r\n subRole,\r\n 'pro', // Companies start with pro-level perks for the admin\r\n userId\r\n );\r\n } else if (inviteData) {\r\n // Link invited user to organization\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE users SET organization_id = ?, sub_role = ? WHERE id = ?').run(\r\n orgId,\r\n subRole,\r\n userId\r\n );\r\n // Mark invitation as accepted\r\n db.prepare(\"UPDATE invitations SET status = 'accepted' WHERE id = ?\").run(inviteData.id);\r\n }\r\n\r\n // Initialize default settings\r\n db.prepare('INSERT INTO settings (userId) VALUES (?)').run(userId);\r\n });\r\n\r\n transaction();\r\n\r\n const token = jwt.sign({\r\n userId,\r\n organizationId: orgId,\r\n subRole: subRole\r\n }, ACTUAL_SECRET, { expiresIn: '7d' });\r\n\r\n res.status(201).json({\r\n token,\r\n user: {\r\n id: userId,\r\n email,\r\n name: null,\r\n avatar_url: null,\r\n bio: null,\r\n role: 'user',\r\n plan: type === 'company' ? 'pro' : 'free',\r\n organization_id: orgId,\r\n sub_role: subRole\r\n }\r\n });\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n if (error instanceof z.ZodError) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid data format', details: error.issues });\r\n }\r\n console.error('[Register] Error:', error);\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\nrouter.post('/login', authLimiter, async (req, res) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { email, password } = registerSchema.parse(req.body);\r\n\r\n const user: any = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = ?').get(email);\r\n if (!user) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid credentials' });\r\n }\r\n\r\n const isMatch = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password);\r\n if (!isMatch) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid credentials' });\r\n }\r\n\r\n const token = jwt.sign({\r\n userId: user.id,\r\n organizationId: user.organization_id,\r\n subRole: user.sub_role\r\n }, ACTUAL_SECRET, { expiresIn: '7d' });\r\n\r\n res.json({\r\n token,\r\n user: {\r\n id: user.id,\r\n email: user.email,\r\n name: user.name,\r\n avatar_url: user.avatar_url,\r\n bio: user.bio,\r\n role: user.role,\r\n plan: user.plan,\r\n organization_id: user.organization_id,\r\n sub_role: user.sub_role\r\n }\r\n });\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n if (error instanceof z.ZodError) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid login format' });\r\n }\r\n console.error('[Login] Error:', error);\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// Forgot Password - Generates a 6-digit token\r\nrouter.post('/forgot-password', async (req, res) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { email } = z.object({ email: z.string().email() }).parse(req.body);\r\n const user: any = db.prepare('SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?').get(email);\r\n\r\n if (!user) {\r\n // We return 200 for security to not leak registered emails\r\n return res.json({ message: 'Se o e-mail estiver cadastrado, um código foi enviado.' });\r\n }\r\n\r\n const token = Math.floor(100000 + Math.random() * 900000).toString();\r\n const expires = new Date(Date.now() + 3600000).toISOString(); // 1 hour\r\n\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE users SET reset_token = ?, reset_expires = ? WHERE id = ?').run(\r\n token, expires, user.id\r\n );\r\n\r\n console.log(`[PASS_RESET] Token for ${email}: ${token}`);\r\n res.json({\r\n message: 'Se o e-mail estiver cadastrado, um código foi enviado com sucesso!'\r\n });\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao processar solicitação' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// Reset Password - Verifies token and updates password\r\nrouter.post('/reset-password', async (req, res) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { email, token, newPassword } = z.object({\r\n email: z.string().email(),\r\n token: z.string().length(6),\r\n newPassword: z.string().min(6)\r\n }).parse(req.body);\r\n\r\n const user: any = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = ? AND reset_token = ?').get(email, token);\r\n\r\n if (!user || new Date(user.reset_expires) < new Date()) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Código inválido ou expirado' });\r\n }\r\n\r\n const hashed = await bcrypt.hash(newPassword, 10);\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE users SET password = ?, reset_token = NULL, reset_expires = NULL WHERE id = ?').run(\r\n hashed, user.id\r\n );\r\n\r\n res.json({ message: 'Senha atualizada com sucesso!' });\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n res.status(400).json({ error: 'Dados inválidos' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// GET /api/auth/status - Public system info\r\nrouter.get('/status', (req, res) => {\r\n try {\r\n const configs = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM system_configs').all() as any[];\r\n const configMap = configs.reduce((acc, curr) => {\r\n acc[curr.key] = curr.value;\r\n return acc;\r\n }, {});\r\n res.json({\r\n maintenance: configMap.maintenance_mode === 'true',\r\n broadcast: configMap.global_broadcast || null\r\n });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao buscar status' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// GET /api/auth/invitation/:token - Validate invitation\r\nrouter.get('/invitation/:token', (req, res) => {\r\n try {\r\n const invite: any = db.prepare(`\r\n SELECT i.*, o.name as org_name \r\n FROM invitations i\r\n JOIN organizations o ON i.organization_id = o.id\r\n WHERE i.token = ? AND i.status = 'pending' AND i.expires_at > DATETIME('now')\r\n `).get(req.params.token);\r\n\r\n if (!invite) {\r\n return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Convite inválido ou expirado' });\r\n }\r\n\r\n res.json({ email: invite.email, org_name: invite.org_name, role: invite.role });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Erro ao validar convite' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// GET /api/auth/me - Get current user profile\r\nrouter.get('/me', authMiddleware, (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const user: any = db.prepare('SELECT id, email, name, avatar_url, bio, role, plan, organization_id, sub_role FROM users WHERE id = ?').get(req.userId);\r\n if (!user) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'User not found' });\r\n res.json(user);\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Error fetching profile' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// PATCH /api/auth/me - Update user profile\r\nrouter.patch('/me', authMiddleware, (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { name, avatar_url, bio } = z.object({\r\n name: z.string().optional().nullable(),\r\n avatar_url: z.string().optional().nullable(),\r\n bio: z.string().optional().nullable(),\r\n }).parse(req.body);\r\n\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE users SET name = ?, avatar_url = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?')\r\n .run(name, avatar_url, bio, req.userId);\r\n\r\n res.json({ message: 'Profile updated' });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Error updating profile' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// PATCH /api/auth/billing/plan - Mock planet change\r\nrouter.patch('/billing/plan', authMiddleware, (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { plan } = z.object({\r\n plan: z.enum(['free', 'pro', 'team'])\r\n }).parse(req.body);\r\n\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE users SET plan = ? WHERE id = ?').run(plan, req.userId);\r\n res.json({ message: `Plan updated to ${plan}` });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Error updating plan' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\nexport default router;\r\n","server/src/routes/entities.ts":"import { Router, Response } from 'express';\r\nimport { AuthRequest, authMiddleware } from '../middleware/auth';\r\nimport db from '../db';\r\nimport { z } from 'zod';\r\n\r\nconst router = Router();\r\n\r\nconst VALID_TYPES = [\r\n 'notes', 'prompts', 'snippets', 'cheatsheet', 'kanban',\r\n 'passwords', 'bookmarks', 'diary', 'contacts', 'checklists',\r\n 'financialAccounts', 'financialCategories', 'financialBudgets',\r\n 'financialTransactions', 'wellnessBreaks', 'gamificationHistory',\r\n 'budgets', 'serviceCatalog', 'stockMaterials', 'techSheets'\r\n];\r\n\r\nconst validateType = (req: any, res: Response, next: any) => {\r\n if (req.params.type && !VALID_TYPES.includes(req.params.type)) {\r\n console.warn(`[Security] Attempted access to invalid entity type: ${req.params.type} by user ${req.userId}`);\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid entity type access' });\r\n }\r\n next();\r\n};\r\n\r\nconst entitySchema = z.object({\r\n id: z.string().min(1),\r\n projectId: z.string().optional(),\r\n projetoId: z.string().optional(),\r\n}).passthrough();\r\n\r\nconst syncSchema = z.object({\r\n items: z.array(entitySchema)\r\n});\r\n\r\nrouter.use(validateType);\r\n\r\n// Get all items of a specific type (excluding soft-deleted)\r\nrouter.get('/:type', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { type } = req.params;\r\n const items = db.prepare(`\r\n SELECT * FROM entities \r\n WHERE (userId = ? OR (organization_id = ? AND access_level = 'shared')) \r\n AND type = ? \r\n AND is_deleted = 0\r\n `).all(req.userId, req.organizationId || null, type);\r\n\r\n const parsedItems = items.map((item: any) => {\r\n const content = JSON.parse(item.content);\r\n return {\r\n ...content,\r\n _serverV: item.version,\r\n _updatedAt: item.updated_at,\r\n _projectId: item.project_id\r\n };\r\n });\r\n\r\n res.json(parsedItems);\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n console.error(`[GET /${req.params.type}] Error:`, error);\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// Advanced Sync: Handles individual updates with conflict detection\r\nrouter.post('/:type/sync', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { type } = req.params;\r\n const { items } = syncSchema.parse(req.body);\r\n\r\n const checkStmt = db.prepare('SELECT version, userId FROM entities WHERE id = ?');\r\n const upsertStmt = db.prepare(`\r\n INSERT INTO entities (id, userId, type, project_id, content, version, is_deleted, organization_id, access_level) \r\n VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 0, ?, ?)\r\n ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET \r\n project_id = excluded.project_id,\r\n content = excluded.content,\r\n version = excluded.version,\r\n updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n is_deleted = 0,\r\n access_level = excluded.access_level\r\n `);\r\n\r\n const results = {\r\n synced: 0,\r\n conflicts: [] as any[],\r\n errors: [] as any[]\r\n };\r\n\r\n const transaction = db.transaction((syncItems) => {\r\n for (const item of syncItems) {\r\n try {\r\n const existing: any = db.prepare('SELECT version, userId, organization_id, access_level FROM entities WHERE id = ?').get(item.id);\r\n const clientVersion = item._v || 0;\r\n\r\n // 1. Authorization Check\r\n if (existing) {\r\n const isOwner = existing.userId === req.userId;\r\n const isSharedInOrg = existing.organization_id === req.organizationId && existing.access_level === 'shared';\r\n const hasAdminRights = req.subRole === 'org_admin' || req.subRole === 'manager';\r\n\r\n if (!isOwner && !(isSharedInOrg && hasAdminRights)) {\r\n results.errors.push({ id: item.id, error: 'Unauthorized to update this entity' });\r\n continue;\r\n }\r\n }\r\n\r\n // 2. Conflict Detection (Skip if client is explicitly deleting)\r\n if (existing && clientVersion < existing.version && !item._is_deleted) {\r\n const serverContent = JSON.parse(existing.content);\r\n results.conflicts.push({\r\n id: item.id,\r\n serverVersion: existing.version,\r\n serverData: serverContent\r\n });\r\n continue;\r\n }\r\n\r\n // 3. Handle Deletion or Upsert\r\n if (item._is_deleted) {\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE entities SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE id = ?')\r\n .run(item.id);\r\n results.synced++;\r\n } else {\r\n const newVersion = (existing?.version || 0) + 1;\r\n upsertStmt.run(\r\n item.id,\r\n existing ? existing.userId : req.userId,\r\n type,\r\n item.projectId || item.projetoId || null,\r\n JSON.stringify({ ...item, _v: newVersion }),\r\n newVersion,\r\n req.organizationId || null,\r\n item.accessLevel || 'private'\r\n );\r\n results.synced++;\r\n }\r\n } catch (err: any) {\r\n console.error(`[SYNC Item ${item.id}] Error:`, err);\r\n results.errors.push({ id: item.id, error: 'Database error' });\r\n }\r\n }\r\n });\r\n\r\n transaction(items);\r\n res.json(results);\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n if (error instanceof z.ZodError) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid input format', details: error.issues });\r\n }\r\n console.error(`[POST /${req.params.type}/sync] FAILED. Payload keys:`, Object.keys(req.body));\r\n console.error(`Error details:`, error);\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error', message: error.message });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// Create or Update a single entity (Simple API)\r\nrouter.post('/:type', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { type } = req.params;\r\n const item = entitySchema.parse(req.body);\r\n\r\n db.prepare(`\r\n INSERT INTO entities (id, userId, type, project_id, content, version, is_deleted, organization_id, access_level) \r\n VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(version),0)+1 FROM entities WHERE id=?), 0, ?, ?)\r\n ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET \r\n project_id = excluded.project_id,\r\n content = excluded.content,\r\n version = entities.version + 1,\r\n updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n is_deleted = 0,\r\n access_level = excluded.access_level\r\n `).run(\r\n item.id,\r\n req.userId,\r\n type,\r\n item.projectId || item.projetoId || null,\r\n JSON.stringify(item),\r\n item.id,\r\n req.organizationId || null,\r\n item.accessLevel || 'private'\r\n );\r\n\r\n res.status(201).json(item);\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n if (error instanceof z.ZodError) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid item data', details: error.issues });\r\n }\r\n console.error(`[POST /${req.params.type}] Error:`, error);\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// Soft Delete with Org Authorization\r\nrouter.delete('/:type/:id', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { id } = req.params;\r\n\r\n // Fetch existing to check ownership or org-admin rights\r\n const existing: any = db.prepare('SELECT userId, organization_id, access_level FROM entities WHERE id = ?').get(id);\r\n\r\n if (!existing) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Item not found' });\r\n\r\n const isOwner = existing.userId === req.userId;\r\n const isSharedInOrg = existing.organization_id === req.organizationId && existing.access_level === 'shared';\r\n const hasAdminRights = req.subRole === 'org_admin' || req.subRole === 'manager';\r\n\r\n if (!isOwner && !(isSharedInOrg && hasAdminRights)) {\r\n return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Unauthorized delete request' });\r\n }\r\n\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE entities SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = ?')\r\n .run(id);\r\n\r\n res.status(204).send();\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n console.error(`[DELETE /${req.params.type}/${req.params.id}] Error:`, error);\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\nexport default router;\r\n","server/src/routes/organization.ts":"import { Router, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';\r\nimport { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';\r\nimport db from '../db';\r\nimport { AuthRequest } from '../middleware/auth';\r\nimport { z } from 'zod';\r\n\r\nconst router = Router();\r\n\r\n// Middleware to ensure user belongs to an organization and has administrative rights\r\nconst orgAdminMiddleware = (req: AuthRequest, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {\r\n if (!req.organizationId) {\r\n return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Personal accounts cannot manage organizations.' });\r\n }\r\n if (req.subRole !== 'org_admin' && req.subRole !== 'manager') {\r\n return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Insufficient permissions within the organization.' });\r\n }\r\n next();\r\n};\r\n\r\n// GET /api/org/members - List all members of the organization\r\nrouter.get('/members', orgAdminMiddleware, (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const members = db.prepare(`\r\n SELECT id, email, sub_role, created_at \r\n FROM users \r\n WHERE organization_id = ?\r\n ORDER BY created_at DESC\r\n `).all(req.organizationId);\r\n\r\n res.json(members);\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch team members' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// POST /api/org/invitations - Create a new invitation\r\nconst inviteSchema = z.object({\r\n email: z.string().email(),\r\n role: z.enum(['employee', 'manager']).default('employee'),\r\n});\r\n\r\nrouter.post('/invitations', orgAdminMiddleware, (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { email, role } = inviteSchema.parse(req.body);\r\n\r\n // Check if user is already in the org\r\n const existingUser = db.prepare('SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ? AND organization_id = ?').get(email, req.organizationId);\r\n if (existingUser) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'User is already a member of this organization.' });\r\n }\r\n\r\n const invitationId = uuidv4();\r\n const token = uuidv4(); // Unique token for the URL\r\n const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(); // 7 days\r\n\r\n db.prepare(`\r\n INSERT INTO invitations (id, organization_id, email, role, token, expires_at)\r\n VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\r\n `).run(invitationId, req.organizationId, email, role, token, expiresAt);\r\n\r\n // In a real app, send email here. For dev, we just return the link/token.\r\n res.status(201).json({\r\n message: 'Invitation created successfully!',\r\n invitation: { email, role, token, expires_at: expiresAt }\r\n });\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n if (error instanceof z.ZodError) return res.status(400).json({ error: error.issues });\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to create invitation' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// GET /api/org/invitations - List pending invitations\r\nrouter.get('/invitations', orgAdminMiddleware, (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const invites = db.prepare(`\r\n SELECT id, email, role, status, expires_at, created_at, token\r\n FROM invitations\r\n WHERE organization_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\r\n ORDER BY created_at DESC\r\n `).all(req.organizationId);\r\n\r\n res.json(invites);\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch invitations' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// DELETE /api/org/invitations/:id - Revoke an invitation\r\nrouter.delete('/invitations/:id', orgAdminMiddleware, (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const result = db.prepare('DELETE FROM invitations WHERE id = ? AND organization_id = ?')\r\n .run(req.params.id, req.organizationId);\r\n\r\n if (result.changes === 0) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Invitation not found' });\r\n res.json({ message: 'Invitation revoked' });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to revoke invitation' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// GET /api/org/stats - Simple stats for the org dashboard\r\nrouter.get('/stats', orgAdminMiddleware, (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const memberCount = db.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM users WHERE organization_id = ?').get(req.organizationId) as any;\r\n const invitationCount = db.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM invitations WHERE organization_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\").get(req.organizationId) as any;\r\n const sharedEntities = db.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM entities WHERE organization_id = ? AND access_level = 'shared'\").get(req.organizationId) as any;\r\n\r\n res.json({\r\n members: memberCount.count,\r\n pendingInvites: invitationCount.count,\r\n sharedAssets: sharedEntities.count\r\n });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch stats' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// GET /api/org/branding - Fetch organization branding settings\r\nrouter.get('/branding', orgAdminMiddleware, (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const org = db.prepare('SELECT settings, name FROM organizations WHERE id = ?').get(req.organizationId) as any;\r\n if (!org) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Organization not found' });\r\n\r\n const settings = JSON.parse(org.settings || '{}');\r\n res.json({\r\n name: org.name,\r\n logo_url: settings.logo_url || '',\r\n primary_color: settings.primary_color || '355 78% 56%',\r\n accent_color: settings.accent_color || '355 78% 56%',\r\n });\r\n } catch (error) {\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch branding settings' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// PATCH /api/org/branding - Update organization branding settings\r\nconst brandingSchema = z.object({\r\n name: z.string().optional(),\r\n logo_url: z.string().optional(),\r\n primary_color: z.string().optional(),\r\n accent_color: z.string().optional(),\r\n});\r\n\r\nrouter.patch('/branding', orgAdminMiddleware, (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const updates = brandingSchema.parse(req.body);\r\n const org = db.prepare('SELECT settings, name FROM organizations WHERE id = ?').get(req.organizationId) as any;\r\n\r\n if (!org) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Organization not found' });\r\n\r\n const currentSettings = JSON.parse(org.settings || '{}');\r\n const newSettings = {\r\n ...currentSettings,\r\n logo_url: updates.logo_url !== undefined ? updates.logo_url : currentSettings.logo_url,\r\n primary_color: updates.primary_color !== undefined ? updates.primary_color : currentSettings.primary_color,\r\n accent_color: updates.accent_color !== undefined ? updates.accent_color : currentSettings.accent_color,\r\n };\r\n\r\n db.prepare('UPDATE organizations SET name = ?, settings = ? WHERE id = ?').run(\r\n updates.name || org.name,\r\n JSON.stringify(newSettings),\r\n req.organizationId\r\n );\r\n\r\n res.json({ message: 'Branding updated successfully' });\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n if (error instanceof z.ZodError) return res.status(400).json({ error: error.issues });\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to update branding' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\nexport default router;\r\n","server/src/routes/settings.ts":"import { Router, Response } from 'express';\r\nimport { AuthRequest, authMiddleware } from '../middleware/auth';\r\nimport db from '../db';\r\nimport { z } from 'zod';\r\n\r\nconst router = Router();\r\n\r\nconst settingsSchema = z.object({\r\n theme: z.enum(['light', 'dark']).optional(),\r\n enabledModules: z.array(z.string()).optional(),\r\n currentProject: z.string().optional(),\r\n});\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nrouter.get('/', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const settings = db.prepare('SELECT theme, enabledModules, currentProject FROM settings WHERE userId = ?').get(req.userId) as any;\r\n\r\n if (!settings) {\r\n return res.json({});\r\n }\r\n\r\n res.json({\r\n theme: settings.theme,\r\n enabledModules: settings.enabledModules ? JSON.parse(settings.enabledModules) : undefined,\r\n currentProject: settings.currentProject,\r\n });\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n console.error('[GET /settings] Error:', error);\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\nrouter.post('/', (req: AuthRequest, res: Response) => {\r\n try {\r\n const { theme, enabledModules, currentProject } = settingsSchema.parse(req.body);\r\n\r\n const existing = db.prepare('SELECT userId FROM settings WHERE userId = ?').get(req.userId);\r\n\r\n if (existing) {\r\n db.prepare(`\r\n UPDATE settings \r\n SET \r\n theme = COALESCE(?, theme), \r\n enabledModules = COALESCE(?, enabledModules), \r\n currentProject = COALESCE(?, currentProject)\r\n WHERE userId = ?\r\n `).run(\r\n theme || null,\r\n enabledModules ? JSON.stringify(enabledModules) : null,\r\n currentProject || null,\r\n req.userId\r\n );\r\n } else {\r\n db.prepare(`\r\n INSERT INTO settings (userId, theme, enabledModules, currentProject)\r\n VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\r\n `).run(\r\n req.userId,\r\n theme || 'dark',\r\n enabledModules ? JSON.stringify(enabledModules) : null,\r\n currentProject || 'default'\r\n );\r\n }\r\n\r\n res.json({ success: true });\r\n } catch (error: any) {\r\n if (error instanceof z.ZodError) {\r\n return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid settings format', details: error.issues });\r\n }\r\n console.error('[POST /settings] Error:', error);\r\n res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });\r\n }\r\n});\r\n\r\nexport default router;\r\n","server/tsconfig.json":"{\r\n \"compilerOptions\": {\r\n \"target\": \"ESNext\",\r\n \"module\": \"CommonJS\",\r\n \"rootDir\": \"./src\",\r\n \"outDir\": \"./dist\",\r\n \"esModuleInterop\": true,\r\n \"forceConsistentCasingInFileNames\": true,\r\n \"strict\": true,\r\n \"skipLibCheck\": true,\r\n \"resolveJsonModule\": true\r\n },\r\n \"include\": [\r\n \"src/**/*\"\r\n ]\r\n}"}; StackBlitzSDK.openProject({ title: 'Elite Dashboard Staging', description: 'Full developer dashboard staging environment', template: 'node', files: files, settings: { compile: { trigger: 'auto', clearConsole: false } } }, { target: '_blank' }); }
    Desta vez incluí todos os arquivos da pasta 'public' e corrigi a configuração do Vite.
